cuts.title: 한글 프롬프트
cuts.prompt:
Cut 1 Prompt — “어떨까, 넌” Watercolor Album Cover

## 1) Image Style and Mood

A square contemporary Korean indie-pop album cover blending an ultra-realistic beauty portrait with delicate watercolor artwork.

The image feels quiet, poetic, dreamy, and emotionally restrained, as though the memory of one person has softly appeared on a sheet of paper.

Use a clean digital editorial finish with subtle handmade watercolor texture. Do not apply any film stock reference, analog film grain, vintage film coloration, light leaks, or cinematic film emulation.

The overall mood is wistful, intimate, and contemplative rather than bright, cute, cheerful, or dramatically sad.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Arin’s side-profile portrait quietly emerges from a wide bloom of pink watercolor.

She should not look like a conventional model posing for a beauty photograph. She appears more like a half-remembered person slowly returning to someone’s thoughts.

Her facial features remain recognizable and realistically rendered, while her neck, shoulders, clothing, and outer silhouette gradually dissolve into the white paper and translucent watercolor.

The portrait exists between a real person and a painted silhouette, preserving Arin’s identity while maintaining the symbolic simplicity of an emotional album cover.

## 3) Location, Format, and Environment

A minimal abstract album-art environment rather than a physical location.

Square 1:1 composition.

The base is clean white or softly warm ivory watercolor paper with a subtle natural paper texture.

There is no room, landscape, furniture, architecture, or realistic background.

The visual world consists only of:

- Arin’s profile portrait
- Organic pink watercolor washes
- Generous white negative space
- The exact handwritten Korean title “어떨까, 넌”
- A small subtle watermark

## 4) Background and Graphic Elements

Across the central portion of the paper, create a broad organic watercolor bloom made from layered raspberry pink, muted magenta, blush pink, dusty rose, and softly diluted burgundy.

The watercolor should appear absorbed naturally into paper, with irregular feathered edges, translucent overlaps, soft pigment pooling, and gentle variations in saturation.

Keep the watercolor expressive but uncluttered.

A very small amount of delicate pigment particles or faint luminous specks may appear inside the wash, only enough to add a quiet dreamlike feeling.

Do not add flowers, decorative frames, furniture, jewelry, abstract symbols, logos, music notes, stars, hearts, or unrelated props.

## 5) Camera Composition and Layout

Place Arin in the center-right or right side of the square frame.

Show her in a bust-length left-facing side profile.

Her face, jawline, short bob haircut, neck, and upper shoulder line remain clearly visible, while the lower bust and shoulder edges softly fade into the ivory paper and pink watercolor.

Her face should occupy enough space to remain identifiable but should not dominate the entire cover.

Leave broad, intentional negative space on the left side, directly in the direction of her gaze.

Place the title “어떨까, 넌” within this left-side negative space, slightly away from the exact center.

The title must not overlap her eyes, nose, lips, jawline, or the central facial silhouette.

Maintain a refined visual balance between the portrait, watercolor, title, and empty paper.

Avoid a crowded poster layout, symmetrical commercial advertising composition, or oversized typography.

## 6) Model Expression — Arin

Arin is a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, clear fair skin, large almond-shaped eyes with natural double eyelids, a straight high nose bridge, and soft pink lips.

She has a trendy dark-brown short bob haircut, between chin and collarbone length, styled with soft inward C-curls and light see-through bangs.

Her appearance is modern, clean, elegant, and sophisticated, with refined contemporary K-pop beauty.

### Pose and Gaze

Arin is shown in a calm left-facing side profile or very slight semi-profile.

She looks toward a distant point in the empty space, slightly downward or straight ahead.

She must not look directly at the camera.

Her chin is lifted only slightly so that the jawline and neck remain graceful and natural.

Her shoulders are lowered and relaxed.

No dramatic gestures are needed, and her hands do not need to appear.

One or two fine strands of hair may fall naturally beside her cheek.

### Expression

A quiet, emotionally contained expression.

Her lips are softly relaxed, neither smiling nor visibly sorrowful.

Her gaze suggests longing, curiosity, and a private memory she has not spoken aloud.

Avoid crying, exaggerated melancholy, a broad smile, seductive expressions, or theatrical emotion.

### Wardrobe

A minimal white, ivory, or extremely pale blush-pink top.

Use a lightweight soft material such as matte silk, fine chiffon, or smooth soft cotton.

The design is simple and undecorated, with no prints, lace, ruffles, buttons, jewelry, logos, or strong fashion details.

The clothing should gently disappear into the pale paper beneath her shoulders.

### Makeup

Fresh contemporary K-beauty makeup with a thin, clean, semi-glowing complexion.

Natural luminous skin with visible realistic texture.

Soft rose-beige and muted pink shading around the eyes.

Naturally defined eyelashes without heavy eyeliner.

A light diffused blush spread softly across the cheeks.

Moist rose-pink or subtle MLBB lips with a translucent finish.

The makeup should feel pure, refined, and emotional rather than sharp, glamorous, or heavily styled.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Use soft, even diffused lighting with a gentle front-side or diagonal side light.

Arin’s profile must remain readable, including her eye shape, nose bridge, lips, jawline, and skin texture.

Keep shadows very soft and restrained so the portrait visually connects with the flat watercolor surface.

Avoid dramatic chiaroscuro, strong rim light, hard shadows, clipped highlights, glossy commercial studio lighting, or strong three-dimensional sculpting.

Main palette:

- Raspberry pink
- Muted magenta
- Blush pink
- Dusty rose
- Soft burgundy
- White
- Warm ivory

Maintain Arin’s natural, clean skin tone.

The pink should feel lyrical and emotionally expressive rather than fluorescent, candy-colored, childish, or excessively romantic.

## 8) Typography and Key Direction

Render only the exact Korean title:

“어떨까, 넌”

Use a delicate, naturally flowing handwritten Korean calligraphy style.

The lettering should feel personal and emotional, as though written gently by hand with a brush pen.

Use deep muted purple, dark plum, or restrained burgundy ink.

Keep the original phrase clearly legible and preserve the comma exactly.

Place it in the negative space toward which Arin is looking.

Do not add the artist name, album information, English translation, upper caption, lower caption, central logo, the word “치즈,” or any additional Korean or English text.

Do not place the title directly over Arin’s face.

The final image should feel like a poetic memory preserved on watercolor paper: Arin’s real profile remains visible, while her body and silhouette gently dissolve into pink pigment and white emptiness.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight.

The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the artwork.

cuts.title: 익숙한 아침
cuts.prompt:
Cut 1 Prompt - An Ordinary Morning

1) Photo Style and Mood
An ultra-realistic cinematic Korean romance music-video still photographed on Kodak Vision3 250D with the restrained softness of Kodak Portra 160. Cool steel-gray and muted blue tones, low contrast, fine analog grain, gentle highlight rolloff, realistic fluorescent lighting, and subtle optical vignetting. The mood is quiet, routine, slightly tired, and emotionally neutral.

2) Scene Concept and Story
Arin stands quietly in front of platform screen doors while morning commuters move around her with restrained motion blur. Arin remains still and sharply focused inside the moving crowd. No romantic counterpart appears. The scene represents a completely ordinary morning before anything meaningful begins.

3) Place, Time, Environment
A clean underground subway platform in a modern Korean business district at approximately 7:20 a.m. on a summer weekday. Cool ceiling lights, pale-gray flooring, glass platform doors, brushed-metal structures, and subtle commuter activity. No readable station names, signs, advertisements, logos, or display text.

4) Background and Props
Softly blurred commuters cross in front of and behind Arin. Include glass doors, metallic columns, restrained reflections, and long floor guide lines. Arin carries a structured black leather tote bag. Keep the setting realistic and uncluttered.

5) Camera Composition
Vertical 3:4. A wide full-body or knee-up shot with a 50mm lens at eye level. Place Arin slightly off-center with open space for moving commuters. Use platform frames and floor lines as leading lines. Add one softly blurred foreground commuter near the frame edge. Arin faces the tracks and looks beyond the doors, never at the camera.

6) Model Expression
Arin, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, clear fair skin, large almond-shaped dark-brown eyes with natural double eyelids, a straight high nose bridge, soft pink lips, and a trendy chin-to-collarbone dark-brown bob with inward C-curls and light see-through bangs. Slim youthful figure, narrow waist, long elegant legs, realistic Korean proportions, healthy physique, graceful posture.

Outfit: light-gray oversized single-breasted blazer, cream short-sleeve knitted top, charcoal straight-leg slacks, structured black tote, minimal silver earrings, black pointed slingback shoes.

Makeup: clean professional morning makeup, even fair skin, muted peach-beige blush, natural brows, subtle brown eyeliner, lightly defined lashes, neutral-pink lips.

Expression and Pose: calm expression without expectation, relaxed lips, slightly tired but clear eyes. One hand holds the tote while the other rests naturally near the blazer side seam. Composed but not posed.

7) Lighting and Color
Use cool subway ceiling lights with soft frontal fill to prevent dark under-eye shadows. Maintain cool gray, steel blue, and cold white. Pink is almost absent. Keep Arin’s face gently brighter than the crowd. Add fine grain and soft optical vignetting.

8) Key Direction Points
The scene must feel genuinely ordinary, not dramatically lonely. Preserve realistic anatomy, natural hands, accurate footwear, believable reflections, and subtle motion blur. Avoid a romantic counterpart, direct camera gaze, exaggerated sadness, broad smiles, fantasy lighting, neon colors, dominant pink, readable text, and logos.

9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner. Use Helvetica Neue, thin or light weight, white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photograph.

cuts.title: 처음 걸린 시선
cuts.prompt:
Cut 2 Prompt - The First Interrupted Glance

1) Photo Style and Mood
An ultra-realistic cinematic Korean romance editorial still photographed on Kodak Vision3 250D with subtle Kodak Portra 160 softness. Cool low-contrast platform colors, fine 35mm grain, restrained highlights, shallow depth of field, and delicate optical vignetting. The mood is observant and emotionally restrained.

2) Scene Concept and Story
Arin waits for a train and casually turns her head about 15 to 20 degrees. A man’s blurred shoulder and pale shirt sleeve enter the extreme foreground. His face and identity remain hidden. Arin does not stare; only her eyes move toward him for a brief moment, as though she vaguely recognizes him. The reaction is not love or excitement, only a small interruption in her routine.

3) Place, Time, Environment
A modern underground subway platform in a Korean business district at approximately 7:20 a.m. on a summer weekday. Glass platform doors, cool ceiling lights, gray flooring, restrained metallic structures, and softly blurred commuters. No readable signs, advertisements, station names, logos, or display information.

4) Background and Props
The man’s out-of-focus shoulder occupies no more than 15 percent of one frame corner. Behind Arin are softly blurred screen doors and rectangular ceiling lights. A structured black tote hangs naturally from her hand or forearm. A faint dusty-pink reflection touches only one side of her cheek or blazer.

5) Camera Composition
Vertical 3:4. Over-the-shoulder medium close-up with an 85mm lens. The anonymous man’s shoulder forms a soft foreground frame while Arin remains sharply focused in a clear three-quarter profile. Her torso faces the tracks, her face turns slightly toward the foreground figure, and her eyes complete the final movement. She does not look at the camera.

6) Model Expression
Arin, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, clear fair skin, large almond-shaped dark-brown eyes with natural double eyelids, a straight high nose bridge, soft pink lips, and a trendy short dark-brown bob with inward C-curls and light see-through bangs. Slim youthful figure, narrow waist, long elegant legs, realistic Korean anatomy, healthy physique, elegant posture.

Outfit: light-gray oversized blazer, cream short-sleeve knitted top, charcoal straight-leg slacks, structured black tote, minimal silver earrings, black pointed slingback shoes.

Makeup: luminous natural skin, subtle peach-pink blush, softly defined brown eyes, tiny catchlight, muted natural-pink lips.

Expression and Pose: almost neutral lips, relaxed eyebrows, brief sideways eye movement. The expression suggests “Have I seen him before?” rather than surprise.

7) Lighting and Color
Preserve cool fluorescent platform ambience. Use soft frontal fill to illuminate Arin’s eyes and create one small catchlight. Add an extremely subtle dusty-pink reflection along one cheek or blazer edge. Keep the foreground and outer frame gently darker.

8) Key Direction Points
The emotion must come from eye direction and timing, not dramatic expression. The man must remain unidentifiable. Avoid broad smiles, raised eyebrows, intense staring, direct camera gaze, physical interaction, strong pink lighting, readable text, and logos.

9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner. Use Helvetica Neue, thin or light weight, white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended.

cuts.title: 유리 속에 함께 담긴 두 사람
cuts.prompt:
Cut 3 Prompt - Reflections Beyond the Doors

1) Photo Style and Mood
An ultra-realistic cinematic commute portrait inspired by Kodak Vision3 250D with subtle Kodak Portra softness. Soft low contrast, fine analog grain, mixed cool and warm reflections, restrained color, wide dynamic range, and a quiet film-still atmosphere.

2) Scene Concept and Story
A subway train has arrived, creating overlapping layers between platform screen doors and train windows. Arin’s side profile appears clearly in the glass reflection. Farther away, the indistinct silhouette of an anonymous man appears only inside another reflected layer. They do not face each other directly. Arin pretends to observe the train door while quietly checking his reflected presence again. His face remains invisible, turned away or blocked by another commuter.

3) Place, Time, Environment
A modern underground subway platform in a Korean business district at approximately 7:20 a.m. on a summer weekday. A stopped train, layered windows, cool platform lighting, and restrained warm train-interior glow. No readable station names, route maps, advertisements, train numbers, logos, or digital text.

4) Background and Props
Layered glass panels, metallic vertical frames, soft train-interior light, subdued commuter silhouettes, and controlled reflections. Arin holds a structured black tote. The anonymous man appears only as a distant reflected shoulder-and-body silhouette. Avoid duplicated faces, distorted bodies, or excessive ghost images.

5) Camera Composition
Vertical 3:4. Layered medium shot using a 70mm lens, framed through the platform glass. Include a small portion of Arin’s real figure near one edge and her clearer reflected side profile in the central glass layer. Place the man only in a separate reflected layer farther away. Use vertical door frames to divide them. Arin looks toward the reflection, not at the camera.

6) Model Expression
Arin, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, clear fair skin, large almond-shaped dark-brown eyes, straight high nose bridge, soft pink lips, and a trendy short dark-brown bob with inward C-curls and light see-through bangs. Slim youthful figure, narrow waist, long elegant legs, realistic Korean anatomy, healthy physique, elegant posture.

Outfit: light-gray oversized blazer, cream short-sleeve knitted top, charcoal straight-leg slacks, structured black tote, silver earrings, black pointed slingbacks.

Makeup: natural polished makeup, clear skin, soft peach-beige blush, understated brown eye definition, muted pink lips.

Expression and Pose: closed lips, calm thoughtful expression, eyes resting on the distant reflected silhouette while her body remains oriented toward the train.

7) Lighting and Color
Combine cool-white platform light around Arin with faint warm-peach glow around the reflected man. Introduce the first clearly perceptible peach-pink through train-interior light and glass reflection, but keep it restrained. Add fine grain, delicate bloom, soft highlight rolloff, and mild vignetting.

8) Key Direction Points
The scene should feel like two people briefly sharing one visual frame without meeting. Prioritize Arin’s reflected profile, controlled glass layers, and emotional distance. Avoid direct eye contact, visible male face, physical contact, strong smiles, crowded reflections, duplicated faces, fantasy overlays, readable text, and logos.

9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner. Use Helvetica Neue, thin or light weight, white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended.

cuts.title: 또 같은 방향
cuts.prompt:
Cut 4 Prompt - Walking in the Same Direction

1) Photo Style and Mood
An ultra-realistic cinematic Korean romance still inspired by Fujifilm Pro 400H and Kodak Vision3 250D. Airy warm-gray architecture, pale powder-blue and ivory tones, cool pastel shadows, subtle mint undertones, low contrast, fine analog grain, and gentle telephoto compression. The mood is quietly familiar.

2) Scene Concept and Story
Inside a long subway connection corridor, an anonymous man walks several steps ahead while Arin travels in the same direction behind him. She is not following him; she is moving along her normal route. After recognizing his back, she briefly slows or adjusts her bag strap while maintaining a natural distance. Passing commuters intermittently cross between them. The man’s back, pale shirt, and simple dark bag remain visible, but his face stays concealed.

3) Place, Time, Environment
A long underground pedestrian corridor connecting a subway platform to a city exit at approximately 7:30 a.m. on a summer weekday. Warm-gray walls, repeating rectangular ceiling lights, polished flooring, glass or metal wall sections, and a bright warm-white opening at the distant end. No readable signs, advertisements, wayfinding text, logos, or station branding.

4) Background and Props
Repeating ceiling lights establish visual rhythm. Commuters create restrained foreground and midground layers. Arin carries a minimal leather shoulder bag. The man wears a pale neutral shirt, dark tailored trousers, clean formal shoes, and a simple dark work bag. Keep props unbranded.

5) Camera Composition
Vertical 3:4. Telephoto corridor shot using an 85mm or 105mm lens. Place the man slightly forward near the corridor’s visual center, softly out of focus. Keep Arin several steps behind and sharply focused. Use passing commuters as temporary foreground obstructions. Ceiling lights and wall lines direct the eye toward both figures. Arin briefly checks his back before looking forward.

6) Model Expression
Arin, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, clear fair skin, large almond-shaped dark-brown eyes, straight high nose bridge, soft pink lips, and a short dark-brown bob with inward C-curls and light see-through bangs. Slim youthful figure, narrow waist, long elegant legs, anatomically accurate Korean proportions, healthy physique, graceful posture.

Outfit: powder-blue shirt, ivory long tailored vest, cream wide-leg trousers, minimal leather shoulder bag, thin metal wristwatch, white loafers.

Makeup: fresh neutral makeup, clear skin, cool peach blush, softly defined eyes, natural lashes, pale rose lips.

Expression and Pose: restrained recognition, “There he is again.” Face mostly neutral, eyes carrying a small spark of familiarity. One hand lightly adjusts the bag strap while she walks.

7) Lighting and Color
Use repeating ceiling lights as rhythmic illumination with warmer glow at the corridor’s far end. Expose Arin’s powder-blue and ivory outfit clearly against the warm-gray background. Keep skin clean and neutral. Add delicate pale-peach warmth, fine grain, and soft edge vignetting.

8) Key Direction Points
Show recognition without implying pursuit. Maintain believable distance. Keep Arin casual and socially natural. Avoid visible male face, backward glance from the man, physical contact, dramatic longing, theatrical poses, readable signs, and logos.

9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner. Use Helvetica Neue, thin or light weight, white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended.

cuts.title: 유리로 몰래 확인하는 시선
cuts.prompt:
Cut 5 Prompt - A Secret Glance in the Glass

1) Photo Style and Mood
An ultra-realistic cinematic Korean romance editorial photograph inspired by Fujifilm Pro 400H. Airy cool pastels, pale peach and lilac reflections, soft low contrast, luminous natural skin, fine analog grain, restrained glass highlights, and subtle optical vignetting. The mood is cautious, intimate, and quietly curious.

2) Scene Concept and Story
Arin walks beside a glass wall in a long subway connection corridor. Without turning directly, she uses the glass reflection to check an anonymous man walking slightly behind or beside her. In physical space, he is partly hidden by another commuter and becomes more noticeable only through the reflection. Arin continues forward while her face tilts slightly toward the glass and her eyes settle on his reflected silhouette. One hand lightly holds her bag strap.

3) Place, Time, Environment
A modern underground corridor leading from a subway platform toward a city exit at approximately 7:30 a.m. on a summer weekday. Warm-gray walls, long glass partition, repeated ceiling lights, neutral polished flooring, and restrained commuter flow. No readable signs, maps, advertisements, company logos, or station text.

4) Background and Props
A clean glass wall with subtle pale-peach and lilac reflections, passing commuter silhouettes, repeating overhead lights, and minimal architectural lines. Arin carries a minimal leather shoulder bag. The man appears as an indistinct reflected figure in a pale shirt and dark trousers. Avoid excessive glare, complex ghost reflections, duplicated facial features, or visible male identity.

5) Camera Composition
Vertical 3:4. Medium shot using a 70mm lens that includes both Arin’s real figure and the glass reflection. Place the boundary between reality and reflection near the central third. Arin occupies one side while the reflected man appears on the other. Only one representation of Arin’s face should be sharply focused. Her body continues forward while her gaze angles toward the reflection. She never looks at the camera.

6) Model Expression
Arin, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, clear fair skin, large almond-shaped dark-brown eyes, straight high nose bridge, soft pink lips, and a trendy short dark-brown bob with inward C-curls and light see-through bangs. Slim youthful figure, narrow waist, long elegant legs, realistic Korean anatomy, healthy physique, elegant posture.

Outfit: powder-blue or pale-lilac shirt, ivory long tailored vest, cream wide-leg trousers, minimal leather shoulder bag, thin metal wristwatch, white loafers.

Makeup: clean neutral makeup, luminous skin, muted peach-lilac blush, understated brown eyeliner, delicate lashes, natural rose-pink lips.

Expression and Pose: neutral lips, slightly warmer eyes, no visible smile. She looks cautious and self-aware, as though hoping no one notices she is checking the reflection.

7) Lighting and Color
Use soft corridor illumination with clean neutral skin tones. Allow thin pale-peach and pale-lilac bands across the glass, keeping them physically plausible. Keep the center gently bright and outer edges softly darker. Add fine grain and restrained highlight bloom.

8) Key Direction Points
The glass reflection is the storytelling device. Arin appears interested but restrained. The man remains secondary, reflected, hidden, and unidentifiable. Avoid direct head turn, visible male face, camera-facing smile, dramatic romance pose, distorted glass anatomy, duplicated faces, readable text, and logos.

9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner. Use Helvetica Neue, thin or light weight, white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended.

cuts.title: 스쳐 지나가며 의식하는 순간
cuts.prompt:
Cut 6 Prompt - Passing Close Enough to Notice

1) Photo Style and Mood
An ultra-realistic cinematic Korean romance music-video still photographed on Kodak Vision3 250D with the airy pastel softness of Fujifilm Pro 400H. Warm-gray architecture, ivory, powder blue, pale-peach reflections, restrained saturation, low contrast, fine analog grain, gentle highlight rolloff, and subtle optical vignetting. The mood is quiet, fleeting, and emotionally restrained.

2) Scene Concept and Story
Inside a long underground subway connection corridor, an anonymous man walks naturally toward the deeper direction of the passage, shown only as a complete back-facing full-body figure. Arin approaches from the opposite or slightly diagonal path. Capture the exact instant when they pass close beside each other. Neither person stops, speaks, or turns fully. The man continues without looking back. Arin keeps walking but sends a brief sideways glance toward his back. Their shoulders may appear close enough to nearly brush, but they must not touch.

3) Place, Time, Environment
A modern underground pedestrian corridor at approximately 7:30 a.m. on a summer weekday. Warm-gray walls, polished neutral flooring, repeating rectangular ceiling lights, restrained glass sections, clean metallic details, and a distant warm-white opening. A few softly blurred commuters may appear in the distance. No readable signs, route maps, advertisements, logos, exit numbers, or digital text.

4) Background and Props
Repeating ceiling lights and long wall lines create strong perspective. Add faint pale-peach reflections on the floor and glass wall. Arin carries a minimal leather shoulder bag. The man wears a pale neutral office shirt, dark tailored trousers, clean formal shoes, and carries a simple dark work bag. All items remain unbranded.

5) Camera Composition and Framing
Vertical 3:4 composition. Wide full shot using a 50mm or 70mm lens from eye level or slightly lower. Both Arin and the man must appear fully from head to toe. Place the man slightly ahead as a complete back view. Place Arin on the opposite or diagonal path so their movement crosses naturally. Keep a narrow visible gap between shoulders or arms. Use ceiling lights, floor lines, and corridor edges to guide the eye. Arin is the primary focus; the man may remain slightly softer.

6) Model Expression
Arin, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, clear fair skin, large almond-shaped dark-brown eyes, a straight high nose bridge, soft pink lips, and a trendy short dark-brown bob with soft inward C-curls and light see-through bangs. Slim youthful figure, narrow waist, long elegant legs, realistic Korean anatomy, and graceful posture.

Outfit: powder-blue or pale-lilac shirt, ivory long tailored vest, cream wide-leg trousers, minimal leather shoulder bag, thin metal wristwatch, and clean white loafers.

Makeup: fresh neutral makeup with luminous skin, soft peach blush, natural brows, understated brown eyeliner, delicate lashes, and pale rose lips.

Expression and Pose: almost expressionless lips, natural walking posture, and only a brief sideways glance or slight head turn toward the man. The man remains a natural full-body back view and never reacts.

7) Lighting, Color, Atmosphere
Use neutral corridor ceiling light with a soft warm-white glow at the far end. Add faint pale-peach reflections without making the scene overtly pink. Keep Arin's face slightly brighter through restrained depth of field and soft directional fill. Fine grain, gentle practical-light bloom, realistic walking motion, and soft optical vignette.

8) Key Direction Points
Clearly show both complete figures, their crossing paths, close untouching distance, and Arin's subtle awareness. Preserve realistic walking anatomy, arm swing, foot placement, body scale, and corridor perspective. Avoid contact, shoulder collision, visible male face or profile, backward glance from the man, stopping, conversation, dramatic romance posing, hand-holding, crowded corridor, readable text, and logos.

9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner. Use Helvetica Neue, thin or light weight, white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photograph.

A wide area of empty space in the direction of her gaze represents his absence. Her cream bag is still slightly in motion from the interrupted step.

A spacious subway exit beneath a modern glass canopy at approximately 7:40 a.m. on a summer weekday. Open blue sky, translucent canopy panels, minimal metal structures, fresh green leaves, light stone paving, and the edge of a calm business district. cuts.title: 뒤돌아보는 순간, 한눈에 마음이 움직이는 장면
cuts.prompt:
Cut 14 Prompt - The Moment She Looks Back

1) Photo Style and Mood
An ultra-realistic cinematic Korean romance music-video still photographed on Kodak Vision3 250D with the refined pastel softness of Kodak Portra 160. Soft cream white, blush pink, pale sky blue, peach coral, summer green, delicate golden highlights, low contrast, fine analog grain, gentle highlight rolloff, creamy telephoto bokeh, and subtle optical vignetting. The mood is bright, tender, shy, lightly playful, and emotionally immediate. This is not a confession, seduction, or posed couple portrait. It is the instant when Arin's natural look back appears unexpectedly beautiful through an anonymous man's gaze.

2) Scene Concept and Story
In a modern office-district plaza with a shallow water feature and summer garden, Arin and an anonymous man briefly walked together before separating toward their workplaces. Arin has turned toward her own route and moved two or three steps forward with her back mostly toward him. She does not stop completely. While continuing to walk, she turns her upper torso and head toward the man to check whether he is still there. Her pelvis and lower body remain oriented toward her destination, with one foot forward in mid-stride. Her shoulders and upper torso rotate gently about 20 to 30 degrees, and her head follows naturally. She must not twist only her neck. The ends of her short bob and a few strands near her bangs move lightly after the turn.

The camera is positioned near the anonymous man's viewpoint. Only a tiny, fully blurred portion of his shoulder, shirt collar, or upper arm appears at one extreme frame edge. His face and full body remain outside the image. Arin looks toward this blurred foreground figure, not toward the camera. To Arin, it is a brief glance to see whether he is still watching. To the man, her natural look back feels unexpectedly beautiful and unforgettable.

3) Place, Time, Environment
A polished outdoor office-district plaza at approximately 8:00 a.m. on a clear summer weekday. Include a shallow water feature, pale cream stone paving, contemporary office facades, summer greenery, sparse blush-pink and peach flowers, pale-blue sky reflections, and a bright uncluttered atmosphere. The location remains recognizable while softly compressed behind Arin. No readable signs, advertisements, logos, or vehicle plates.

4) Background and Props
Layer pale-blue water reflections, cream stone, soft green plants, sparse pink flowers, office architecture, and gentle steps through telephoto compression. Arin carries a rose-beige top-handle bag in one hand; her other hand hangs naturally with relaxed fingers. The anonymous man appears only as a blurred foreground fragment occupying about 5 to 10 percent of the frame. All objects remain unbranded.

5) Camera Composition and Framing
Vertical 3:4 composition. Use an over-the-shoulder viewpoint near the anonymous man's perspective with an 85mm to 135mm telephoto lens, preferably around 105mm. Use a long-medium or nearly full-body shot showing Arin from the knees upward or close to full length. Arin must appear large enough for her eye direction, subtle smile, posture, and hair movement to remain clear. Place the man's fully defocused shoulder at the extreme left or right edge. Position Arin slightly opposite it so her gaze travels naturally toward him.

Depth separation: anonymous man as extremely blurred foreground, Arin as sharply focused primary subject, and the plaza, water, flowers, and architecture as compressed background bokeh. Telephoto compression should make their emotional distance feel closer. The frame should feel candid, not like a model deliberately turning for a camera.

6) Model Expression
Arin, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, clear fair skin, large almond-shaped dark-brown eyes with natural double eyelids, a straight high nose bridge, soft pink lips, and a trendy short dark-brown bob with soft inward C-curls and light see-through bangs. Slim youthful figure, narrow waist, long elegant legs, realistic Korean anatomy, and graceful posture.

Outfit: blush-pink structured short-sleeve jacket, ivory silk top, cream flared midi skirt, rose-beige top-handle bag, delicate gold earrings, and ivory strap shoes.

Makeup: refined natural romantic makeup with luminous fair skin, peach-pink blush, softly defined almond eyes, subtle brown eyeliner, fine lashes, a small catchlight, and soft blush-rose lips. Preserve realistic skin texture and natural facial proportions.

Pose: Arin remains in motion with one foot forward. Her pelvis, hips, and lower body continue facing her commute direction. Her upper torso and shoulders rotate naturally about 20 to 30 degrees toward the man, and her head follows the shoulder movement. Her neck remains relaxed and anatomically comfortable. One hand carries the bag naturally while the other arm hangs beside her body. Avoid deliberate fashion posing or excessive hip movement.

Expression and Gaze: Arin looks toward the blurred foreground shoulder, not into the camera lens. Her eyes soften first as she realizes he is still watching. A very small smile begins at the corners of her lips. The expression combines quiet shyness, warm recognition, gentle happiness, and a faint playful feeling of “You were still looking at me.” Her smile remains restrained and natural.

7) Hair Movement
As Arin turns, the ends of her short bob move lightly to one side. Her see-through bangs and a few strands near her ears shift only slightly. Keep the hair close to its natural silhouette. Do not create large windblown shapes, dramatic flying strands, or spinning movement. Her face, eyes, and gaze remain clearly visible.

8) Lighting, Color, Atmosphere
Use soft diffused summer-morning light. Illuminate Arin's face evenly with warm side light and restrained frontal fill to prevent dark shadows beneath the eyes and jaw. Create a small catchlight in the eye turned toward the man. Add a thin golden-peach rim along her bob, shoulder, and blush-pink jacket. Allow pale-blue reflections from the water to lift the underside of her face and cream skirt. Keep exposure bright and clean with soft highlight rolloff.

Use blush pink and cream as the main colors, supported by summer green, pale-blue water reflections, cream stone, and restrained peach-coral accents. Add a faint rose-pink lens flare between the blurred foreground man and Arin, naturally connected to backlight, flowers, water reflections, or lens optics. It must not cover Arin's skin or resemble fantasy fog. Apply fine film grain, creamy telephoto bokeh, gentle background bloom, and a soft vignette.

9) Key Direction Points
The true subject is how Arin appears through the anonymous man's gaze when she naturally looks back. Show that she has begun walking toward her destination, does not completely stop, keeps one foot forward, leaves her lower body facing ahead, and turns her shoulders, upper torso, and head together naturally. Her neck must not twist independently. Her expression is shy, warm, and faintly playful. The anonymous man remains almost entirely outside the image. Preserve realistic walking anatomy, weight distribution, relaxed hands, torso rotation, facial structure, eye direction, and hair movement.

Avoid completely stopping and fully turning around, direct frontal camera gaze, neck-only twisting, strained neck posture, excessive torso rotation, exaggerated S-curve posing, large windblown hair, seductive expression, broad smile, visible male face or full body, the man occupying more than 10 percent of the frame, calling or beckoning gestures, wide-angle distance, staged couple portrait, artificial hearts, fantasy sparkles, heavy pink fog, plastic skin, readable text, and logos.

10) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner. Use Helvetica Neue, thin or light weight, white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photograph.

cuts.title: 분홍빛으로 아름다워진 세계
cuts.prompt:
Cut 15 Prompt - A World Softened by Pink

1) Photo Style and Mood
An ultra-realistic cinematic Korean romance hero portrait inspired by Kodak Portra 160 and Kodak Vision3 250D. Very fine analog grain, soft low contrast, luminous natural skin, creamy highlight rolloff, warm summer daylight, elegant rose-pink and peach-coral accents, and delicate optical vignetting. The mood is tender, quietly fulfilled, and emotionally transformed.

2) Scene Concept and Story
A close portrait of Arin in a bright modern plaza. She does not look at the camera. Her gaze remains directed toward an unseen person outside the frame. Arin has silently accepted that she likes him. Her expression is not a broad smile, but calm warmth visible around both eyes and lips.

Behind her, cream-stone architecture, pale-blue water reflections, seasonal pink flowers, and fresh summer greenery blend softly through shallow depth of field. From one side, thin rose-pink and peach-coral color washes enter like delicate watercolor spreading through light. The color wash must remain connected to real flowers, reflected light, lens flare, and background bokeh. It brushes the edge of her hair, background, and lower shoulder without covering or distorting her face.

3) Place, Time, Environment
A refined office-district plaza with a shallow water feature and landscaped summer garden at approximately 8:00 a.m. on a summer weekday. Cream-stone paving, pale-blue sky reflected in water, soft green planting, and restrained pink seasonal flowers. No readable building names, commercial signs, company logos, advertisements, or text.

4) Background and Props
Cream architectural surfaces, blue water reflections, soft pink flowers, summer-green foliage, gentle circular bokeh, and physically plausible rose-peach reflected light. Arin carries a rose-beige top-handle bag or lightly holds the lower edge of her structured jacket. The anonymous man does not appear. His presence exists only outside the frame through Arin’s stable gaze.

5) Camera Composition
Vertical 3:4 composition optimized as the final representative image. Tight chest-up or shoulder-up close-up using an 85mm lens. Show Arin in a clear three-quarter profile with minimal facial distortion. Position her face slightly off-center and preserve a small amount of open space in the direction of her gaze. Her shoulders angle gently away from the camera while her face turns toward the unseen person. Render flowers and water as layered color fields rather than sharply defined objects. Keep her facial outline, eyes, lips, and bob crisp.

6) Model Expression
Arin, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, clear fair skin, large almond-shaped dark-brown eyes with natural double eyelids, a straight high nose bridge, soft pink lips, and a trendy short dark-brown bob with inward C-curls and light see-through bangs. A gentle summer breeze moves the ends of her bob and a few fine strands near her face. Slim youthful figure with naturally balanced proportions, realistic Korean anatomy, healthy physique, and elegant posture.

Outfit: blush-pink structured short-sleeve jacket, ivory silk top, cream flared midi skirt, rose-beige top-handle bag, delicate gold earrings, ivory strap shoes. Only upper clothing and a small part of the bag or jacket edge appear in the close crop.

Makeup: refined romantic makeup with naturally luminous fair skin, delicate peach-pink blush, softly defined brown eyes, clear natural catchlights, fine lashes, and soft blush-pink lips. Keep skin realistic and detailed.

Expression and Pose: a quiet smile showing that Arin has accepted her feelings. The smile appears through gentle warmth around the eyes and a small soft curve of the lips, never a broad grin. Her gaze remains steady outside the frame. Chin stays naturally level. One hand may lightly hold the bag handle or jacket edge below the crop.

7) Lighting and Color
Use soft, even diffused natural daylight with a thin warm-white rim along the outer edge of her short hair. Maintain natural skin color in the center of her face. Allow rose-pink and peach-coral reflections to build around the background, frame edge, hair outline, and lower shoulder. Connect the pink glow to flowers, reflected water, lens flare, and ambient bounce so it never looks like a digital filter or fantasy aura. Finish highlights in soft cream. Add very fine grain, restrained bloom, and gentle warm vignetting.

8) Key Direction Points
Arin’s face must remain realistic, stable, and recognizable. The watercolor-like color symbolizes changed perception while remaining integrated into a real photographic scene. Prioritize subtle emotion, elegant color layering, clean three-quarter facial structure, natural bob movement, realistic eyes, and cinematic restraint. Avoid direct camera gaze, visible romantic counterpart, broad smile, exaggerated dreamy expression, heavy pink fog, color covering the face, literal painted background, fantasy sparkles, artificial hearts, plastic skin, distorted hands, readable text, and logos.

9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner. Use Helvetica Neue, thin or light weight, white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photograph.

cuts.title: 향기가 머무는 공방
cuts.prompt:
CUT 1 Prompt — 향기가 머무는 공방
## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic cinematic Korean romance music-video still photographed primarily on Kodak Vision3 250D, with only a subtle influence from Kodak Portra 400.

The Kodak Vision3 250D film character must dominate the entire image: wide cinematic dynamic range, naturally preserved golden window highlights and interior shadows, gentle color separation, smooth highlight rolloff, restrained saturation, fine organic analog grain, and soft low contrast.

Kodak Portra 400 should affect only Hayoon’s skin and the muted dusty-purple clothing, creating warm-neutral skin without yellow or orange contamination.

The image must feel unmistakably analog and cinematic rather than digitally sharp. Avoid vivid digital color, aggressive HDR, hard micro-contrast, glossy commercial lighting, excessive clarity, or hyper-sharp textures.

The overall mood is warm, fragrant, tranquil, and quietly expectant—the peaceful moment immediately before a familiar scent awakens an old memory.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Inside her personal perfume atelier, Hayoon stands beside a sunlit worktable and chooses one delicate fresh lavender stem from several flowers.

She is still absorbed in an ordinary familiar task. No dramatic memory has surfaced yet.

The emotion should appear through visible calm: relaxed shoulders, an unhurried hand, lowered eyes, and the gentle intimacy of a workspace she has used for a long time.

## 3) Place · Time · Environment

A cozy private perfume atelier beside a large window during late golden hour on a warm summer evening.

Thin ivory linen curtains move slowly in a light breeze. Warm sunlight passes through the fabric and breaks into soft fragments across the wooden worktable.

The atmosphere contains a faint suspended haze with only a few dust and pollen particles visible inside the strongest backlit areas.

The space feels dry, botanical, fragrant, authentic, and personally lived-in rather than decorative or luxurious.

## 4) Background and Props

A restrained arrangement of:
- Small transparent perfume bottles
- Glass droppers and narrow pipettes
- Minimal laboratory beakers
- Unbranded scent-testing strips
- A clear drinking glass
- Dried flowers and herbs
- One small fresh lavender stem selected by Hayoon
- A warm walnut or aged oak worktable

Keep all objects naturally organized with believable working-space imperfections.

No readable labels, logos, product branding, text, modern plastic containers, excessive flowers, fantasy particles, clutter, candles, additional people, or ornate luxury décor.

## 5) Camera Composition

Vertical 3:4 composition optimized for a cinematic SNS editorial image.

Natural 35mm lens perspective, medium-long shot framed from slightly above the knees or upper thighs.

Place Hayoon in the lower-right third of the frame. Leave the luminous window and moving linen curtain widely visible in the upper-left area.

Add softly blurred dried flowers in the lower foreground to create depth.

Hayoon’s face, hand, and lavender stem should form one gentle diagonal line across the frame.

The camera remains near eye level with a slightly observational distance. Her face must remain clearly recognizable while she naturally belongs to the surrounding atelier.

## 6) Model Expression

Hayoon, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small slim oval face, a smooth V-line jaw, fair luminous skin, large clear dark-brown almond-shaped eyes, soft double eyelids, subtle aegyo-sal, and gently upturned outer eye corners.

She has a small straight nose with a softly rounded tip and naturally full soft pink lips.

Her long dark-brown layered wavy hair is center-parted, with airy see-through bangs and a few loose strands resting naturally across her forehead. Her waves are slightly relaxed by summer humidity rather than perfectly salon-styled.

She has graceful, realistic Korean body proportions with a slender waist, softly balanced feminine curves, elegant posture, and anatomically natural limbs.

She wears a dusty-purple V-neck sheer long-sleeved blouse with a matching thin inner layer, paired with a calm beige long skirt. The fabric is lightweight and softly translucent only where touched by the backlight, remaining tasteful and non-revealing.

Her makeup is modern translucent Korean semi-glow makeup: visible natural skin texture and subtle pores, fine peach-beige shading, muted rose and lavender-brown eye color, softly separated natural lashes, diffused blush below the cheekbones, and moist rose-beige lips without glass-like gloss.

Hayoon lowers her head slightly and looks at the lavender stem. One hand gently selects its stem while the other rests loosely on the worktable.

Her shoulders, wrists, and fingers are relaxed. She has no smile and no sadness—only the quiet concentration of a familiar routine.

No direct eye contact with the camera.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere

Strong golden-hour backlight enters from the window behind and to Hayoon’s left.

The linen curtain acts as a large natural diffuser, creating soft side illumination across her cheek and blouse.

A very weak neutral ivory fill from the opposite side keeps her face readable without flattening the shadows.

A thin golden rim light outlines the tips of her hair and a few flyaway strands.

Preserve bright areas as creamy gold rather than pure white. Keep the shadow side softly detailed and never muddy.

Dominant palette:
- Muted dusty purple
- Cream beige
- Honey gold
- Warm herbal brown
- Neutral luminous skin

The golden atmosphere must remain refined, never heavily yellow, orange, sepia, or oversaturated.

## 8) Key Direction

The film look and total atmospheric color are the highest priorities.

The frame should visually suggest the scent of lavender through warm dry botanical textures, delicate glass, slowly moving linen, and fine backlit particles.

Hayoon must appear as a real person quietly working inside a fragrant space—not as a posed fashion model.

Maintain realistic anatomy, accurate fingers, natural fabric translucency, physically plausible glass reflections, and a calm cinematic stillness.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font in a thin or light weight.

The watermark must be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, unobtrusive, and softly blended into the photograph.

cuts.title: 그리움을 향기로 삼키는 순간
cuts.prompt:
CUT 2 Prompt — 그리움을 향기로 삼키는 순간
## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic cinematic Korean romance music-video close-up photographed primarily on Kodak Vision3 250D, supported lightly by Kodak Portra 400.

The Kodak Vision3 250D look must govern the whole frame: wide highlight latitude, preserved golden backlight, detailed shadow transitions, natural cinematic color separation, fine analog grain, gentle low contrast, restrained saturation, and smooth organic highlight rolloff.

Kodak Portra 400 influences only the softness and warm-neutral accuracy of Hayoon’s skin and the subdued lavender clothing.

The image must not resemble a crisp digital beauty advertisement. Avoid hyper-sharp detail, aggressive HDR, vivid purple, orange skin, heavy haze, exaggerated bloom, excessive lens flare, plastic skin, or high micro-contrast.

The atmosphere is fragrant, luminous, intimate, and emotionally suspended. This is the precise instant when a familiar lavender scent revives the memory of someone she still misses.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Hayoon raises one delicate fresh lavender stem close to her nose.

The movement begins as an ordinary act of checking its fragrance, but the moment she inhales, an old memory unexpectedly returns.

She closes her eyes and remains inside the scent for several seconds.

The emotion is not grief or heartbreak. It is a quiet swell of longing, as though she has suddenly heard a familiar voice inside the warm evening air.

## 3) Place · Time · Environment

Beside the large window of Hayoon’s private perfume atelier during late summer golden hour.

Thin ivory linen curtains glow behind her and move gently in the breeze.

The window and worktable remain softly recognizable but dissolve into a delicate shallow-focus background.

A limited number of fine dust or pollen particles appear only in the strongest backlit space behind Hayoon’s face and around the lavender.

## 4) Background and Props

The only important prop is one small fresh lavender stem held lightly in Hayoon’s fingers.

In the softly blurred background:
- Ivory linen curtain
- A restrained edge of the wooden worktable
- A few indistinct glass perfume bottles
- Warm botanical shapes

No text, logos, extra flowers near her face, large bouquets, floating petals, fantasy sparkle, excessive dust, smoke, visible machinery, other people, or decorative clutter.

The lavender must remain physically separate from her nose and lips.

## 5) Camera Composition

Vertical 3:4 composition.

Natural 50mm lens perspective with a chest-up close-up.

Show Hayoon in a clear approximately 70-degree side profile or strong three-quarter profile so her facial identity remains recognizable.

The lavender stem creates a delicate vertical diagonal from her hand toward her nose.

Keep the glowing curtain softly blurred behind her. Position the brightest halo behind the rear edge of her head rather than directly across her face.

Her eyes, nose, lips, fingertips, and lavender flowers must remain readable. Use shallow but not excessively thin depth of field.

The camera is placed near her eye level, producing an intimate observational portrait rather than a dramatic beauty shot.

## 6) Model Expression

Hayoon, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small slim oval face, smooth V-line jaw, fair luminous skin, large clear dark-brown almond-shaped eyes, soft double eyelids, subtle aegyo-sal, and gently upturned outer eye corners.

She has a small straight nose with a softly rounded tip, naturally full soft pink lips, and delicate harmonious Korean facial proportions.

Her long dark-brown layered hair falls in loose relaxed waves, center-parted with airy see-through bangs and a few natural forehead strands. The ends and flyaway hairs catch a fine golden rim light.

She wears a dusty-purple V-neck sheer long-sleeved blouse over a matching thin inner layer. The blouse remains elegant and non-revealing.

Her makeup is thin translucent semi-glow K-beauty makeup with natural pores and skin grain, muted lavender-brown and rose eye tones, minimally lined lash roots, individually separated natural lashes, diffused muted-rose blush below the cheekbones, and moist rose-beige lips.

Hayoon closes her eyes fully. She raises her chin only slightly and inhales the scent.

Her lips are relaxed and faintly parted. Her fingers hold the lavender stem lightly without crushing it.

Her expression is a gentle emotional swell—longing entering the body through scent—without tears, trembling, pain, or theatrical sadness.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere

Strong golden backlight enters from behind Hayoon and slightly to one side.

Create fine edge lighting on her eyelashes, nose tip, upper lip, loose hair strands, and lavender petals.

Use a weak ivory frontal fill so her skin remains luminous rather than silhouetted.

Allow a small amount of warm haze where light passes through the hair, but retain facial clarity.

Lens flare must remain faint and confined to the outer window edge, never covering her eyes or skin.

Dominant palette:
- Soft creamy gold
- Muted dusty lavender
- Warm-neutral ivory skin
- Light herbal brown
- Subtle rose beige

The light should make the fragrance feel almost visible, while all effects remain physically plausible and understated.

## 8) Key Direction

The entire image must be driven by its Kodak Vision3 250D golden-hour film atmosphere.

This is the signature mood frame of the first set. Prioritize the sensation of warm fragrant air, delicate lavender, analog softness, and emotionally meaningful stillness over decorative details.

Connect the abstract feeling of longing to visible evidence: closed eyes, a slightly lifted chin, softened lips, relaxed fingers, luminous particles, and the lavender paused near her breath.

Preserve realistic skin texture, accurate fingers, fine individual hair strands, and natural depth.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font in a thin or light weight.

The watermark must be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, unobtrusive, and softly blended into the photograph.

cuts.title: 향이 지나간 자리
cuts.prompt:
CUT 3 Prompt — 향이 지나간 자리

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic cinematic Korean romance portrait photographed primarily on Kodak Vision3 250D with restrained Kodak Portra 400 portrait softness.

The Vision3 250D characteristics must control the complete image: wide cinematic latitude, preserved warm highlights, softly detailed shadows, natural color separation, low contrast, restrained saturation, fine analog grain, and smooth highlight rolloff.

Portra 400 should subtly soften skin and calm the dusty-purple and beige palette without changing the overall Vision3 exposure and color structure.

Avoid vivid colors, excessive warmth, digital sharpness, aggressive HDR, hard contrast, beauty-filter skin, heavy bloom, fantasy particles, or artificial orange grading.

The mood is quiet and reflective. The physical act of smelling the lavender has ended, but the memory remains inside Hayoon.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Hayoon slowly lowers the fresh lavender stem after inhaling its scent.

She cannot immediately return to her work. Her eyes open only halfway as she releases a short, quiet breath.

The scent is fading from the air, yet she remains caught in the thought: “Why does this fragrance always make me remember that person?”

The emotion should appear as a lingering pause, not visible heartbreak.

## 3) Place · Time · Environment

At the golden-hour window worktable inside Hayoon’s private perfume atelier.

The sunlight has softened slightly compared with the previous moment. The room remains warm, but the light now falls in thinner amber layers across her face, blouse, and hands.

Transparent perfume bottles on the lower worktable catch and refract small fragments of light.

## 4) Background and Props

No visible labels, readable text, extra letters, candles, smoke, people, excessive flower arrangements, fantasy light beams, or clutter.

## 5) Camera Composition

Vertical 3:4 composition.

Natural 85mm portrait perspective.

A tight upper-body frame that clearly includes Hayoon’s face and the hand lowering the lavender.

Position her face in the upper portion of the frame and her hand with the lavender near the center.

Keep a blurred perfume bottle near the lower foreground to create a subtle gold bokeh layer.

Focus slightly closer to the lowering fingers and lavender while maintaining enough depth for Hayoon’s eyes and lips to remain recognizable.

Use a clear three-quarter side angle rather than a frontal portrait. No direct eye contact with the camera.

## 6) Model Expression

Hayoon, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small slim oval face, smooth V-line jaw, fair luminous skin, large clear dark-brown almond-shaped eyes, soft double eyelids, subtle aegyo-sal, and gently lifted outer eye corners.

She has a small straight nose with a softly rounded tip and naturally full soft pink lips.

Her long dark-brown layered wavy hair is center-parted with airy see-through bangs and loose natural forehead strands. The waves feel slightly loosened by warm summer air.

She wears a dusty-purple V-neck sheer long-sleeved blouse over a same-tone inner layer and a calm beige long skirt.

Her makeup is translucent semi-glow Korean makeup with visible natural skin texture, fine peach-beige contour, muted lavender-brown eye color, softly separated lashes, diffused muted-rose blush, and moist rose-beige lips.

Hayoon opens her eyes only halfway and lowers her gaze toward the lavender or worktable.

Her lips move faintly as she finishes exhaling. One hand holds the lowering lavender while the other rests lightly on the edge of the worktable.

Her expression contains quiet confusion and lingering tenderness, not exhaustion, sadness, crying, or shock.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere

Use softer and less direct golden light than in the previous scent-inhaling moment.

Create thin amber shadows across her cheek and dusty-purple sleeve.

Small physically plausible fragments of light refracted through glass bottles fall onto the worktable and lightly touch the blouse sleeve.

Keep a soft neutral fill on the shadow side of her face.

Preserve a small amount of natural shadow beneath the eyes without making her look tired.

Dominant palette:
- Lavender gray
- Amber beige
- Soft walnut brown
- Creamy warm-neutral skin
- Small restrained golden reflections

The dusty-purple blouse must remain muted and should not shift into vivid violet, wine red, or magenta.

## 8) Key Direction

The film texture and fading golden atmosphere are more important than sharp object detail.

Connect the lingering emotion to visible physical evidence: half-open eyes, a downward gaze, the lavender being lowered, a faint exhale, and a hand resting on the table because she has not yet resumed working.

The frame should feel almost motionless after a brief emotional interruption.

Maintain anatomically accurate hands, realistic pores, natural hair strands, believable glass reflections, and soft cinematic depth.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font in a thin or light weight.

The watermark must be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, unobtrusive, and softly blended into the photograph.

cuts.title: 우연히 드러난 편지
cuts.prompt:
CUT 4 Prompt — 우연히 드러난 편지

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic cinematic Korean romance detail still photographed primarily on Kodak Portra 400 with a very subtle Kodak Gold 200 nostalgic influence.

Kodak Portra 400 must dominate the overall exposure and color: natural warm-neutral skin, soft low contrast, muted colors, smooth highlight rolloff, calm shadow detail, and delicate fine analog grain.

Kodak Gold 200 should appear only as a gentle vanilla-gold warmth in the old paper, walnut wood, and small amber highlights. It must not turn the entire image yellow, orange, sepia, or strongly retro.

Avoid crisp digital product photography, hard shadows, vivid yellow, excessive vintage fading, heavy grain, high contrast, HDR, exaggerated dust, or overly staged composition.

A quieter vintage corner inside Hayoon’s perfume atelier during warm late-afternoon light.

- A partial view of an old mechanical typewriter
- Neutral scent strips
- Small unbranded perfume concentrate bottles

Vertical 3:4 composition.

A 45-degree overhead angle close to an over-the-shoulder viewpoint.

Place part of Hayoon’s shoulder and dark-brown hair softly blurred in the upper-right corner.

Arrange the lavender stem, letter edge, and a restrained section of the old typewriter across the central area.

Her face is mostly outside the frame or only a tiny blurred profile edge is visible.

Hayoon is a beautiful young Korean woman with long dark-brown layered wavy hair, center-parted with airy see-through bangs and loose forehead strands.

She wears a pale low-saturation yellow square-neck pintuck dress with short restrained puff sleeves. The color sits between vanilla and soft butter, never bright lemon.

Only her shoulder, part of her hair, forearm, and hand are clearly relevant in this frame.

Her hand has graceful natural fingers, short transparent nude-pink nails, realistic skin texture, and relaxed tendons.

Her fingers pause a fraction before fully releasing the lavender stem. The wrist remains loose, and the hand does not dramatically recoil.

The emotional evidence must come from this tiny stopped movement.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere

Use soft amber side light entering the inner atelier.

A narrow warm patch of light falls naturally across the exposed portion of the letter, guiding the viewer’s eye without resembling a spotlight.

Keep the typewriter and background one tonal step darker.

Use low-angle side illumination to reveal the paper fibers, gently creased edge, lavender texture, and walnut grain.

Reduce airborne dust compared with the first set, creating a quieter and heavier stillness.

Dominant palette:
- Walnut brown
- Vanilla cream
- Pale butter yellow
- Faded lavender
- Warm paper ivory

## 8) Key Direction

The Portra 400 softness and restrained vanilla-walnut palette are the highest priorities.

The frame should communicate “a memory accidentally opening” through realistic object placement and a stopped hand, without relying on facial drama.

The letter must remain plain and unreadable.

Maintain natural hand anatomy, accurate finger count, physically believable paper thickness, realistic wood grain, and softly controlled film texture.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.
