The watermark must be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, unobtrusive, and softly blended into the photograph.

cuts.title: 시선이 멈춘 자리
cuts.prompt:
CUT 5 Prompt — 시선이 멈춘 자리

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic cinematic Korean romance portrait photographed primarily on Kodak Portra 400 with a restrained touch of Kodak Gold 200.

Portra 400 must define the whole frame through natural skin rendering, muted color, soft low contrast, gentle highlight rolloff, calm walnut shadows, and delicate analog grain.

Kodak Gold 200 contributes only a faint vanilla-gold nostalgic warmth to the aged paper, wood, and pale-yellow dress.

The image must remain refined and contemporary, not a strongly retro snapshot. Avoid saturated yellow, orange skin, sepia, dramatic spotlighting, heavy vignette, high contrast, excessive grain, plastic beauty-filter skin, or digital clarity.

The mood is tender, hesitant, and quietly absorbed. Hayoon realizes that the forgotten object still carries a living emotion.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Hayoon does not immediately pick up the letter.

Her body remains oriented toward the work she had been doing, while only her face and gaze slowly turn toward the folded paper.

One hand rests lightly against the worktable. The other hovers near the letter without touching it.

Her reaction is not shock. It is the gentle recognition: “You were still here.”

## 3) Place · Time · Environment

The vintage inner corner of Hayoon’s private perfume atelier.

A dark walnut worktable and chest sit near an old typewriter, plain scent strips, small perfume concentrate bottles, dried lavender, and a restrained paper box.

Warm late-afternoon light enters indirectly, creating a quiet interior with soft vanilla highlights and deep but readable walnut shadows.

## 4) Background and Props

- One plain folded letter in warm ivory paper
- The same lavender stem resting beside it
- A softly blurred old typewriter
- Small unbranded perfume concentrate bottles
- Scent strips
- Dark walnut furniture

No readable letters, names, stamps, postal markings, logos, dramatic piles of paper, candles, smoke, extra people, or ornamental clutter.

The letter must remain visually important but not placed perfectly at the center.

## 5) Camera Composition

Vertical 3:4 composition.

Natural 50mm lens perspective.

Waist-up medium shot.

Place Hayoon on the right side of the frame and the folded letter in the lower-left area.

Create a clear diagonal line between her eyes and the letter.

The typewriter remains recognizable only as a softly blurred background form.

Show Hayoon in a clear 45-degree three-quarter profile, keeping her full face identifiable without direct camera eye contact.

Use moderate shallow depth of field so both her expression and the letter remain visually connected.

## 6) Model Expression

Hayoon, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small slim oval face, smooth V-line jaw, fair luminous skin, large clear dark-brown almond-shaped eyes, soft double eyelids, subtle aegyo-sal, and gently lifted outer corners.

She has a small straight nose with a softly rounded tip and naturally full soft pink lips.

Her long dark-brown layered wavy hair is center-parted with airy see-through bangs and several natural loose strands near the forehead and cheek.

She wears a pale low-saturation yellow square-neck pintuck dress with restrained short puff sleeves. The color is soft vanilla-butter yellow, not lemon or saturated gold.

Her makeup is transparent modern K-beauty makeup: visible natural skin texture, thin semi-glow base, peach-beige contour, muted rose and lavender-brown eyeshadow, natural separated lashes, diffused blush below the cheekbones, and moist peach-rose lips.

Hayoon fixes her gaze on the letter.

Her eyes are caught in the transition between becoming slightly wider and settling again. Her lips close faintly.

One hand rests gently on the table edge, while the other pauses in the air near the letter.

Her expression is affectionate recognition rather than alarm, grief, or fear.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere

Use broad diffused pale-gold light across the front and side of her face.

Retain soft shadows beneath the eyes, chin, and jaw for dimensionality.

Add a narrow highlight along her collarbone and the square neckline.

Create one small warm catchlight in her eyes reflected from the worktable area.

Use a weak neutral fill to prevent the walnut background from casting red or brown color contamination onto her skin.

Dominant palette:
- Vanilla yellow
- Golden beige
- Dark walnut
- Warm paper ivory
- Muted rose skin accents

## 8) Key Direction

The Portra 400 portrait softness, restrained saturation, and walnut-vanilla color atmosphere must remain dominant.

Connect hesitation to visible evidence: her body still facing the original task, her head turned toward the letter, one hand stabilized on the table, and the other suspended before contact.

Do not portray theatrical surprise.

Preserve realistic skin pores, natural eye moisture, anatomically accurate hands, believable fabric folds, and low-contrast analog depth.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font in a thin or light weight.

The watermark must be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, unobtrusive, and softly blended into the photograph.

cuts.title: 읽지 않아도 기억나는 말
cuts.prompt:
CUT 6 Prompt — 읽지 않아도 기억나는 말

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic cinematic Korean romance close-up photographed primarily on Kodak Portra 400, with subtle Kodak Gold 200 warmth limited to the paper and surrounding walnut tones.

Portra 400 must dominate the image through natural warm-neutral skin, softly muted color, low contrast, delicate fine grain, smooth highlight rolloff, and gentle separation between Hayoon’s face, fingers, and the ivory letter.

Kodak Gold 200 adds only a faint nostalgic vanilla glow to the paper fibers and small wooden reflections.

Avoid high contrast, vivid yellow, orange skin, heavy sepia, excessive film damage, strong grain, hyper-sharp paper detail, plastic hands, beauty-filter skin, or digital product-photography lighting.

The mood is intimate and compassionate. Hayoon is not remembering the written words; she is recognizing the younger version of herself who wrote them.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Hayoon carefully lifts the folded letter but does not open it.

With her thumb, she slowly smooths one gently creased corner.

Her gaze remains on the blank-looking paper surface.

A faint smile almost forms and then stops, revealing tenderness toward her past feelings rather than sadness about the present.

## 3) Place · Time · Environment

At the walnut worktable in the quieter inner corner of Hayoon’s perfume atelier during warm late-afternoon light.

The surrounding typewriter, scent materials, and perfume bottles are softly blurred into a calm wooden background.

The air is still, warm, and scented with old paper, vanilla perfume, and dried lavender.

## 4) Background and Props

Primary prop:
- One plain folded warm-ivory letter with a slightly creased edge
- No visible writing, names, address, stamp, envelope graphics, or printed lines

Secondary blurred elements:
- Walnut worktable
- Old typewriter edge
- Small perfume concentrate bottle
- Neutral scent strips
- The previously used lavender stem

The paper should look repeatedly handled but not damaged, torn, stained, burned, or antique beyond realism.

## 5) Camera Composition

Vertical 3:4 composition.

Natural 85mm lens perspective.

Tight close-up extending from the lower portion of Hayoon’s face to both hands.

Place the letter and her fingers in the center of the frame. Include her eyes and lips near the upper edge so her expression remains recognizable.

Focus primarily on the thumb smoothing the paper corner while maintaining enough depth for her gaze and mouth to remain legible.

The letter surface must face away from the camera or remain blank so no text appears.

No direct eye contact.

## 6) Model Expression

Hayoon, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small slim oval face, smooth V-line jaw, fair luminous skin, large clear dark-brown almond-shaped eyes, soft double eyelids, subtle aegyo-sal, and gently lifted outer corners.

She has a small straight nose with a softly rounded tip and naturally full soft pink lips.

Her long dark-brown layered wavy hair is center-parted with airy see-through bangs and relaxed face-framing strands.

She wears a pale vanilla-butter yellow square-neck pintuck dress with restrained short puff sleeves.

Her makeup is translucent semi-glow Korean makeup with natural pores, subtle skin grain, peach-beige contour, muted rose and lavender-brown eye tones, softly separated natural lashes, diffused muted-rose blush, and moist rose-beige lips.

Hayoon holds the letter below her face, never bringing it close to her nose.

Her thumb slowly smooths the creased corner. The other fingers support the paper lightly without bending it.

Her gaze is directed toward the center of the paper.

The corner of her mouth begins to soften into a tiny smile but stops before becoming a full smile.

Her expression is gentle, private, and affectionate toward her former self.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere

Place a thin backlight behind the letter to reveal the paper edge and subtle fibers without making it translucent like plastic.

Use warm reflected light across Hayoon’s face and hands.

Control highlights on the fingernails and skin so they remain soft and realistic.

Keep overall contrast low even though the paper texture is visible.

Dominant palette:
- Cream ivory
- Vanilla gold
- Muted rose skin
- Pale butter yellow
- Dark walnut brown

## 8) Key Direction

The central emotional evidence is the thumb gently smoothing the damaged edge while a nearly formed smile remains unfinished.

The analog Portra atmosphere is more important than extreme detail.

The letter must remain unreadable and visually plain.

Ensure five natural fingers per hand where visible, accurate joints, realistic paper contact, natural nail shape, preserved skin pores, and softly cinematic depth.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font in a thin or light weight.

The watermark must be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, unobtrusive, and softly blended into the photograph.

cuts.title: 저녁이 깊어진 소파
cuts.prompt:
CUT 7 Prompt — 저녁이 깊어진 소파

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic cinematic Korean romance interior still photographed primarily on Kodak Portra 800 with subtle Kodak Vision3 500T shadow depth.

Kodak Portra 800 must dominate the entire frame: warm low-light skin rendering, softly visible organic grain, low contrast, gentle highlight rolloff, rich but restrained amber midtones, and tactile rendering of oatmeal knit and ivory fabric.

Kodak Vision3 500T should affect only the deeper interior shadows, adding slight cinematic blue-gray separation and dimensionality. It must not turn the overall image blue, teal, or tungsten-heavy.

Avoid vivid orange, crushed shadows, aggressive halation, neon color, heavy noise, high contrast, digital sharpness, HDR, plastic skin, or luxury-hotel styling.

The mood is intimate, warm, contemplative, and emotionally heavy without appearing tragic.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

After the atelier workday has ended, Hayoon sits quietly on an ivory fabric sofa.

Her body folds into a small but comfortable posture. The unfolded letter rests across her knees, with a vintage brass paperweight holding one side.

She remains looking at the letter long after there is any practical reason to do so.

The space is warm and soft, but her attention has narrowed completely to the unresolved confession.

## 3) Place · Time · Environment

A quiet sofa corner inside Hayoon’s perfume atelier after sunset has begun to deepen.

The last orange evening light enters from a nearby window and blends with dim interior warmth.

An ivory fabric sofa, a small side table, dried flowers, a thin folded blanket, an unlit or softly glowing candle, and a few essential-oil bottles create a naturally used personal resting area.

The room feels warm, fragrant, and increasingly still.

## 4) Background and Props

- Ivory fabric sofa
- One unfolded plain letter with no visible writing
- Vintage brass paperweight resting on one edge
- Small wooden or brass-accent side table
- Dried flowers
- Thin neutral blanket
- Restrained essential-oil bottles
- One small softly glowing candle or warm lamp far in the background

No readable text, logos, excessive pillows, ornate décor, large flames, smoke, extra people, visible phones, books, televisions, or clutter.

## 5) Camera Composition

Vertical 3:4 composition.

Natural 35mm lens perspective.

Medium-long shot that includes Hayoon, the sofa, a portion of the window light, and the surrounding quiet space.

Place Hayoon in the lower-left region of the frame.

Leave a broad area of fading amber light and the small side table on the right.

Use blurred dried flowers in the lower foreground for depth.

Arrange Hayoon’s body, the sofa line, and the remaining window light into a stable triangular composition.

Keep her slightly small within the room, allowing the surrounding silence to become part of the emotion.

## 6) Model Expression

Hayoon, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small slim oval face, smooth V-line jaw, fair luminous skin, large clear dark-brown almond-shaped eyes, soft double eyelids, subtle aegyo-sal, and gently lifted outer corners.

She has a small straight nose with a softly rounded tip and naturally full soft pink lips.

Her long dark-brown layered wavy hair falls naturally over her shoulders, center-parted with airy see-through bangs and loose forehead strands.

She wears an oatmeal-colored loosely knitted summer cardigan over a thin cream sleeveless inner top, paired with wide-fit cream cotton trousers.

The cardigan sleeves extend slightly over the backs of her hands.

Her makeup is thin semi-glow K-beauty makeup with natural pores, muted rose and lavender-brown eyes, softly separated lashes, diffused cheek color, and moist rose-brown lips.

One leg is folded comfortably onto the sofa while the other rests naturally lower or toward the floor.

She does not curl into a distressed ball. Her posture remains relaxed and physically comfortable.

Her gaze rests on the letter across her knees.

One hand remains close to the paper, while the other rests over her knee or cardigan sleeve.

Her shoulders are fully lowered. Her expression is thoughtful and quiet, without tears or overt sadness.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere

Use deepened orange-amber side light entering from the window.

Allow broad soft illumination across Hayoon’s cheek, cardigan, and sofa.

The rear of the room falls into cream-brown shadows while retaining visible material texture.

Add a very weak neutral fill to the opposite side of her face.

Use low-angle side illumination to reveal the open knit structure.

Introduce only a subtle blue-gray quality into the deepest shadows to prevent the frame from becoming fully orange.

Dominant palette:
- Oatmeal
- Cream
- Brass gold
- Deep amber
- Subtle blue-gray shadow
- Warm-neutral skin

## 8) Key Direction

The Portra 800 low-light warmth and tactile oatmeal-cream atmosphere must dominate.

Connect the weight of indecision to visible evidence: Hayoon’s small placement in the room, her lowered shoulders, the letter remaining on her knees, and the brass paperweight physically holding one edge in place.

The image should feel warm to touch but emotionally still.

Preserve realistic knit fibers, paper thickness, fabric compression, natural anatomy, skin texture, and restrained analog grain.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font in a thin or light weight.

The watermark must be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, unobtrusive, and softly blended into the photograph.

cuts.title: 편지를 붙잡고 있는 손
cuts.prompt:
CUT 8 Prompt — 편지를 붙잡고 있는 손

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic cinematic tactile close-up photographed primarily on Kodak Portra 800 with restrained Kodak Vision3 500T depth in the surrounding shadows.

Portra 800 must control the complete image: warm low-light color, soft visible organic grain, muted contrast, gentle highlight transitions, natural skin rendering, and rich tactile detail in paper, brass, knit, and cotton.

Vision3 500T contributes only a very subtle cool-gray separation within the deepest background shadows.

Avoid sharp product-photography lighting, bright metallic reflections, oversaturated gold, orange skin, harsh contrast, HDR, digital clarity, plastic hands, excessive grain, or blue tungsten grading.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

One of Hayoon’s hands rests over the unfolded letter as though protecting or covering it.

Her other hand slowly moves the vintage brass paperweight away from the paper.

She has not decided whether she is freeing the letter to read it again or preparing to close it.

The emotional tension appears entirely through the careful movement and pressure of her fingers.

## 3) Place · Time · Environment

On the ivory sofa inside the perfume atelier during deepening amber evening light.

The surrounding room remains warm and dim. Hayoon’s oatmeal cardigan and cream trousers form a soft neutral frame around the letter.

- One unfolded plain warm-ivory letter with no visible writing
- One vintage brass paperweight with a softly worn surface

## 5) Camera Composition

Vertical 3:4 composition.

A tight hand-centered close-up.

Place the letter and brass paperweight in the central region.

Use the oatmeal cardigan sleeve and cream trousers to softly fill the outer frame.

The other hand moves the brass paperweight sideways. The wrist and fingers remain relaxed and do not show force.

A soft window-shaped reflection lies across the paper.

Use gentle side lighting to reveal the knit fibers, paper grain, natural skin texture, and worn brass surface.

Do not allow the paperweight to sparkle or appear mirror-polished.

Dominant palette:

- Brass amber
- Oatmeal beige
- Warm paper ivory
- Subtle blue-gray shadows

## 8) Key Direction

The emotional center is the contrast between one hand protecting the letter and the other removing the object that keeps it fixed.

The image must prioritize tactile realism and Portra 800 warmth.

Connect indecision to visible evidence through gentle hand pressure, an unfinished sideways movement, relaxed wrists, and the paper remaining neither fully opened nor closed.

Ensure accurate finger count, believable contact shadows, realistic paper deformation, natural nail proportions, and restrained film grain.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font in a thin or light weight.

The watermark must be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, unobtrusive, and softly blended into the photograph.

cuts.title: 전하지 못한 고백의 온기
cuts.prompt:
CUT 9 Prompt — 전하지 못한 고백의 온기

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

cuts.title: 노을을 담아 올린 향수병
cuts.prompt:
CUT 10 Prompt — 노을을 담아 올린 향수병

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic cinematic Korean romance sunset still photographed primarily on Kodak Vision3 250D, with Fujifilm Pro 400H influence restricted to cool pastel glass refractions.

Kodak Vision3 250D must dominate the entire exposure and color structure: wide cinematic dynamic range, preserved sunset highlights, readable facial shadows, natural film-still color, gentle contrast, fine analog grain, and smooth highlight rolloff.

Fujifilm Pro 400H contributes only airy pale mint and lavender tones within crystal refractions, selected window reflections, and subtle highlights on the white shirt.

The image must remain warm and cinematic overall. Do not blend both films evenly. Avoid a fully mint-green image, teal-and-orange grading, vivid sunset color, aggressive lens flare, high contrast, HDR, crystalline product-advertising sharpness, or plastic skin.

The mood is dreamy, uncertain, and quietly ritualistic. Hayoon is trying to see whether her unspoken feeling can be contained inside a fragrance.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Standing before a large glass window, Hayoon lifts an antique multifaceted crystal perfume bottle from the shelf.

The bottle contains a deep woody amber perfume concentrate.

She is not applying the perfume. She raises it toward the sunset to study the color where the liquid and light meet.

Her hesitation appears in her fixed gaze and the slight stillness of her lips.

## 3) Place · Time · Environment

A perfume-bottle display area in Hayoon’s atelier beside a floor-to-ceiling window at sunset.

Dozens of restrained glass bottles sit along shelves in the foreground and background.

Beyond the window, a softly blurred city silhouette darkens beneath a fading amber sky.

A gentle indoor breeze moves the edge of Hayoon’s sheer shirt and a few loose hair strands.

## 4) Background and Props

Primary prop:
- One antique hand-finished multifaceted crystal perfume bottle
- Deep woody amber liquid
- Small cork or aged brass cap
- Consistent compact vintage proportions

Secondary elements:
- Several blurred glass perfume bottles
- Minimal shelf
- Large glass window
- Distant city silhouette

No readable labels, logos, spray mist, perfume being applied, modern luxury branding, oversized bottle, excessive rainbow refraction, extra people, plants covering the window, or clutter.

## 5) Camera Composition

Vertical 3:4 composition.

Natural 35mm lens perspective.

Medium-long shot framed from slightly above the knees.

Show Hayoon standing in profile before the window.

She raises the bottle slightly below eye level.

Use blurred perfume bottles in both foreground and background to produce layered but restrained glass depth.

Balance the city and Hayoon at approximately 4:6.

Use the window’s vertical frame and Hayoon’s body line to divide the composition cleanly.

Keep her face, the bottle, and the sunset-readable liquid clearly identifiable.

## 6) Model Expression

Hayoon, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small slim oval face, smooth V-line jaw, fair luminous skin, large clear dark-brown almond-shaped eyes, soft double eyelids, subtle aegyo-sal, and gently lifted outer eye corners.

She has a small straight nose with a softly rounded tip and naturally full soft pink lips.

Her long dark-brown layered wavy hair is center-parted with airy see-through bangs and loose forehead strands.

She has graceful, realistic Korean body proportions with a slender waist, softly balanced feminine curves, elegant posture, and anatomically natural limbs.

She wears a thin sheer white oversized shirt layered naturally over a slim mint-brown silk slip dress. The mint-brown color is predominantly muted brown with a very faint cool mint undertone, never gray, khaki, or bright green.

Her makeup is translucent semi-glow K-beauty makeup with natural pores, muted rose and lavender-brown eyes, soft lashes, diffused blush, and moist rose-beige lips.

One hand holds the bottle carefully around its body. The other supports its base or rests near the loose shirt hem.

Her gaze remains fixed on the point where the amber liquid meets the sunset.

Her lips stay closed, and a small hesitation is visible around her eyes.

Her shoulders remain relaxed and slightly open toward the window.

No direct camera gaze.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere

Use strong sunset backlight through the glass window.

The crystal bottle projects small restrained pieces of amber and gold light onto Hayoon’s neck, cheek, and shirt.

Allow only a few pale mint and lavender refractions in limited areas.

Keep lens flare close to the bottle and outer window edge.

Use neutral frontal reflection to prevent Hayoon from becoming a silhouette.

Keep the city one or two tonal steps darker.

Render the shirt as soft cream white rather than pure digital white.

Dominant palette:
- Amber gold
- Soft cream white
- Muted mint-brown
- Deep gray city silhouette
- Small pale mint and lavender refractions

## 8) Key Direction

The Vision3 250D cinematic sunset range must remain visually dominant.

Fujifilm Pro 400H is only a controlled accent inside glass light.

Connect emotional hesitation to visible evidence: the bottle held below eye level, the gaze fixed on its interior color, closed lips, relaxed but motionless hands, and the body opened slightly toward the window.

Maintain realistic crystal optics, restrained refraction, natural skin texture, correct fingers, accurate bottle scale, and physically plausible backlight.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font in a thin or light weight.

The watermark must be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, unobtrusive, and softly blended into the photograph.

cuts.title: 크리스탈 너머의 흔들리는 시선
cuts.prompt:
CUT 11 Prompt — 크리스탈 너머의 흔들리는 시선

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic experimental cinematic Korean romance close-up photographed primarily on Kodak Vision3 250D, with Fujifilm Pro 400H used only in limited mint and pale-lavender crystal refractions.

Vision3 250D must govern skin tone, exposure, sunset highlights, shadow detail, cinematic color separation, fine analog grain, low contrast, and smooth highlight rolloff.

Pro 400H must not recolor the whole image. Its cool pastel quality appears only in selected refracted fragments passing through the antique crystal bottle.

Avoid kaleidoscopic distortion, duplicated entire faces, surreal anatomy, excessive rainbow colors, bright green skin, heavy lens flare, strong chromatic aberration, hyper-sharp beauty rendering, HDR, high contrast, or fantasy imagery.

The mood is dreamy, refined, emotionally divided, and quietly unresolved. Hayoon’s face remains beautiful and clearly recognizable even as one section is split by the crystal.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

The camera looks toward Hayoon through and beside the antique multifaceted crystal perfume bottle.

One of Hayoon’s eyes, her nose line, and her lips remain directly visible.

Only part of the opposite eye and cheek passes through the faceted glass and appears gently divided into a few overlapping fragments.

She looks beyond the bottle toward the distant window, unable to settle on one decision.

The crystal represents a single feeling splitting into several possible choices.

## 3) Place · Time · Environment

At the floor-to-ceiling window of Hayoon’s perfume atelier during the last warm stage of sunset.

The surrounding shelves and city are deeply blurred.

Warm amber window light remains present, while the room begins to acquire faint mint and lavender reflections from the glass objects.

## 4) Background and Props

Primary foreground object:
- The same antique multifaceted crystal perfume bottle
- Deep woody amber liquid
- Aged brass or cork cap
- Placed close to the lens

Background:
- Hayoon’s clearly recognizable face
- Soft sunset window
- Minimal blurred perfume shelf
- Distant city silhouette

No labels, logos, extra bottles covering the face, full-face refraction, multiple duplicate eyes, broken glass, surreal rainbow spectrum, smoke, text, or other people.

## 5) Camera Composition

Vertical 3:4 composition.

Natural 85mm portrait perspective.

Experimental face-centered close-up.

Place the crystal bottle large in the near foreground, offset so it covers only part of Hayoon’s face.

Keep one eye, her nose, and the outline of her lips directly visible and sharp enough for clear identity.

Allow only the opposite eye, a small cheek area, and a few hair strands to appear through the facets.

Maintain a clear outer facial contour.

The bottle reflection must not fully cover either eye.

Use shallow depth of field that balances the near bottle facets and Hayoon’s directly visible eye.

No camera eye contact; her gaze extends slightly beyond the bottle.

## 6) Model Expression

Hayoon, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small slim oval face, smooth V-line jaw, fair luminous skin, large clear dark-brown almond-shaped eyes, soft double eyelids, subtle aegyo-sal, and gently lifted outer eye corners.

She has a small straight nose with a softly rounded tip, naturally full soft pink lips, and delicate balanced Korean features.

Her long dark-brown layered wavy hair is center-parted with airy see-through bangs and loose strands.

She wears a sheer white oversized shirt over a muted mint-brown silk slip dress.

Her makeup is thin translucent semi-glow K-beauty makeup with visible natural pores, muted rose and lavender-brown eye tones, softly separated lashes, restrained blush, and moist rose-beige lips.

Hayoon lowers her chin only slightly.

Her lips and facial muscles remain nearly still.

Her gaze stays on a distant point beyond the bottle rather than the camera.

The emotion exists mainly in how long her eye remains fixed and how little the rest of her face moves.

She must not appear frightened, anxious, tearful, or unstable.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere

Create a natural golden-hour catchlight inside the directly visible eye.

Use the crystal to split a few reflections into:
- Warm gold
- Pale lavender
- Faint cool mint

Keep a neutral fill across her skin to prevent colored glass from staining the entire face.

Lower the background exposure slightly so the selected crystal fragments remain visible.

Maintain soft natural highlight rolloff along the cheek, nose, and lips.

Dominant palette:
- Warm cinematic gold
- Neutral cream skin
- Pale mint refraction
- Pale lavender refraction
- Muted mint-brown fabric

## 8) Key Direction

The image must feel emotionally divided but visually controlled.

The highest priority is preserving Hayoon’s recognizable face within a dominant Vision3 250D cinematic sunset look.

Connect indecision to visible evidence: one eye seen directly, the other partially divided by glass, a lowered chin, still lips, and a gaze directed beyond the present object.

Do not create horror-like facial duplication or surreal distortion.

Maintain physically plausible crystal optics, natural eye anatomy, realistic skin texture, accurate bottle scale, and restrained analog grain.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font in a thin or light weight.

The watermark must be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, unobtrusive, and softly blended into the photograph.

cuts.title: 끝내 놓아버린 향수병
cuts.prompt:
CUT 12 Prompt — 끝내 놓아버린 향수병

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic cinematic Korean romance sunset still photographed primarily on Kodak Vision3 250D, with Fujifilm Pro 400H coolness limited to fading mint and lavender reflections in the glass and evening shadows.

Vision3 250D must dominate the image through wide sunset latitude, natural film-still color, softly preserved highlights, readable shadow detail, restrained saturation, gentle contrast, fine analog grain, and smooth highlight rolloff.

Pro 400H adds only a faint cool pastel transition that anticipates evening. It must not make the skin, whole room, or city green.

Avoid vivid orange, teal-and-orange grading, dramatic silhouette, intense flare, overexposed white clothing, strong cyan shadows, hyper-sharp detail, HDR, or excessive melancholy.

The mood is restrained, spacious, and unfinished. Hayoon has chosen not to speak, but she has not rejected the feeling.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Hayoon places the antique crystal perfume bottle back onto the window shelf.

Her hand begins to leave the bottle, but one finger remains near the cap for a fraction longer.

Her face is turned away from the perfume and toward the distant city outside.

Her lips remain slightly parted, as though words had almost formed before she decided not to say them.

## 3) Place · Time · Environment

At the large glass window and perfume-bottle shelf inside Hayoon’s atelier just before the sunset disappears.

The city outside has shifted toward blurred deep blue-gray.

The last low gold-orange light remains along the horizon and catches the crystal bottle one final time.

The room behind Hayoon is beginning to cool.

## 4) Background and Props

- The same antique multifaceted crystal perfume bottle
- Deep woody amber liquid
- Same aged brass or cork cap
- Minimal window shelf
- Several softly blurred perfume bottles
- Large glass window
- Distant city silhouette

No labels, logos, perfume spray, bottle falling, broken glass, visible letter, dramatic flowers, extra people, text, or clutter.

## 5) Camera Composition

Vertical 3:4 composition.

Natural 50mm lens perspective.

Upper-body three-quarter rear view photographed from approximately 30 degrees behind Hayoon.

Place her face and side profile in the upper-right area.

Place the crystal bottle in the lower-left or lower-center area.

Leave a generous amount of empty window space and distant city around them.

Create a diagonal connection between her hand at the bottle, her facial profile, and the direction of her gaze toward the city.

Keep her profile, remaining fingertip, bottle, and city atmosphere visually understandable.

## 6) Model Expression

Hayoon, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small slim oval face, smooth V-line jaw, fair luminous skin, large clear dark-brown almond-shaped eyes, soft double eyelids, subtle aegyo-sal, and gently lifted outer eye corners.

She has a small straight nose with a softly rounded tip and naturally full soft pink lips.

Her long dark-brown layered wavy hair is center-parted with airy see-through bangs and loose face-framing strands.

She wears a thin sheer white oversized shirt layered over a slim muted mint-brown silk slip dress.

Her makeup is translucent semi-glow K-beauty makeup with natural pores, muted rose and lavender-brown eye tones, softly separated lashes, diffused cheek color, and moist rose-beige lips.

Her gaze remains on the distant city.

Her lips are faintly parted, as though interrupted just before speaking.

One hand leaves the bottle, but the index or middle finger stays near the cap for a final fraction of a second.

The other hand loosely holds the shirt cuff or hem.

Her shoulders face the window, and her profile remains natural and relaxed.

The expression contains lingering attachment without self-pity or urgency.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere

Use the final low gold-orange sunset light.

The front of Hayoon’s face is illuminated by soft natural reflection from the window.

Create a thin rim light along the ends of her hair and the edge of the sheer shirt.

Render the city as blurred deep blue-gray.

Leave one final strong but small warm reflection inside the crystal bottle.

Shift the deeper shadows slightly toward cool lavender-blue to prepare for the next set.

Dominant palette:
- Fading gold
- Deep blue-gray
- Muted mint-brown
- Cream white
- Lavender-toned shadow

## 8) Key Direction

The frame must preserve generous emotional space.

The dominant Vision3 250D look should show warm light leaving while cooler evening slowly enters.

Connect the choice not to speak to visible evidence: her face turned away from the bottle, the final finger remaining by the cap, lips faintly parted, and the broad unoccupied window space ahead.

This is not a definitive rejection. It is a temporary placing-down of the confession.

Maintain realistic hand contact, crystal reflection, facial profile anatomy, natural fabric movement, and fine analog grain.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font in a thin or light weight.

The watermark must be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, unobtrusive, and softly blended into the photograph.

cuts.title: 태우지 않는 편지
cuts.prompt:
CUT 13 Prompt — 태우지 않는 편지

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic cinematic Korean romance twilight still photographed primarily on Kodak Portra 800, with CineStill 800T influence restricted only to the tiny ember and small warm practical lights.

Kodak Portra 800 must dominate the complete image: warm natural dusk skin, softly visible organic grain, low contrast, restrained magenta and orange, smooth highlight rolloff, and natural separation between deep navy clothing, ivory paper, smoke, and twilight.

CineStill 800T contributes only a minimal red halation immediately around the tiny ember or distant atelier window light. It must not transform the scene into neon nightlife.

Avoid strong neon, large red halos, bright flames, dramatic smoke, burning paper, vivid magenta, crushed shadows, orange skin, high contrast, HDR, digital sharpness, or ritualistic fantasy imagery.

The mood is mature, deliberate, and calm. Hayoon is not destroying her feelings; she is creating a small fragrant pause in which she can breathe again.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

On a small terrace table, a neatly folded unsent letter rests beside a sage smudge stick.

Hayoon briefly lights the end of the smudge stick and gently extinguishes the flame, leaving only a thin line of white smoke.

She does not touch or burn the letter.

The physical distance between the ember and paper clearly shows that the memory will remain.

## 3) Place · Time · Environment

An open terrace connected to Hayoon’s perfume atelier during summer twilight.

The sky contains restrained magenta, coral orange, and lavender-blue tones.

A small wooden table, brass tray, a few herb pots, and a low terrace railing create a simple, lived-in outdoor space.

Warm light from the atelier interior mixes softly with the remaining natural sky light.

## 4) Background and Props

- One neatly folded plain warm-ivory letter
- No visible writing, name, address, or stamp
- One natural sage smudge stick tied with plain thread
- One small brass tray
- A tiny controlled ember
- Thin white smoke
- Small wooden table
- Minimal herb pots
- Low terrace railing

Maintain clear physical distance between the letter and smudge stick.

No burning paper, large flame, ash falling onto the letter, incense altar, candles, occult symbols, logos, text, extra people, or excessive smoke.

## 5) Camera Composition

Vertical 3:4 composition.

A 45-degree over-the-shoulder view.

Place the folded letter and smoking smudge stick in the lower-center region.

Include the terrace railing and restrained magenta-orange sky across the upper frame.

Show part of Hayoon’s shoulder and dark-brown hair along the right side.

Her hands and the action of extinguishing the flame must remain clearly visible.

The letter must not sit in the smoke’s direct path.

Keep the object arrangement natural and asymmetrical.

## 6) Model Expression

Hayoon, a beautiful young Korean woman with long dark-brown layered wavy hair, center-parted with airy see-through bangs and loose summer strands.

She has graceful, realistic Korean body proportions and anatomically accurate hands with short transparent nude-pink nails.

She wears a deep navy linen off-shoulder blouse with a relaxed non-revealing silhouette, paired with comfortable white denim shorts.

The exposed shoulder communicates breeze and openness rather than sensual display.

Only part of her calm side profile may appear softly in the frame.

One hand holds the smudge stick. The other carefully extinguishes the tiny flame without touching the letter.

Her wrists and fingers remain relaxed.

The action feels like a simple end-of-day habit, not a ceremonial or dramatic ritual.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere

Mix remaining natural twilight with weak warm light from the atelier interior.

Use gentle side illumination so the thin smoke appears slightly brighter than the sky.

Create only a tiny restrained red halation around the ember.

Render the folded letter as warm ivory.

Keep the deep navy blouse and white denim clearly separated from the darker terrace.

The flame is limited to a tiny orange point before being extinguished.

Dominant palette:
- Deep navy
- Warm ivory
- Restrained magenta-orange twilight
- Lavender blue
- Tiny amber ember
- Clean white smoke

## 8) Key Direction

The Portra 800 dusk atmosphere must remain dominant. CineStill halation is a tiny local accent only.

The letter must remain completely safe and untouched by the flame.

Connect emotional maturity to visible evidence: careful hand movement, physical distance between paper and ember, a very small flame, smoke replacing fire, and a relaxed ordinary terrace setting.

Maintain realistic smoke behavior, natural hands, accurate ember size, believable linen texture, and restrained analog grain.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font in a thin or light weight.

The watermark must be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, unobtrusive, and softly blended into the photograph.

cuts.title: 향기를 바람에 보내는 순간
cuts.prompt:
CUT 14 Prompt — 향기를 바람에 보내는 순간

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic cinematic Korean romance twilight profile photographed primarily on Kodak Portra 800, with CineStill 800T influence restricted to tiny warm light sources near the atelier.

Portra 800 must dominate the entire photograph: natural dusk skin tone, restrained magenta and orange sky, deep but readable navy fabric, softly visible analog grain, gentle low contrast, and smooth highlight rolloff.

CineStill 800T contributes only subtle localized halation around a distant atelier window or very small warm practical light. No red halo should appear around Hayoon’s face or the sky.

Avoid neon nightlife, highly saturated sunset color, dramatic clouds, excessive smoke, strong red bloom, hard silhouette, crushed shadows, beauty-filter skin, hyper-sharp digital rendering, HDR, or posed fashion glamour.

The mood is dreamlike, spacious, tender, and quietly freeing. Hayoon still carries the feeling, but she allows the time that held her in place to drift away with the scented smoke.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Hayoon leans loosely beside the terrace railing.

The sage smudge stick remains in the hand farthest from her body.

A thin ribbon of white smoke travels horizontally with the summer evening breeze and dissolves into the open sky.

Hayoon watches the direction in which the smoke disappears.

Her expression carries a faint sense of relief, but she does not smile fully.

## 3) Place · Time · Environment

An open terrace outside Hayoon’s private perfume atelier during the final stage of summer twilight.

The sky forms a smooth restrained gradient of magenta, coral orange, and lavender blue.

The breeze moves Hayoon’s hair, linen blouse, and the thin smoke in one consistent direction.

A simple railing, a small herb pot, and the faint warm atelier window remain secondary.

## 4) Background and Props

- One natural sage smudge stick tied with plain thread
- Thin clean white smoke
- Low terrace railing
- Minimal herb pots
- Faint warm atelier window
- Wide open twilight sky

No large flame, dense smoke cloud, smoke covering the face, letter in Hayoon’s hand, city neon, dramatic skyline, logos, text, other people, or excessive furniture.

The smoke must move away from Hayoon’s face toward the open right side of the frame.

## 5) Camera Composition

Vertical 3:4 composition.

Natural 50mm lens perspective.

Medium-long shot framed from the upper thighs.

Place Hayoon on the left or left-center side.

Leave a broad expanse of twilight sky and drifting smoke across the right side.

Her body stands parallel to the railing.

Show her face in a clear natural side profile oriented toward the direction of the smoke.

Maintain a balanced relationship between her recognizable face and the wide sky.

The smoke should remain separated from her profile and extend gently toward the outer-right edge.

The silhouette must remain clear enough for profile-image use without reducing her to a dark cutout.

## 6) Model Expression

Hayoon, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small slim oval face, smooth V-line jaw, fair luminous skin, large clear dark-brown almond-shaped eyes, soft double eyelids, subtle aegyo-sal, and gently lifted outer eye corners.

She has a small straight nose with a softly rounded tip and naturally full soft pink lips.

Her long dark-brown layered wavy hair is center-parted with airy see-through bangs and several loose strands moving naturally in the breeze.

She has graceful, realistic Korean body proportions with a slender waist, softly balanced feminine curves, elegant posture, and anatomically natural limbs.

She wears a deep navy linen off-shoulder blouse with a comfortable relaxed silhouette and white denim shorts. The outfit is tasteful and non-revealing.

A single thin gold earring may be used, with no additional jewellery.

Her makeup is translucent semi-glow K-beauty makeup with natural pores, muted rose and lavender-brown eye tones, softly separated lashes, diffused cheek color, and moist rose-brown lips.

One elbow rests loosely on the railing.

Her other hand holds the smudge stick low and away from her body.

She keeps her eyes open and watches a distant point in the smoke’s direction.

Her lips hold only the smallest suggestion of relief, never a full smile.

Her body remains relaxed, with no arched back or posed fashion stance.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere

Place the final remaining golden-hour side light across Hayoon’s face and exposed shoulder.

Create a thin orange rim light along the ends of her moving hair.

Use soft cool fill from the open sky on the shadow side of her face.

The sky transitions gradually between restrained magenta, coral orange, and lavender blue.

Keep the lower terrace darker while clearly separating Hayoon’s navy blouse from the background.

Use fine side lighting to reveal the smoke.

Allow only minimal halation around the distant atelier window or tiny warm practical light.

Dominant palette:
- Restrained magenta-orange
- Lavender blue
- Deep navy
- Clean white smoke
- Warm-neutral skin
- Thin orange rim light

## 8) Key Direction

The Portra 800 twilight color and wide atmospheric space are the most important visual elements.

Connect emotional release to visible evidence: her loose elbow on the railing, the smudge stick held away from her body, open eyes following the dissolving smoke, wind moving her hair and blouse, and a faint unfinished softness at the lips.

This is not a cool or triumphant farewell. It is the gentle freedom of allowing herself to move while keeping the memory.

Maintain realistic smoke direction, natural side-profile anatomy, accurate hands, believable breeze, linen texture, and restrained film grain.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font in a thin or light weight.

The watermark must be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, unobtrusive, and softly blended into the photograph.

cuts.title: 향기로 남긴 안녕
cuts.prompt:
CUT 15 Prompt — 향기로 남긴 안녕

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic cinematic Korean romance ending still photographed primarily on Kodak Portra 800, with CineStill 800T influence restricted to the warm atelier window and small indoor practical lights.

Kodak Portra 800 must dominate the complete frame through warm natural low-light skin, softly visible analog grain, restrained magenta and lavender twilight, low contrast, smooth highlight rolloff, and gentle separation between the cooling terrace and warm interior.

CineStill 800T contributes only a very subtle red-amber halation surrounding the atelier window light. It must not affect the entire terrace or create a neon appearance.

Avoid dramatic red halos, vivid sunset color, crushed blacks, strong silhouette, heavy smoke, burning objects, high contrast, HDR, digital sharpness, exaggerated farewell poses, or artificial emotional staging.

The mood is bittersweet, quiet, forward-moving, and gently warm. The past remains outside, but Hayoon’s next step leads toward the living warmth of her own present.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Hayoon has placed the sage smudge stick safely onto a brass tray.

She turns her body toward the warmly lit atelier and begins to walk inside.

She does not stop or fully look back.

Only her head turns approximately 10 to 15 degrees toward the terrace and the final fading smoke.

On the small table remain the unsent folded letter and the same antique crystal perfume bottle, now empty or nearly dark.

The memory remains, but Hayoon is moving.

## 3) Place · Time · Environment

The open atelier terrace at the transition from twilight into evening.

The outdoor sky is cooling into lavender blue with faint residual magenta.

Warm cream-amber interior light spills from the atelier doorway or window.

A small wooden table holds the remaining objects. A low railing and a few herb pots remain understated.

The last thin smoke dissolves into the evening air.

## 4) Background and Props

On the left-side table:
- One neatly folded plain unsent letter
- No readable writing, name, address, stamp, or markings
- One antique multifaceted crystal perfume bottle, empty or holding almost no visible light
- One brass tray
- The extinguished sage smudge stick safely resting on the tray
- A final thin trace of smoke

Other elements:
- Warm atelier doorway or window
- Minimal herb pots
- Low railing
- Lavender-blue evening sky

No fire, burning letter, dense smoke, logos, text, additional people, excessive props, modern product branding, or clutter.

## 5) Camera Composition

Vertical 3:4 composition.

Natural 35mm lens perspective.

A wide medium-long shot framed from the upper calves.

Place Hayoon on the right side as she begins moving toward the warm atelier interior.

Place the table, letter, brass tray, and crystal bottle on the left.

Allow the final smoke to occupy the central space between the objects and Hayoon.

Leave generous negative space in the cooling twilight sky.

Create a new visual direction through the warm interior light ahead of Hayoon.

Capture the instant when one foot has already begun the next step.

Her body and feet face the atelier. Only her face turns slightly back toward the fading smoke.

## 6) Model Expression

Hayoon, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small slim oval face, smooth V-line jaw, fair luminous skin, large clear dark-brown almond-shaped eyes, soft double eyelids, subtle aegyo-sal, and gently lifted outer eye corners.

She has a small straight nose with a softly rounded tip and naturally full soft pink lips.

Her long dark-brown layered wavy hair is center-parted with airy see-through bangs and loose strands that move slightly with her turning head.

She has graceful, realistic Korean body proportions with a slender waist, softly balanced feminine curves, elegant posture, and anatomically natural limbs.

She wears a deep navy linen off-shoulder blouse with a relaxed tasteful silhouette, white denim shorts, and a single restrained thin gold earring.

Her makeup is translucent semi-glow K-beauty makeup with visible natural skin texture, muted rose and lavender-brown eyes, softly separated lashes, diffused blush, and moist rose-brown lips.

Her torso, hips, feet, and body weight face the atelier interior.

She does not stop walking.

Her head turns only approximately 10 to 15 degrees toward the terrace, never twisting unnaturally.

She does not look at the camera or an imaginary person. Her gaze briefly follows the fading smoke or the space she is leaving.

A tiny incomplete smile appears at her lips.

Her expression does not say that all regret has disappeared. It shows that she can carry the feeling and still take the next step.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere

Leave only a thin trace of the last sunset light on one side of Hayoon’s cheek.

Use warm cream-amber light from the atelier as soft frontal illumination on her face and body.

Let the outdoor terrace cool gradually into lavender blue.

Maintain both warm interior and cool exterior in the same image without strong teal-and-orange grading.

Allow only a very subtle CineStill-style halation around the warm atelier window.

Use fine side light to reveal the final smoke as it disappears.

Dominant palette:
- Lavender-blue evening
- Faint magenta afterglow
- Warm cream-amber interior
- Deep navy
- Clean white
- Restrained brass gold

## 8) Key Direction

The visual ending must emphasize movement toward warmth rather than dramatic separation.

The Portra 800 low-light atmosphere must remain dominant, while the small warm interior halation acts only as a destination cue.

Connect the emotional conclusion to visible evidence: her feet already moving inward, body fully facing forward, head turning only slightly, the letter remaining on the table, the extinguished smudge stick resting safely on brass, and the final smoke fading between past and present.

Maintain natural walking anatomy, realistic 10–15 degree head rotation, correct limb positions, believable object continuity, accurate crystal-bottle form, restrained smoke, and organic analog grain.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font in a thin or light weight.

The watermark must be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, unobtrusive, and softly blended into the photograph.

cuts.title: 아침 피드 메인 히어로
cuts.prompt:
## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic 35mm analog travel-fashion portrait inspired by Fujifilm Pro 400H.

Cool airy greens, a clean blue summer sky, soft pastel color, natural skin tone, gentle contrast, smooth highlight rolloff, and subtle fine film grain. The image feels fresh, graceful, quietly exciting, and emotionally spacious without appearing faded, gray, or underexposed.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Jieun is walking across a green hill in Biei when she hears someone softly call her name. She gently turns her face toward the camera while her body remains angled along the direction of her walk.

Her white dress and long black hair move lightly in the cool summer breeze. The image captures the first moment of a Hokkaido journey: clear air, quiet anticipation, and the feeling that summer has finally begun.

Jieun must remain the immediate visual focus, with her face and white dress recognized before the landscape.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

A gently rolling green hill in Biei, Hokkaido, during a clear summer morning between 8:00 and 10:00 AM.

Bright natural sunlight, a pleasant cool breeze, clean transparent air, a vivid blue sky, and a few soft white clouds.

No rain, no umbrella, no gray sky, no fog, no tourists, no vehicles, no road signs, no fences, and no visible infrastructure.

## 4) Background and Props

- Layered pale-green and mint-green hills
- One solitary tree standing far behind Jieun near her shoulder line
- Fine meadow grass moving in the wind
- Clean open sky occupying approximately 25–30% of the frame
- No handheld props
- No bag, camera, flowers, jewelry, or travel accessories

## 5) Camera Composition and Framing

Vertical 3:4 composition optimized for a social-media editorial feed.

A knee-below medium-long portrait, with Jieun occupying approximately 70% of the image height.

Eye-level or slightly low camera position, photographed with a natural 50mm lens perspective.

Place Jieun slightly away from the center on a rule-of-thirds point. Keep enough environmental detail to clearly identify the Biei landscape, but do not make her small in the frame.

Moderate depth of field with recognizable hills and tree. No extreme background blur.

Include her head, hands, dress, knees, and lower legs naturally without awkward cropping.

## 6) Model Expression

Jieun, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, smooth porcelain skin, large round almond-shaped eyes with subtle double eyelids, a calm and delicate gaze, a slim straight nose, soft pink gradient lips, and a small beauty mark near one eye.

Long straight black hair with natural volume and thin airy see-through bangs. Petite, feminine, healthy, anatomically realistic proportions with a slim waist and delicate body lines.

Outfit:
A pure white or bright ivory cotton maxi dress with lightly puffed short sleeves, a minimal fitted waist, and a generously flowing skirt. White or ivory flat shoes.

Makeup:
Thin cloud-like semi-matte skin, rosy beige and soft brown eyes, gently defined lashes, cool rose blush, and a clear rose-pink glow lip.

Pose:
Her body is turned approximately 30 degrees to the side while her face turns naturally toward the camera. One hand lightly gathers a small section of the dress skirt; the other hangs comfortably beside her.

Expression:
A small, natural smile with clear visible eyes. Fresh, calm, and quietly excited rather than posed or commercial.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Soft morning sunlight falls evenly across her face and dress.

The white dress must separate clearly from the green hill. Preserve clean blue sky, cool mint greens, realistic skin color, and fine facial detail.

No harsh midday shadows, no blown highlights, no HDR, no excessive micro-contrast, no milky haze, and no desaturated gray cast.

## 8) Key Direction Points

The image must instantly communicate:

- Jieun’s recognizable face
- A clean white summer dress
- A bright green Biei hill
- A clear Hokkaido summer sky
- A gentle feeling of beginning a journey

Create a highly saveable, shareable summer travel-fashion hero image for a female audience.

Avoid generic AI beauty, plastic skin, distorted hands, extra fingers, cropped feet, hidden facial features, oversized landscape framing, or an advertisement-like stare.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight.

The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 초원길을 걷는 여행자
cuts.prompt:
## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic 35mm analog full-body travel portrait inspired by Fujifilm Pro 400H.

Cool pastel greens, clean blue sky, soft natural daylight, delicate skin tone, restrained contrast, subtle fine grain, and refreshing summer clarity. The mood is light, hopeful, and quietly liberating.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Jieun slowly walks toward the camera along a narrow path through a green meadow in Biei.

There are no props. The story is carried by her natural stride, the movement of her white cotton dress, the soft shine of her black hair, and the open summer landscape around her.

The scene should feel like an authentic moment observed during the first morning of a journey, not a rehearsed runway walk.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

A narrow meadow path crossing a gently sloped green hill in Biei, Hokkaido.

Clear summer morning, blue sky, a few clean white clouds, soft sunlight, and a cool breeze.

The ground is dry and comfortable for walking.

No rain, umbrellas, mud, tourists, roads, signs, power lines, buildings, vehicles, fences, or farm machinery.

## 4) Background and Props

- Narrow natural meadow path used as a leading line
- Rolling pale-green hills
- Fine summer grass moving lightly
- Clear sky occupying approximately 20–25% of the frame
- No props
- No handbag, camera, hat, bouquet, or jewelry

## 5) Camera Composition and Framing

Vertical 3:4 full-body composition.

Jieun occupies approximately 60% of the image height.

Photograph from waist height or slightly lower using a natural 50mm perspective.

Show her entire body from the top of her head to the soles of both shoes. Maintain comfortable space above her hair and beneath her feet.

Use the narrow path as a leading line toward Jieun. Keep her face recognizable and properly exposed.

Avoid an extreme wide shot, tiny subject, cropped ankles, excessive foreground grass, or strong background blur.

## 6) Model Expression

Jieun, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, smooth porcelain skin, large round almond-shaped eyes with subtle double eyelids, a slim straight nose, soft pink gradient lips, and a small beauty mark near one eye.

Long straight black hair with natural volume and thin see-through bangs. Petite, elegant, naturally feminine, and anatomically realistic Korean proportions.

Outfit:
A pure white or bright ivory cotton maxi dress with soft short sleeves, a naturally defined waist, and a loose skirt moving gently in the breeze. White or ivory flat shoes.

Makeup:
Clean semi-matte cloud skin, rosy-beige eyes, soft brown definition, cool rose blush, and a fresh rose-pink lip.

Pose:
A natural small walking stride. One hand lightly brushes the side seam of her dress while the opposite arm moves freely with her step.

Gaze:
She looks slightly beside the direction of travel rather than directly into the lens.

Expression:
A gentle, barely visible smile that suggests the quiet excitement of a first travel day.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Use clear but soft morning sunlight.

Allow subtle sunlight to catch the edges of her black hair and moving dress without creating an artificial halo.

Maintain bright, clean separation among the white dress, green grass, and blue sky.

No gray haze, overexposed dress, crushed shadows, orange skin, dramatic cinematic darkness, or excessive saturation.

## 8) Key Direction Points

The full-body silhouette and natural movement must remain elegant and anatomically correct.

The image should make the viewer imagine stepping into the meadow and walking through the cool air.

Prioritize Jieun’s face, outfit, realistic walking posture, complete feet, and the visual rhythm of the path.

Avoid runway posture, exaggerated leg extension, stiff arms, floating fabric, malformed shoes, duplicate limbs, or scenery that overwhelms the model.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight.

The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 바람을 느끼는 순간
cuts.prompt:
## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic 35mm analog editorial portrait inspired by Fujifilm Pro 400H.

Fresh mint greens, clean blue sky, soft white cotton, luminous natural skin, restrained pastel color, low-to-moderate contrast, and delicate fine grain.

The mood is clear, intimate, peaceful, and gently romantic.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Jieun pauses on the Biei hillside and lifts one hand to tuck windblown hair behind her ear.

She looks toward a distant hill while sunlight rests softly across her face and white dress. The small movement conveys the exact moment when the cool Hokkaido breeze makes the journey feel real.

The scene is a human portrait first and a landscape photograph second.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

A green hillside in Biei, Hokkaido, during a bright and cool summer morning.

Clear blue sky, a few white clouds, soft sunlight, and a natural breeze.

No rain, fog, dark clouds, tourists, fences, signs, roads, cars, buildings, umbrellas, or artificial scenic props.

## 4) Background and Props

- Softly layered green hill
- A single distant tree behind and away from her face
- Minimal meadow grass along the lower edge
- Clean open space in the direction of her gaze
- No handheld props or accessories

## 5) Camera Composition and Framing

Vertical 3:4 thigh-up medium portrait.

Jieun occupies approximately 75% of the image height.

Use a 50mm or 85mm natural portrait perspective from a 45-degree three-quarter angle.

Keep her face, raised hand, upper body, waist, and visible dress texture in clear focus.

Leave modest headroom and visual space in front of her gaze.

The background should remain recognizable but softly controlled rather than fully blurred.

Do not crop her wrist, fingers, elbows, or hair unnaturally.

## 6) Model Expression

Jieun, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, porcelain-clear skin, large round almond-shaped eyes, subtle double eyelids, a calm and delicate gaze, a slim straight nose, soft pink gradient lips, and a small beauty mark near one eye.

Long straight black hair with natural volume and airy see-through bangs. Petite, naturally feminine, elegant, and anatomically realistic.

Outfit:
A minimal pure-white or bright-ivory cotton maxi dress with soft short sleeves and a naturally shaped waist.

Makeup:
Thin semi-matte cloud skin, rosy beige and soft brown eye color, lightly defined lashes, cool rose blush, and a clear rose-pink glow lip.

Pose:
One hand gently tucks a few strands of hair behind her ear. Her opposite arm rests naturally beside her body. Relaxed shoulders, soft elbows, and no stiffness.

Gaze:
Her eyes remain open and clearly visible as she looks toward the distant hill.

Expression:
A small, comfortable smile, as though enjoying the cool air.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Soft sunlight illuminates her face evenly from the front and side.

Keep delicate skin texture, visible pores, natural shadows, and realistic hair detail.

The white dress must remain clean and detailed rather than overexposed.

Maintain cool greens, a pure blue sky, natural pink skin, and subtle analog grain.

No beauty filter, plastic skin, artificial face glow, strong vignette, gray wash, heavy blur, or excessive softness.

## 8) Key Direction Points

The emotional center is the combination of visible eyes, moving hair, a relaxed hand gesture, and a fresh summer breeze.

Her hand must be anatomically correct with five natural fingers.

Do not let hair cover her eyes, beauty mark, nose, or lips.

Avoid a melancholic expression, closed eyes, dramatic sorrow, fashion-advertisement stiffness, or a distant tiny model.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight.

The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 유리 피라미드 앞의 푸른 실루엣
cuts.prompt:
## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic daylight cinematic fashion portrait inspired by CineStill 50D.

Clean daylight, cool architectural color, crisp but natural glass reflections, refined cinematic tones, fine film grain, restrained contrast, and an orderly modern atmosphere.

The image feels intelligent, calm, airy, and quietly curious rather than cold or sterile.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Jieun stands on a neatly maintained lawn in front of the glass pyramid at Moerenuma Park.

She slowly looks upward toward the highest point of the structure. A compact silver film camera hangs loosely from one hand.

The architecture suggests scale and order, while Jieun’s sky-blue shirt and relaxed posture introduce softness and human curiosity.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

The exterior of the glass pyramid at Moerenuma Park in Sapporo, Hokkaido.

A clear summer morning or late afternoon with a clean blue sky, fresh green lawn, and gentle natural light.

No tourists, signs, bicycles, service vehicles, barriers, litter, or distracting park furniture.

## 4) Background and Props

- Large geometric glass-pyramid facade
- Clean sky reflected in the glass
- Neatly cut light-green lawn
- Minimal pale concrete elements
- Matte-silver compact film camera
- Thin black or gray wrist strap
- No other accessories or props

## 5) Camera Composition and Framing

Vertical 3:4 full-body fashion composition.

Jieun occupies approximately 60% of the image height.

Shoot from slightly below waist level using a natural 35mm–50mm perspective.

Arrange the pyramid’s diagonal lines so they rise behind Jieun without visually cutting through her face.

Include her complete body and both shoes.

The architecture should remain impressive but must not reduce Jieun to a tiny figure.

Keep the image clean, geometric, and balanced with controlled negative space.

## 6) Model Expression

Jieun, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, porcelain-clear skin, large round almond-shaped eyes with subtle double eyelids, a slim straight nose, soft pink gradient lips, and a small beauty mark near one eye.

Her long black hair is tied into a loose low ponytail. Thin see-through bangs and delicate face-framing strands remain natural.

Petite, feminine, healthy, and anatomically realistic body proportions.

Outfit:
An oversized sky-blue poplin shirt worn untucked, white tailored pin-tuck shorts, and minimal white sneakers. Sleeves casually rolled above the wrists. Small silver earrings.

Makeup:
A clear cool-neutral base, grayish taupe and soft brown eyes, lavender-pink blush, and rose-beige lips.

Pose:
One foot slightly forward. One hand holds the silver camera loosely below hip level. The opposite hand rests comfortably near the side seam of the shirt.

Gaze:
She looks upward at the architecture.

Expression:
Quiet curiosity with relaxed lips and softly focused eyes.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Use bright, clean daylight with soft facial illumination.

Glass reflections should remain precise but not metallic or overprocessed.

Emphasize sky blue, silver, white, pale concrete, and light green.

Maintain realistic skin texture and gentle shadow transitions.

No dark moody grading, heavy teal-orange color, blown glass highlights, HDR, sharp digital clarity, or artificial blue skin.

## 8) Key Direction Points

Balance the model and the architecture rather than making either one visually dominant.

Preserve a recognizable full face in three-quarter profile, complete shoes, realistic camera size, and clean body proportions.

Avoid a towering distorted building, ultra-wide lens deformation, stiff catalog posing, crowded reflections, duplicate people in the glass, or signs and logos.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight.

The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 셔터를 누르기 전
cuts.prompt:
## 1) Photo Style and Mood

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Jieun holds a compact silver film camera at chest level while studying the blue sky and white clouds reflected across the glass pyramid.

Outside the glass pyramid at Moerenuma Park in Sapporo on a clear summer day.

## 5) Camera Composition and Framing

Vertical 3:4 knee-up medium-long portrait.

Jieun occupies approximately 70% of the image height.

Photograph from a 30–45 degree side angle using a 50mm lens perspective.

Place a strong architectural diagonal behind her, avoiding intersection with her eyes or neck.

Her face, both hands, camera, shirt texture, and white shorts must remain clearly visible.

Use moderate depth of field so the glass geometry stays legible.

## 6) Model Expression

Jieun, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, smooth porcelain skin, large round almond-shaped eyes with subtle double eyelids, a slim straight nose, soft pink gradient lips, and a small beauty mark near one eye.

Do not place the camera against her eyes or cover her mouth and nose.

Create the feeling of a real traveler quietly composing a photograph rather than a commercial camera advertisement.

Avoid stiff elbows, aggressive smiling, direct fashion-model eye contact, or an overly blurred location.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

cuts.title: 운하가 보이는 가장 좋은 자리

Jieun sits at a minimal café table beside a large window overlooking the Otaru Canal.

- Calm water with restrained sunlight reflections

- Minimal table and chair

Vertical 3:4 thigh-up medium-long portrait.

Jieun occupies approximately 70% of the image height.

Include part of the table and chair while keeping the canal beside her rather than directly behind her head.

Maintain balanced exposure between her face and the outdoor scenery.

cuts.title: 여행을 그리는 오후

cuts.title: 라벤더 언덕의 주인공

Maintain clear color separation between her muted pale-lavender dress and the deeper lavender field.

## 6) Model Expression

Jieun, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, smooth porcelain skin, large round almond-shaped eyes with subtle double eyelids, a slim straight nose, soft pink gradient lips, and a small beauty mark near one eye.

Her long black hair is styled in a loose low braid or relaxed low tie. Thin see-through bangs and soft face-framing strands remain visible beneath the hat.

Outfit:
A gray-toned pale lavender linen midi dress with a square neckline, slim straight silhouette, neatly shaped waist, and cream low-heeled sandals.

Makeup:
Thin cloud-like skin, lavender-gray and rosy-taupe eyes, cool pink and faint lavender blush, and muted mauve-pink lips.

Pose:
Her upper body turns gently to show the square neckline and waist. One hand lightly touches the raffia hat brim; the other rests naturally along the side of her dress.

Gaze:
A soft look near the camera.

Expression:
A small, elegant smile with visible, relaxed eyes.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Use soft late-afternoon sunlight with smooth shadows.

Maintain realistic lavender rather than neon purple.

Preserve clean skin, detailed linen texture, natural hat fibers, and subtle breeze movement.

No orange sunset cast, oversaturated flowers, washed-out sky, extreme haze, plastic skin, heavy blur, or bright commercial color grading.

## 8) Key Direction Points

Jieun must remain the heroine rather than disappearing inside the flower field.

The hat must fit naturally without crushing the bangs or creating a dark shadow over her eyes.

Avoid flowers covering the face, a giant hat, overly glamorous posing, stiff arms, damaged plants, picked flowers, or an exaggerated hourglass silhouette.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

cuts.title: 향기가 지나가는 방향
cuts.prompt:

No tourists, farm structures, signs, fences, vehicles, picked flowers, dark clouds, rain, or fog.

## 4) Background and Props

- A narrow path only partially visible

- Foreground lavender limited to the lower frame

Vertical 3:4 knee-up medium-long portrait.

Jieun occupies approximately 70–75% of the image height.

Shoot from a 45-degree side angle using a natural 50mm or 85mm perspective.

Keep her full face, eyes, hands, dress neckline, waist, and raffia hat visible.

cuts.title: 숲을 바라보는 오후
cuts.prompt:
## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic 35mm private-ryokan lifestyle portrait inspired by Kodak Portra 400.

Muted warm-neutral color, soft window light, deep summer-forest green, warm tatami beige, charcoal silk, gentle highlight rolloff, and subtle film grain.

The atmosphere is calm, refined, cool, restorative, and private without feeling dark or melancholic.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Jieun sits comfortably on the tatami floor beside a wide window and looks out toward a dense Hokkaido summer forest.

The room remains visually quiet and minimally furnished. Her complete seated figure, face in profile, window, forest, and tatami texture are all visible in a balanced composition.

The scene represents the first moment of the journey when doing nothing finally feels acceptable.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

A private minimal ryokan room in Hokkaido during a clear summer afternoon.

Soft daylight enters through a large clean window. Outside is a deep green forest with no buildings, people, rain, or mist.

The interior feels cool, airy, and comfortable rather than dim or heavily traditional.

## 4) Background and Props

- Natural woven tatami floor
- Wide modern window
- Dense deep-green summer forest
- Low minimal wooden table placed away from her
- No bedding, television, luggage, lanterns, food, tea set, screens, or excessive decoration
- No handheld props in this cut

## 5) Camera Composition and Framing

Vertical 3:4 seated full-body medium-long composition.

Jieun occupies approximately 60% of the image height.

Photograph diagonally across the room using a natural 50mm perspective.

Show her face in a clear side or three-quarter profile, her complete seated body, bare feet, window, forest, and approximately 20–25% open tatami floor.

Keep the room intimate rather than extremely wide.

## 6) Model Expression

Jieun, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, smooth porcelain skin, large round almond-shaped eyes with subtle double eyelids, a slim straight nose, soft pink gradient lips, and a small beauty mark near one eye.

Her long black hair is tied loosely at the nape or draped naturally over one shoulder. Thin see-through bangs and soft loose strands remain visible.

Petite, feminine, healthy, graceful, and anatomically realistic proportions.

Outfit:
A deep-charcoal silk wrap top with a refined kimono-style collar and a matching flowing long skirt. Neat but relaxed waist tie. Bare feet. Minimal or no jewelry.

Makeup:
Natural semi-glow skin, soft brown and gray-brown eyes, warm rose-beige blush, and dried-rose tinted lip balm.

Pose:
She sits with both legs folded comfortably to one side. One hand rests on her knee; the other rests lightly on the tatami beside her.

Gaze:
She looks toward the forest.

Expression:
Relaxed, peaceful, and gently relieved rather than tired, sad, or emotionally distant.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Use soft window light across her face and silk outfit.

The interior must remain bright enough to reveal facial details, tatami texture, folds of silk, and bare feet.

Balance cool forest green with warm neutral tatami and deep charcoal.

No dark room, underexposure, yellow-orange lighting, dramatic sunbeams, heavy shadows, fog outside, or artificial luxury décor.

## 8) Key Direction Points

Negative space should come from clean tatami and an uncluttered window, not from making Jieun tiny.

Her face must remain recognizable in profile.

Ensure anatomically correct folded legs and natural bare feet.

Avoid kneeling seiza discomfort, ceremonial posing, traditional geisha styling, cluttered ryokan props, sad expression, or an oversized empty room.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight.

The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 여행의 마지막 기록

Jieun, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, smooth porcelain skin, large round almond-shaped eyes with subtle double eyelids, a calm delicate gaze, a slim straight nose, soft pink gradient lips, and a small beauty mark near one eye.
