cuts.title: 책 속에 멈춘 오후
cuts.prompt:
## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic analog cinematic environmental portrait photographed on genuine Kodak Portra 400 120 color-negative film with a medium-format camera and professionally scanned through a Noritsu HS-1800 lab scanner.

Kodak Portra 400 unmistakably shapes the entire photograph through softly visible organic grain, warm-neutral Korean skin, restrained deep navy, muted sand beige, rich dark oak brown, low contrast, smooth highlight rolloff, open shadow detail, and gently compressed midtones. Expose at approximately EI 320 for a slightly dense negative that preserves the cream-colored book pages, dark navy knit texture, black hair, polished wood, rain-darkened window, and shadowed bookshelves without digital HDR clarity.

Use softened analog edge acuity, restrained micro-contrast, subtle color-density variation, and a slightly warm Noritsu scan density without orange or yellow color cast. The mood is private, contemplative, and emotionally spacious. The rainy afternoon creates comfortable solitude rather than tragic loneliness.

Avoid orange skin, yellow wood, dramatic spotlighting, glossy commercial sharpness, crushed bookshelf shadows, excessive background blur, oversized grain, artificial dust, light leaks, plastic skin, theatrical sadness, or polished luxury-library advertising.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Inside the old library of a northern German manor, Jieun has stopped reading without deliberately deciding to stop. An open faded hardcover book rests across her knees. One hand remains quietly on the page, while the fingers of her other hand slowly move across a worn brown leather bookmark.

Her gaze has drifted slightly beyond the printed sentence, as though a quiet thought has interrupted the act of reading. The tall shelves, dark oak walls, and steady summer rain create a small private world in which she does not need to explain what she is feeling.

## 3) Location, Time and Environment

A historic manor library during a cloudy summer afternoon. Dark oak bookshelves rise along the left side of the room, while a broad section of wooden wall paneling remains intentionally empty. A tall window behind the left side of Jieun is covered with fine rain trails, and the garden outside appears only as a muted gray-green presence.

The room feels cool, still, and faintly damp, without candlelight, fireplace glow, or bright artificial lamps.

## 4) Background and Props

A worn dark leather reading chair, an antique wooden desk with large empty areas, several faded clothbound and leather-bound books, one open cream-paged hardcover book, and a narrow brown leather bookmark. The props remain sparse and naturally aged.

The book supports Jieun’s action but never becomes the dominant subject. Her profile, eyes, and paused hand should be noticed before the viewer studies the pages.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition

Vertical 3:4 composition with a natural 50mm-equivalent perspective. The camera sits only slightly above Jieun’s eye level and observes her from a gentle front-side angle. Jieun sits in the lower-right third of the frame and is visible from the top of her head to just below her knees.

The tall bookshelf and a generous stretch of empty wooden wall fill most of the left side and upper frame, allowing the architecture and negative space to communicate silence. Her face, resting hand, and leather bookmark form a subtle diagonal.

Use moderate depth of field that gently softens the distant books while retaining their recognizable shapes and wood texture. Jieun does not look toward the camera; her gaze rests somewhere slightly beyond the open book.

## 6) Model Expression

Jieun is a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, smooth porcelain skin with natural pores, large round almond-shaped dark brown eyes with subtle double eyelids, a calm innocent and slightly melancholic gaze, a slim straight nose, softly blurred pink gradient lips, and a small delicate beauty mark near one eye.

She has long straight black hair with natural volume and thin airy see-through bangs. A few fine strands rest naturally near her cheek without hiding her eyes or beauty mark. She has a petite, healthy, and realistically proportioned Korean feminine figure with delicate body lines and anatomically natural posture.

She wears a deep navy boat-neck knit top, sand-beige straight trousers, and minimal dark brown loafers, with no necklace or large earrings. Her makeup uses softly matte bloom skin, restrained cloud-like luminosity beneath the eyes and high on the cheeks, diffused dusty-rose blush, low-saturation brown and rose-beige eye shading, a nearly invisible transparent opal accent at the inner corners, and softly blurred rose-mauve lips.

Her lips remain gently closed. Her back stays naturally upright without becoming rigid, while her shoulders and fingers remain completely relaxed.

## 7) Lighting, Color and Atmosphere

Soft overcast daylight enters from the rear-left window and passes through the rain-streaked glass. The light creates a gentle side plane across Jieun’s cheek and nose while keeping her expression readable.

A restrained neutral bounce from the camera side prevents her dark eyes from disappearing, while subtle negative fill on the opposite side creates separation between her face and the dark oak interior. The book pages retain creamy paper fibers instead of becoming blown white. The deep navy knit remains visibly blue, and her black hair retains separated strands without glossy digital shine.

## 8) Key Direction

The emotion should be visible through the page that has not been turned, the fingers lingering on the leather bookmark, Jieun’s gaze resting beyond the text, and the large untouched space surrounding her. The photograph should feel like a genuine medium-format frame from a quiet analog photo essay, not a posed library fashion campaign.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 넘기지 못한 페이지
cuts.prompt:
## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic intimate analog portrait photographed on genuine Kodak Portra 400 120 color-negative film with a medium-format camera and professionally scanned through a Noritsu HS-1800 lab scanner.

Kodak Portra 400 defines the complete image through fine organic grain, warm-neutral porcelain skin, restrained deep navy, muted cream paper, dark oak brown, low contrast, softly open shadows, and smooth highlight rolloff. Expose at approximately EI 320 so Jieun’s eye, black hair, navy knit weave, fingertips, cream book pages, and dim library remain readable within one naturally compressed negative.

Use softened analog edge definition, restrained micro-contrast, gentle midtone compression, and subtle variation in film density across skin, paper, and polished wood. The mood is inward, suspended, and quietly unresolved, as though one sentence has unexpectedly brought an old feeling back to the surface.

Avoid commercial book photography, isolated hands, extreme macro framing, plastic skin, harsh highlights, yellow wood, orange grading, crushed shadows, digitally perfect sharpness, exaggerated melancholic acting, or artificial rain reflections.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Jieun sits diagonally at an old oak desk inside the rainy manor library. Her fingertips have reached the corner of a cream-colored page but stop before turning it. A narrow brown leather bookmark rests beside the open book, slightly curved from long use.

Her lowered face and paused hand belong to the same emotional moment. She is no longer fully following the sentence, yet she has not moved away from it. The stillness feels less like sadness and more like a private pause caused by a memory she does not need to name.

## 3) Location, Time and Environment

A dark oak library during a steady rainy summer afternoon. A tall rain-marked window outside the immediate frame allows soft gray daylight to spread across the desk. The distant shelves remain recognizable behind Jieun, with faded book spines and restrained shadow detail.

The room is naturally dim and quiet, without bright lamps, candlelight, or fireplace glow.

## 4) Background and Props

An antique oak writing desk, one faded hardcover book opened to cream pages, a narrow brown leather bookmark, and several softly blurred old books in the background. The book occupies the lower foreground but never becomes larger or more important than Jieun’s face.

Do not include flowers, coffee cups, glasses, decorative writing tools, or unnecessary objects.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition

Vertical 3:4 close-medium portrait using an 85mm-equivalent short telephoto lens. The camera observes Jieun diagonally from beside the desk. Her page-turning hand enters the lower foreground, while her eye, nose, beauty mark, and softly closed lips remain visible in the upper-middle portion of the frame.

Her hand and face form a natural diagonal line. Focus rests slightly closer to her nearest eye than to her fingertips, while both remain emotionally readable. The bookshelf behind her softens gradually without becoming an abstract wall of blur.

Jieun looks toward the page corner with a slightly unfocused gaze and never looks toward the camera.

## 6) Model Expression

Jieun is a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, smooth fair porcelain skin with natural texture, large round almond-shaped dark brown eyes with subtle double eyelids, a calm innocent and slightly wistful gaze, a slim straight nose, softly blurred pink gradient lips, and a small beauty mark close to one eye.

Her long straight black hair has natural volume and thin see-through bangs. A few strands fall near her cheek while leaving the eye and beauty mark visible. She has a petite, healthy, and anatomically realistic Korean feminine figure.

She wears a deep navy boat-neck knit top and sand-beige straight trousers without visible jewelry. Her makeup features softly matte bloom skin, diffused dusty-rose blush across the upper cheeks, muted brown and rose-beige eye shading, no heavy black eyeliner, a nearly invisible transparent opal point at the inner eye, and softly blurred rose-mauve lips.

Her head inclines slightly downward. Her lips do not smile. Her fingertips hold only the edge of the page without tension, and her shoulders remain lowered.

## 7) Lighting, Color and Atmosphere

Rain-filtered natural light spreads broadly across the desk, creating a faint irregular pattern without sharp projected raindrop shadows. A subtle ivory bounce from the camera side opens Jieun’s eye and cheek just enough to preserve her expression.

The light remains wide and diffused so the fingers and paper avoid hard specular highlights. The cream page retains fiber and tonal detail, the navy knit remains visible, and the oak stays deep restrained brown rather than amber-orange.

## 8) Key Direction

The image is held together by three visible signs: the page corner caught between relaxed fingertips, the gaze that no longer follows the sentence, and the quiet face hovering behind the book. It should resemble an intimate frame discovered on a genuine medium-format roll, not a styled product editorial.

## 9) Watermark

cuts.title: 서재가 간직한 사람
cuts.prompt:
## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic analog architectural portrait photographed on genuine Kodak Portra 400 120 color-negative film with a medium-format camera and professionally scanned through a Noritsu HS-1800 lab scanner.

Kodak Portra 400 controls the complete frame with softly visible organic grain, warm-neutral Korean skin, deep but readable oak brown, restrained navy and sand beige, muted rainy green, low contrast, smooth highlight rolloff, and open architectural shadows. Expose around EI 320 for a slightly dense negative that protects Jieun’s facial detail, navy knit texture, black hair, pale skin, polished wood, and dim vertical shelves without artificial HDR recovery.

Use softened analog edge definition, gentle midtone compression, restrained micro-contrast, and subtle changes in scan density across the wooden wall panels. The photograph feels still, observant, and spacious. Jieun appears less like a model occupying a grand library and more like someone the old room has quietly learned to remember.

Avoid dramatic spotlight beams, silhouette, severe underexposure, extreme wide-angle distortion, elongated legs, crooked shelves, luxury campaign posing, orange-brown grading, heavy vignette, oversized grain, or digitally sharpened architecture.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Jieun stands alone near one side of the historic library. One hand rests lightly against the vertical wooden edge of a bookshelf, touching it without gripping. Her face turns gently toward the rainy window, revealing a readable three-quarter profile.

She is not selecting a book and does not pose for the camera. She simply pauses between the tall shelves and the window, allowing the silence of the room to settle naturally around her.

## 3) Location, Time and Environment

A large old manor library on a cloudy summer afternoon in northern Germany. Dark oak wall panels and floor-to-ceiling shelves rise vertically through the frame. A rain-softened window lies outside the right side of the composition, sending cool overcast light into the warm wood interior.

The room feels historic and carefully maintained, with subtle wear, softened polish, and restrained decoration rather than a theatrical gothic atmosphere.

## 4) Background and Props

Tall dark oak shelves, broad wooden wall panels, faded book spines, an antique desk placed far in the background, and a partially visible rain-marked window. Large sections of wall and floor remain empty.

Do not include decorative globes, rolling ladders, ornate chandeliers, candles, or excessive library ornaments.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition

Vertical 3:4 full-body environmental composition using a natural 45–50mm-equivalent perspective. The camera remains level and close to a frontal architectural viewpoint, with all vertical and horizontal lines straight.

Jieun stands small within one side of the library and occupies approximately 25–30% of the frame. More than 60% of the image is devoted to shelves, wooden panels, floor, and breathing space above her head.

The camera angle is not low enough to exaggerate her legs and not high enough to diminish her presence. Her face remains visible in a gentle three-quarter profile as she looks toward the window rather than the lens. Use enough depth of field to preserve the architectural texture while allowing the farthest shelves to soften naturally.

## 6) Model Expression

Jieun is a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, smooth porcelain skin with real skin texture, large round almond-shaped dark brown eyes with subtle double eyelids, a calm innocent and slightly melancholic gaze, a slim straight nose, softly blurred pink lips, and a tiny beauty mark near one eye.

Her long straight black hair falls with natural volume beneath thin see-through bangs. She has a petite feminine figure with healthy, elegant, and anatomically balanced proportions.

She wears a deep navy boat-neck knit top, sand-beige straight trousers, and understated dark brown loafers, without a necklace or large earrings. Her makeup remains delicate and low in saturation: softly matte bloom skin, quiet cloud luminosity below the eyes, diffused dusty-rose blush, muted brown and rose-beige eye shading, minimal transparent opal shimmer, and soft rose-mauve gradient lips.

Her weight rests only slightly more on one leg. Her waist and hips remain neutral rather than fashion-posed. The hand touching the bookshelf appears almost weightless, while her shoulders remain fully relaxed.

## 7) Lighting, Color and Atmosphere

Pure overcast daylight enters from the window side and reflects softly throughout the room. A narrow natural edge of light appears along Jieun’s black hair and shoulder.

A weak neutral bounce from the camera direction keeps her face from becoming a silhouette, while the deeper oak shadows remain open and textured. Her skin stays warm-neutral against the cooler rainy light. The navy garment remains visibly blue, the beige trousers stay muted, and the wood retains deep brown without orange saturation.

## 8) Key Direction

The emotion comes primarily from scale. Jieun’s small figure, tall vertical architecture, relaxed hand resting on the bookshelf, and empty space above her communicate peaceful solitude. The result should resemble a restrained analog photo essay about a person and a room, not a palace advertisement or dramatic movie poster.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 아직 시작되지 않은 일요일
cuts.prompt:
## 1) Photo Style and Mood
An ultra-realistic 35mm lifestyle editorial photograph inspired by Kodak Portra 160. Fine analog grain, low contrast, softly controlled highlights, luminous natural skin, pure white, soft ivory, transparent ice blue, and pale silver tones. The mood is cool, unhurried, intimate, and quietly liberating, like a summer Sunday morning with nowhere to go.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story
Seorin spends a slow summer Sunday morning alone in her bright living room. She sits deeply relaxed on a white fabric sofa, holding a transparent glass tumbler filled with a cold drink and large round ice cubes. She is not posing for the camera; her body has naturally settled into the sofa while she stares quietly into the open space, still not completely awake. The viewer should imagine the low hum of an air conditioner and the occasional clear clink of ice.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment
A minimal white and cream-toned apartment living room at approximately 9 a.m. on a hot summer Sunday. Closed windows, thin white curtains, and bright diffused daylight. No people, television, visible air conditioner, logos, clutter, or excessive decoration.

## 4) Background and Props
White fabric sofa, low matte-white table, translucent curtains, transparent handled tumbler, clear round ice cubes, condensation droplets, and generous cream-white negative space.

## 5) Camera Composition and Framing
Vertical 3:4, medium full shot from slightly above the knees, natural eye-level 50mm perspective. Place Seorin on one side with bright open space opposite her. One knee is loosely bent, her body reclined, gaze toward the empty room rather than the camera.

Seorin, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small slim oval face, soft V-line jaw, fair luminous skin, large clear dark brown almond eyes, subtle aegyo-sal, gently lifted eye corners, a small straight nose, naturally full soft pink lips, and long dark brown to soft black layered wavy hair with a center part and face-framing strands. Slender realistic feminine proportions and relaxed graceful posture. Pure white cotton sleeveless lounge maxi dress, clear semi-matte skin, light peach blush, transparent rosy-pink lips. Sleepy, peaceful, absent-minded expression.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere
Bright window light diffused through sheer curtains, low contrast, soft side shadow separating the dress from the sofa, natural peach warmth in her skin, visible pores, subtle grain, no plastic retouching.

## 8) Key Direction Points
The cool air and spacious quietness should be felt before the fashion. Suggest air-conditioning and delicate ice sounds. Avoid staged posing, strong blue grading, harsh shadows, overexposure, CGI appearance, or direct eye contact.

## 9) Watermark

She listens to their small metallic jingle and gives a restrained mischievous smile. The image connects hard clear acrylic, cold metal coins, soft skin, and rugged denim through sound and texture.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment
A small vintage wood-toned neighborhood coin laundromat at approximately 5 p.m. Circular washer doors and warm wooden surfaces form a softly recognizable background. No customers, staff, brand logos, posters, readable instructions, vending machines, detergent packages, or clutter.

## 4) Background and Props
Transparent acrylic coin wallet, realistic silver and brass-toned coins, deep navy sleeveless top, light-wash denim, circular washer doors, vintage wood surface, and a cream laundry basket softly visible behind her.

## 5) Camera Composition and Framing
Vertical 3:4 medium close-up from the waist or hips upward, 65mm portrait perspective. Include face, hand, clear wallet, and part of the denim outfit. Focus priority on overlapping coins and acrylic while keeping her eyes and expression recognizable. Slight natural displacement of coins, no dramatic blur. Her gaze is directed toward the wallet.

## 6) Model Expression
Seorin with her established luminous Korean features, long dark layered hair in a low ponytail, and soft face-framing strands. Slender realistic proportions. Deep navy sleeveless cropped top with a modest neckline and light-wash wide-leg denim. Natural semi-matte skin, muted dried-rose lips, fine brown eyeliner. Small playful smile inspired by the coin sound. One hand lightly shakes the wallet while the other rests naturally near her waist.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere
Neutral overhead light softened by warm late-afternoon daylight. Small controlled highlights on acrylic edges and coins. Preserve denim fibers, fingerprints, realistic hands, natural skin texture, casual grain, and moderate everyday color.

## 8) Key Direction Points
The viewer should imagine coins jingling inside clear acrylic. Keep the wallet coherent and coins naturally contained. Avoid floating coins, tossing coins, luxury handbag styling, exaggerated grin, direct eye contact, distorted fingers, excessive sparkle, commercial product composition, or oversaturated grading.

## 9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner. Helvetica Neue, thin or light weight, white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, softly blended.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story
At the end of her summer Sunday, Seorin sits near the bedroom window and listens to quiet lo-fi music from a fabric-covered wireless speaker. A bladeless fan moves cool air through the room, gently shifting thin curtains. She looks toward the darkening sky while the sounds of the day dissolve into a low soft bass line. The image observes her from a slight distance like the final quiet scene of a personal film.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment
A clean cream and light-gray bedroom at approximately 8 p.m. during blue hour. The sky outside shifts from muted coral to deep blue. A small warm bedside lamp softly illuminates part of the room. Vertical 3:4 environmental portrait, natural 50mm perspective. Place Seorin low or to one side, preserving generous negative space around the window and moving curtains. Include fan, speaker, bedding, and evening light without clutter. She sits near the window with one knee loosely raised, gaze toward the sky.

## 6) Model Expression
Seorin with her established luminous Korean features and long dark waves loosely released around her shoulders. Slender realistic proportions. Completely relaxed, quietly thoughtful expression. Arms rest naturally.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere
Blend cool blue-hour window light with a small warm bedside lamp. Keep her face visible and softly modeled. Let curtain edges and loose hair move gently. Preserve Portra 800-style warm skin, organic low-light grain, and smooth transitions between cool exterior and warm interior light.

## 8) Key Direction Points
The room should feel quiet enough to imagine the fan and low lo-fi bass. Make it a private evening observation, not a pajama ad. Avoid hidden facial detail, overtly romantic posing, exposed body, short sleepwear, luxury-suite styling, headphones, visible music interface, glowing phone, skyline drama, neon, or excessive orange-blue grading.

## 9) Watermark

cuts.title: 맞은편에 앉은 눈부신 사람
cuts.prompt:
## Cut 01 Prompt — The Radiant Woman Across the Table

## 1) Photo Style and Mood
An ultra-realistic cinematic romantic travel portrait photographed primarily on Kodak Portra 160, with subtle Kodak Vision3 250D latitude supporting the bright outdoor highlights. Use exceptionally fine analog grain, low contrast, clean pastel daylight, warm-neutral Korean skin tones, and smooth highlight rolloff. Preserve detail in the champagne silk, white linen skirt, pale stone pavement, and sunlit sky without an HDR appearance. The mood is luminous, intimate, and quietly exciting—the ordinary morning becomes unforgettable because the man sitting across from Suji cannot stop looking at her. Avoid vivid golden grading, orange skin, harsh contrast, blown white fabric, excessive background blur, digital sharpness, beauty-filter skin, fantasy sparkles, staged fashion posing, or an objective third-person viewpoint.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story
A beautiful young Korean woman named Suji sits at a small two-person outdoor café table in an old European square. She has been looking toward the open square. After noticing the arrival of the man traveling with her, she slowly turns her face toward him. She has not yet made full eye contact. A soft welcoming smile is only beginning to appear, as though she is about to say, “You’re here.” The camera represents the man’s real seated viewpoint.

## 3) Place · Time · Environment
A refined old European plaza between 8:30 and 9:30 in the morning. Muted terracotta brick buildings, weathered pale stone façades, cobblestones, and restrained outdoor café tables remain recognizable. No readable signs, menus, logos, flags, famous monuments, or identifiable city landmarks.

## 4) Background and Props
A small round café table with one clear crystal sparkling-water glass, a small transparent water bottle, folded white linen napkin, cream ceramic plate, and slender unbranded cutlery. The props feel naturally used rather than commercially arranged.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition
Vertical 3:4 composition. Camera at the natural eye level of a man seated directly across the table. Natural 50mm environmental portrait, framed from the waist upward. A softly blurred table edge appears along the bottom. Place Suji slightly right of center with open space on the left showing the square and brick architecture. Keep the background softly readable.

## 6) Model Expression
Suji is a beautiful young Korean woman with a slim oval face and delicate contours, elegant cat-like features, long almond-shaped eyes with subtly lifted outer corners, deep clear dark brown pupils, defined aegyo-sal, a small straight refined nose, and soft coral lips. Long glossy dark brown hair below the chest, natural layered cut, elegant loose S-wave curls, center or slightly off-center part, no bangs. Healthy, elegant, realistic feminine proportions and relaxed poised posture. She wears a champagne-gold silk sleeveless top, white linen long flared skirt, thin gold earrings, and a small cream leather shoulder bag. One forearm rests comfortably on the table; the other hand rests naturally on her skirt. Her lips begin to form an affectionate smile while her eyes still hover just beside the camera. Makeup: thin semi-glow base with visible skin texture, restrained highlight on upper cheekbones and nose bridge, soft brown brows, thin brown eyeliner, separated lashes, tiny champagne-beige inner-corner shimmer, light apricot blush, and warm coral-beige glossy lips. No over-whitening, glass skin, plastic texture, heavy contour, or thick foundation.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere
Low morning sunlight enters diagonally from behind Suji, creating a narrow rim light on her hair, shoulder, and silk top. The pale tabletop, cobblestones, and stone façades act as natural bounce sources. A tiny reflected light point from the crystal glass may touch her jawline or fingers, but no large random light pattern crosses her face.

## 8) Key Direction
The sunlight visually connects the rim of Suji’s hair, the shoulder line of her silk top, and the edge of the sparkling-water glass. The image must feel like a spontaneous moment discovered by someone who loves her, not a polished fashion campaign.

## 9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner. Use Helvetica Neue, thin or light weight, white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 잔 너머로 마주친 미소
cuts.prompt:
## Cut 02 Prompt — A Smile Caught Beyond the Glass

## 1) Photo Style and Mood
An ultra-realistic cinematic romantic café close-up photographed primarily on Kodak Portra 160 with restrained Kodak Vision3 250D highlight latitude. Use extremely fine analog grain, soft low contrast, warm-neutral skin, delicate pastel daylight, clean color separation, and smooth highlight rolloff. The mood is transparent, affectionate, and gently playful. Suji has realized that the man across from her has been staring and meets his gaze without becoming self-conscious. Avoid commercial beverage photography, exaggerated glass distortion, vivid gold color, orange skin, blown highlights, aggressive bokeh, artificial flare, fantasy glitter, strong facial light patterns, plastic skin, or seductive fashion posing.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story
Suji lifts a clear stemmed glass of sparkling water and is about to take a sip. Before the rim reaches her lips, she notices the man’s gaze and pauses. She looks directly toward the camera with a small knowing smile, as though quietly asking why he keeps looking at her. The gesture remains unhurried and natural.

## 3) Place · Time · Environment
A small outdoor café table in a historic European square during clear morning light between 8:30 and 9:30. Muted red-brick buildings, aged stone façades, café furniture, and cobblestones remain softly recognizable. No readable signs, menu text, branding, tourist markers, famous buildings, or city identifiers.

## 4) Background and Props
A transparent crystal sparkling-water glass with visible fine carbonation bubbles. A small unbranded water bottle, white linen napkin, cream plate, and slender metal cutlery remain subtly present. The glass must not cover Suji’s eyes, nose, or lips.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition
Vertical 3:4 composition. Camera at the seated eye level of the man across from Suji. An 85mm intimate portrait framed from the upper chest upward. Suji’s face is slightly three-quarter rather than perfectly frontal. The glass is held below chin level or slightly beside the lower face. Keep Suji’s eyes and the glass rim readable while the square remains softly recognizable.

## 6) Model Expression
Suji has a slim oval face, elegant cat-like contours, long almond-shaped dark brown eyes with subtly lifted outer corners, natural aegyo-sal, a refined small nose, and soft coral lips. Long glossy dark brown hair below the chest in loose layered S-wave curls, center or slightly off-center part, no bangs. She wears a champagne-gold silk sleeveless top, white linen long flared skirt, thin gold earrings, and a small cream leather shoulder bag. She holds the stem with her thumb and two fingers using minimal pressure. Her wrist and shoulders remain relaxed. Her eyes begin smiling first, followed by a restrained natural curve of the lips. She makes direct eye contact, but the expression feels familiar and affectionate rather than posed or provocative. Makeup: realistic thin semi-glow base, visible pores, restrained highlight, soft brown brows, fine brown eyeliner, separated lashes, tiny champagne inner-corner shimmer, light apricot blush, and coral-beige glossy lips. Avoid over-whitening, enlarged lip contours, wet glass skin, or airbrushed symmetry.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere
Low morning sunlight enters diagonally from behind and to the side. Create a thin rim light along her hair and shoulder. The crystal rim and carbonation bubbles catch several small, physically plausible points of sunlight. Light through the glass may create a faint transparent reflection along the lower jaw or silk top, but never a bright stripe over the center of the face. Natural bounce from the pale table and stone square softly illuminates both eyes.

## 8) Key Direction
Capture the exact instant between lifting the glass and taking a sip. Her direct eye contact should feel like a private acknowledgment between two travelers. Preserve distinct textures for skin, liquid, crystal, silk, brick, and stone.

## 9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner. Use Helvetica Neue, thin or light weight, white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

## Cut 03 Prompt — Morning Light Held Inside a Glass

## 1) Photo Style and Mood
An ultra-realistic cinematic romantic detail photograph captured primarily with Kodak Portra 160 softness and Kodak Vision3 250D daylight latitude. Use fine analog grain, restrained color, low contrast, delicate warm-neutral skin fragments, softly preserved crystal highlights, and natural optical refraction. The mood is intimate and lingering. The sparkling-water glass is meaningful only because it belongs to the shared moment between Suji and the man across from her. Avoid sterile product photography, centered catalogue composition, exaggerated refraction, impossible reflections, artificial sparkle particles, HDR clarity, blown glass highlights, excessive macro magnification, or an isolated glass.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story
A close detail of Suji’s hand immediately after she places her crystal sparkling-water glass back onto the table. Her fingertips slowly release the stem. Fine carbonation bubbles glow inside the water. The curved glass contains tiny distorted fragments of muted terracotta brick, white linen fabric, and the pale square. Suji’s softly smiling lips and jawline remain visible in the upper background.

## 3) Place · Time · Environment
An outdoor café in a historic European square during low clear morning sunlight. Muted brick architecture, old stone, and the cobblestone space remain suggested through reflections and soft background forms. No readable text, labels, logos, tourist signs, or identifiable landmarks.

## 4) Background and Props
Primary elements: clear crystal sparkling-water glass, fine visible carbonation bubbles, Suji’s natural fingers releasing the stem, white linen napkin, partial cream ceramic plate, and small fragments of champagne silk and white linen clothing. The table should look genuinely used rather than perfectly styled.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition
Vertical 3:4 composition. Camera follows the natural downward gaze of the man seated across the table. Use an 85–100mm close detail perspective. Focus on the glass stem, fingertips, carbonation bubbles, and delicate refracted reflections. Include only Suji’s softly smiling coral lips, jawline, and perhaps a loose strand of hair near the top. Keep the glass connected to Suji and the café environment rather than isolated as a product.

## 6) Model Expression
Suji is a beautiful young Korean woman with an elegant slim oval face, long cat-like dark brown eyes, a refined small nose, soft coral lips, and long glossy dark brown layered hair with loose S-wave curls, center or slightly off-center part, and no bangs. Only her hand, lips, jawline, and partial champagne-gold silk top are clearly visible. Her fingers are elegant but anatomically natural, with correct joints, realistic nail proportions, and a clean translucent nude manicure. She wears a champagne-gold silk sleeveless top, white linen long flared skirt, thin gold earrings, and a small cream leather shoulder bag. Her lips hold a restrained affectionate smile rather than a broad grin.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere
Low morning sunlight reaches the glass from a rear diagonal angle. Create three clearly distinguishable kinds of reflection: restrained points of light inside the carbonation bubbles, clean curved highlights along the crystal rim and stem, and a soft broad sheen across the champagne silk top. The white linen and pale stone table provide natural bounce. No fantasy rainbow, starburst, or digitally inserted flare.

## 8) Key Direction
The glass must function as a small container of the morning memory. Preserve the difference between sparkling liquid, hard crystal, smooth silk, soft skin, and woven linen. The frame should imply that the man briefly lowers his gaze to the glass but remains aware of Suji’s smile beyond it.

## 9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner. Use Helvetica Neue, thin or light weight, white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

## Cut 05 Prompt — A Gaze Caught While Hiding the Mirror

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

She is not presenting the mirror toward the camera. As she finishes adjusting her hair, her eyes drift toward the man with a calm, quiet smile. The emotional point is not a reflection, but the intimate feeling of catching her in a natural in-between moment.

## 3) Place · Time · Environment
A historic glass greenhouse with a curved dome roof, slender aged metal framework, large palms, ferns, gravel paths, stone planters, and a simple bench. Soft condensation remains visible on selected glass panels. No readable plaques, logos, signs, city names, famous structures, or tourist information.

## 4) Background and Props
A small silver-framed vintage hand mirror with restrained fine detailing. Important: the reflective mirror surface must not be visible to the camera at all. Only the elegant silver back, outer frame, or thin side edge may be seen. A large green plant may form a soft foreground edge on one side.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition
Vertical 3:4 composition. Camera at the standing eye level of the man, approximately one step away. Use an 85mm medium close-up. Compose Suji in a graceful three-quarter angle so her real face is fully readable. The hand mirror sits near the lower cheek or jawline, but its mirror face is turned completely away from camera. ## 6) Model Expression

She simply turns her face slightly toward the light while her gaze drifts softly upward or off to one side, as if quietly noticing the glass roof and plants. A classical old greenhouse with a curved glass dome, slender metal framing, large palms and ferns, aged stone planters, and broad diffused natural daylight. The visual elements are limited to Suji, the greenhouse structure, layered greenery, pale natural light, and the soft translucency of her organza sleeve. A stone planter or blurred foliage may appear in the background, but props remain minimal and secondary.

Vertical 3:4 composition. Camera follows the natural nearby gaze of the man standing beside Suji. Use an 85mm detail-oriented portrait. Frame Suji from the chest or waist upward, allowing her face, hair, shoulder line, and part of the pale blue organza sleeve to remain clearly visible. Keep the greenhouse dome and greenery softly readable. Do not crop so tightly that the environment disappears and do not create a commercial beauty close-up. The composition should feel breathable, natural, and gently intimate.

## 6) Model Expression
Suji is a beautiful young Korean woman with a slim oval face, delicate contours, elegant cat-like features, long almond-shaped eyes with subtly lifted outer corners, deep clear dark brown pupils, defined aegyo-sal, a small straight refined nose, and soft coral lips. Long glossy dark brown hair below the chest, natural layered cut, elegant loose S-wave curls, center or slightly off-center part, no bangs. ## Cut 07 Prompt — Walking Ahead Through the Sparkling River Light

## 1) Photo Style and Mood
An ultra-realistic cinematic romantic walking still photographed primarily on Kodak Vision3 250D, with the clean daylight refinement of CineStill 50D used only as subtle support. Use wide cinematic dynamic range, restrained saturation, fine analog grain, natural highlight rolloff, and clean separation between silver, white, blue-gray water, green trees, and realistic Korean skin. The mood is free, affectionate, and gently cinematic. Avoid teal-and-orange grading, mirror-like metallic fabric, blown water reflections, aggressive digital sharpness, runway posing, exaggerated stride, low camera angles, empty landscape photography, or fantasy glitter.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story
Suji walks two or three steps ahead of the man along a quiet riverside promenade. She holds transparent round-frame sunglasses loosely in one hand. Her other arm moves naturally with her stride. The fine metallic pleats of her skirt open and close softly with each step, echoing the moving reflections on the river. She looks slightly toward the water and does not look at the camera.

## 3) Place · Time · Environment
A calm river and lightly used pedestrian path between 3:00 and 4:00 in the afternoon. A pale gravel or stone walkway, low metal railing, gently moving grass, leafy trees, low buildings across the river, and one or two distant cyclists. Broad sunlight scatters across the water as realistic moving surface reflections. No readable signs, city names, flags, advertisements, logos, famous bridges, skylines, or landmarks.

## 4) Background and Props
Transparent acrylic round sunglasses with clear or lightly tinted lenses, and a small silver shoulder bag. The river reflection remains broad and physically varied rather than evenly spaced white dots.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition
Vertical 3:4 composition. Camera at the natural standing eye level of the man walking behind Suji. Use a 50mm or slightly wider environmental perspective. Frame Suji in a three-quarter-length or near full-body walking composition. Place her slightly off center and preserve a generous open area of sparkling river on the opposite side. Do not lower the camera below waist level. Keep the river, railing, path, and distant architecture recognizable.

## 6) Model Expression
Suji is a beautiful young Korean woman with a slim oval face, delicate elegant contours, long almond-shaped cat-like eyes with subtly lifted outer corners, deep clear dark brown pupils, defined aegyo-sal, a small straight refined nose, and soft coral lips. Long glossy dark brown hair below the chest in a natural layered cut with loose S-wave curls, center or slightly off-center part, no bangs. Healthy, realistic feminine proportions with a slim waist, graceful hips, long refined legs, and anatomically correct posture. She wears a white ribbed slim knit top, silver metallic pleated midi skirt woven with fine metallic thread, minimalist white or silver flat shoes, and a small silver shoulder bag. The skirt shimmers softly as the pleats change angle and must not behave like chrome, sequins, foil, or a mirror. Her body continues forward while her face turns slightly toward the river in a readable three-quarter rear view. Makeup: thin healthy semi-matte skin, subtle peach-coral blush, taupe-brown eye makeup, separated lashes, and transparent peach-rose lips.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere
Clear afternoon sunlight enters from behind and one side. Create natural edge light along the outer hair and moving skirt pleats. Bright sky and water provide broad reflected fill to keep the visible facial profile readable. River reflections vary in size and intensity according to distance and focus. The metallic skirt carries directional moving highlights that echo the water without matching it identically.

## 8) Key Direction
Suji should appear as though she is wearing the river’s light while walking. Keep the image candid, physically grounded, and emotionally warm. The man’s presence is communicated only through the following viewpoint.

## 9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner. Use Helvetica Neue, thin or light weight, white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

## Cut 08 Prompt — The Instant She Turns Back Laughing

## 1) Photo Style and Mood
An ultra-realistic cinematic Korean romance walking portrait photographed on Kodak Vision3 250D with subtle CineStill 50D daylight cleanliness. Use wide natural dynamic range, restrained color, fine analog grain, soft but readable facial detail, realistic motion, and smooth highlight rolloff. Suji is still walking along a riverside promenade. After hearing something from the man behind her, she slightly slows and looks back over one shoulder. Her lower body continues to face the direction of travel. Only her upper torso and face rotate gently toward the camera. She holds transparent round-frame sunglasses in one hand. A real laugh is just beginning, visible first in her eyes.

## 3) Place · Time · Environment
A quiet riverside path between 3:00 and 4:00 in the afternoon, with a low metal railing, pale path, softly moving grass, trees, low buildings across the water, and broad afternoon reflections. No readable text, signs, city names, famous bridges, logos, flags, advertisements, or identifiable landmarks.

## 4) Background and Props
Transparent acrylic round-frame sunglasses held naturally at her side and a small silver shoulder bag. The river behind her contains realistic varied highlights that become soft rounded bokeh according to depth without turning into decorative glitter.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition
Vertical 3:4 composition. Camera at the man’s natural walking eye level. Use an 85mm medium portrait framed from the thighs or waist upward. Place river reflections broadly behind Suji. Keep her face and eyes sharply readable while distant water reflections soften into restrained optical bokeh. Do not crop at awkward joints. Allow natural motion in the skirt and hair while preserving facial clarity.

## 6) Model Expression
Suji has a slim oval face, delicate elegant contours, long almond-shaped cat-like dark brown eyes, natural aegyo-sal, a refined small nose, soft coral lips, and long glossy dark brown hair below the chest in loose layered S-wave curls, center or slightly off-center part, no bangs. She wears a white ribbed slim knit top, silver metallic pleated midi skirt with fine metallic thread, minimalist white or silver flats, and a small silver shoulder bag. One hand holds the sunglasses loosely. Her hips and legs continue forward; her shoulders rotate only slightly and her neck remains anatomically relaxed. Hair ends move gently with the turn. She makes direct eye contact. Her eyes narrow slightly with genuine laughter and her lips are just beginning to open into a bright natural smile. ## 8) Key Direction
Capture movement, not a completed pose. The emotional evidence includes her still-forward lower body, gently turning shoulders, moving hair ends, smiling eyes, and unfinished rise of the lips. The frame should feel like the man caught the most lovable half-second of the walk.

## 9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner. Use Helvetica Neue, thin or light weight, white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

Long glossy dark brown hair below the chest in loose layered S-wave curls, center or slightly off-center part, no bangs, with most hair swept behind one shoulder. Elegant, healthy, naturally feminine hourglass proportions with a slim waist, graceful hips, balanced curves, long refined legs, and anatomically realistic posture. She wears a deep black halter-neck long dress woven with extremely fine glitter thread, flowing and refined rather than excessively tight, small diamond or crystal earrings, and one thin silver ring. One forearm rests comfortably on the table; the other hand stays near the coupe base. Her gaze remains lowered toward the table or glass. Her expression is calm, composed, and gently attentive. Makeup: thin natural satin base with visible skin texture, muted rose blush toward the outer cheekbones, restrained semi-smoky taupe brown and soft graphite, microscopic silver shimmer at the eyelid center, long separated lashes, and desaturated berry-brown glossy lips.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere
The table candle is visible but does not illuminate the entire face alone. Use a very soft warm diffused source above and opposite the camera to preserve Suji’s eyes, nose, lips, skin texture, and facial shape. Maintain faint neutral or cool fill on the shadow side so the black dress and dark hair remain separated from the background. The candle reflection passes through the coupe and creates a small rounded pool of light on the table. Tiny highlights continue into the glitter thread without turning the dress into sequins.

## 8) Key Direction
Visually reduce the importance of every other person without erasing the room. Suji does not dominate through performance or posing; she becomes the center because of focus, light, and the man’s gaze.

## 9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner. Use Helvetica Neue, thin or light weight, white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.prompt:
## Cut 14 Prompt — The Deep Gaze Above the Coupe

## 1) Photo Style and Mood
An ultra-realistic intimate Korean romance dining close-up photographed primarily on Kodak Portra 800 with subtle Kodak Vision3 500T shadow depth. Use warm natural low-light skin, softly visible analog grain, low contrast, gentle candle highlight rolloff, readable black fabric, and restrained amber interior color. Apply only an extremely subtle CineStill 800T-style amber-red halation around the smallest candle and pendant practical lights. The mood is confident, familiar, and deeply intimate. Avoid exaggerated seduction, provocative expression, dramatic chin tilt, bright orange skin, red neon, heavy smoky makeup, large candle flares, opaque shadows, glamour-commercial posing, or a glass covering the face.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story
Suji slowly lifts a thin champagne coupe from the table. Before the glass reaches her lips, she pauses and meets the gaze of the man sitting across from her. She does not laugh broadly or perform a flirtatious gesture. A very slow smile begins in her eyes and reaches her lips only afterward, as though silently saying, “I knew.”

## 3) Place · Time · Environment
An intimate fine-dining bar beneath old plaster or stone arches. Dark wooden tables, low ivory candles, restrained amber pendant lights, distant glass bottles, small metal objects, and softly blurred guests. No readable menu text, restaurant logo, bottle labels, signs, city identifiers, or recognizable venue details.

## 4) Background and Props
A thin transparent champagne coupe held below the chin or slightly beside the lower face. A low ivory candle and restrained amber pendant lights appear as small optical bokeh. The coupe must not obscure Suji’s eyes, nose, or lips.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition
Vertical 3:4 composition. Camera at the natural seated eye level of the man directly opposite Suji. Use an 85mm close portrait framed from the upper chest upward. Place Suji slightly off center. Keep both her dark brown eyes and the coupe rim readable through moderate depth of field. The coupe remains below chin level or beside the lower cheek. Background candle and pendant lights become restrained small circular bokeh rather than oversized decorative orbs.

## 6) Model Expression
Suji has a slim oval face, delicate elegant contours, long almond-shaped cat-like eyes with subtly lifted outer corners, deep clear dark brown pupils, defined natural aegyo-sal, a small straight refined nose, and soft coral lips. Long glossy dark brown hair below the chest in loose layered S-wave curls, center or slightly off-center part, no bangs, with one side swept behind her shoulder. Healthy, elegant, realistic feminine hourglass proportions. She wears a deep black halter-neck long dress woven with microscopic glitter thread, small diamond or crystal earrings, and a thin silver ring. She holds the coupe stem lightly between relaxed fingers. Her shoulders remain lowered and comfortable. Her chin angles only slightly downward. She looks directly into the camera with calm confidence and emotional familiarity. The smile begins as softened warmth in the eyes and reaches the lips slowly and slightly. Do not make her provocative, dominant, surprised, coy, or theatrical. Makeup: thin satin skin base with visible texture, muted rose blush, restrained taupe-brown and soft graphite semi-smoky eyes, microscopic silver shimmer at the eyelid center, long separated lashes, and desaturated berry-brown glossy lips.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere
Use a low candle as a practical foreground source, supported by very soft warm diffused light from above and opposite the camera. Add extremely faint neutral or cool shadow fill so the black dress, dark hair, and background remain separated. Create four small distinct highlights: natural catchlights in Suji’s eyes, a thin clear line along the coupe rim, a restrained point on the crystal earring, and microscopic scattered highlights in the black glitter-thread dress. Each highlight should have a different size and material response.

## 8) Key Direction
The emotional focus is the unbroken eye contact above the coupe. The glass remains secondary and never hides the expression. The image should feel like a private exchange occurring in a room full of people.

## 9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner. Use Helvetica Neue, thin or light weight, white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.prompt:
## Cut 15 Prompt — The Last Afterimage Inside the Candlelight

## 1) Photo Style and Mood
An ultra-realistic cinematic romantic dining detail portrait photographed primarily on Kodak Portra 800, supported by Kodak Vision3 500T for shadow detail and dimensional depth. Use warm low-light skin, visible but soft analog grain, restrained contrast, smooth candle highlight rolloff, clear glass refraction, and readable black fabric texture. Apply only extremely subtle CineStill 800T-style amber-red halation around the candle reflection and distant practical lights. The mood is final, intimate, and unforgettable. Avoid commercial glassware photography, opaque or exaggerated refraction, duplicated facial features, enormous candle bloom, red neon, strong orange grading, crushed black dress, fantasy glitter, seductive posing, or isolated product composition.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story
Suji has just placed a thin champagne coupe back onto the dark wooden table. One finger still rests lightly against the stem. A rounded candle reflection is refracted inside the bowl of the coupe. Beyond the glass, Suji’s dark brown eyes and quiet smile remain recognizable through a soft optical overlap. She continues to look toward the man across from her. The glass is not the subject by itself; it is a transparent layer through which the man holds onto the final expression of the evening.

## 3) Place · Time · Environment
An intimate private dining bar with old plaster or stone arches, dark wood tables, low ivory candles, restrained amber pendant lights, blurred glass bottles, and distant guests reduced to soft silhouettes. No readable menus, labels, logos, restaurant names, city names, signs, or identifiable location details.

## 4) Background and Props
A thin transparent champagne coupe, low ivory candle, dark linen napkin, small silver cutlery, partial slender water glass, Suji’s black glitter-thread dress, and one silver ring. The coupe has realistic thin glass thickness and natural optical distortion.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition
Vertical 3:4 composition. Camera at the close seated viewpoint of the man across the table. Use an 85–100mm intimate detail close-up. Give visual priority to the coupe rim, rounded candle reflection inside the bowl, and Suji’s fingertip touching the stem. Keep Suji’s eyes and lips sufficiently recognizable beyond the glass rather than dissolving them into complete blur. Allow one shoulder of the black dress and its restrained glitter texture to fill one side. Arrange the refracted candle, eye catchlight, and dress glitter as a subtle triangular visual structure. Do not center the coupe like a catalogue product.

## 6) Model Expression
Suji has a slim oval face, delicate elegant contours, long almond-shaped cat-like eyes with subtly lifted outer corners, deep clear dark brown pupils, natural aegyo-sal, a small straight refined nose, and soft coral lips. Long glossy dark brown hair below the chest in loose layered S-wave curls, center or slightly off-center part, no bangs, with one side swept behind the shoulder. She wears a deep black halter-neck long dress woven with microscopic glitter thread, small diamond or crystal earrings, and a thin silver ring. Her fingertip remains on the coupe stem immediately after setting the glass down. Her hand is anatomically correct, relaxed, and naturally proportioned, with translucent nude nails. Her eyes remain directed toward the camera. Her lips hold a restrained calm smile shared only with the man. The expression is affectionate and certain, never provocative, theatrical, or model-like. Makeup: thin natural satin base with visible skin texture, muted rose blush, restrained taupe-brown and soft graphite eye shading, microscopic silver shimmer at the eyelid center, separated lashes, and desaturated berry-brown glossy lips.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere
A low ivory candle creates a physically plausible rounded reflection inside the coupe. Support facial visibility with a very soft warm diffused source above and opposite the camera. Add only a trace of neutral or cool fill to preserve the edge between Suji’s dark hair, black dress, and background. Maintain three separated points of light: the warm refracted candle inside the coupe, the small neutral-warm catchlight inside Suji’s dark brown eye, and the fine scattered shimmer on the black glitter-thread dress. The lights form a subtle triangular composition without becoming graphic or artificial.

## 8) Key Direction
The glass, candle, and Suji’s expression remain connected as one emotional image. Keep the refraction believable and preserve recognizable facial anatomy through the glass. The result should feel like the final image retained by a man who cannot bring himself to look away. The viewer should feel, “I wish I were the person being remembered with that kind of gaze.”

## 9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner. Use Helvetica Neue, thin or light weight, white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.prompt:
### CUT 01 Prompt — The Woman Who Has Just Arrived

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic analog cinematic European travel portrait photographed on genuine Kodak Portra 160 120 color-negative film with a medium-format camera and professionally scanned through a Noritsu HS-1800 lab scanner.

Kodak Portra 160 must unmistakably define the entire image through exceptionally fine organic grain, low contrast, restrained pastel saturation, warm peach-ivory Korean skin, muted sky blue, creamy champagne highlights, softly open shadows, and delicate color separation between warm palace stone and cool garden air.

Expose at approximately EI 125 for a dense, clean negative while carefully protecting the pale palace stone and subtle silk highlights. Use softened analog edge acuity, restrained micro-contrast, smooth highlight rolloff, slightly compressed midtones, and naturally uneven film color density. Film grain must be integrated throughout skin, hair, silk, stone, glass, pavement, and greenery rather than appearing as a uniform digital noise overlay.

The image should feel like a genuine professionally scanned medium-format negative found years after a quiet European date, not a digitally perfect architectural fashion campaign.

Avoid orange grading, vivid blue fabric, yellow stone, HDR, crushed shadows, blown silk, artificial halation, exaggerated grain, hard sharpening, plastic skin, tourist-postcard symmetry, fantasy-palace styling, or formal runway posing.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Yulim has just arrived at the Orangery Palace in Sanssouci Park, Potsdam. The monumental central arch and long Renaissance-inspired palace façade appear first, while Yulim is discovered as a relatively small figure standing on the terrace axis.

She has stopped naturally after walking, with one foot still half a step ahead. An antique gold pocket watch hangs loosely from one lowered hand, while her other arm rests naturally beside her body. She has not stopped to pose; she has stopped because the size of the palace and the distant garden have caught her attention.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

The front terrace of the Orangery Palace in Potsdam, Germany, during a quiet early-summer morning between 8:10 and 9:10 a.m.

Include the cream-beige central arch, long horizontal palace structure, tall orangery windows, pale stone paving, restrained olive-green gardens, and clear but softly rendered morning air. No construction screens, modern signs, vehicles, close tourists, contemporary street furniture, or artificial fantasy architecture.

## 4) Background and Props

A monumental stone arch, long cream-beige palace walls, subtle reflections in tall orangery windows, pale paving, distant garden greenery, and soft architectural shadow.

Yulim holds an open antique gold pocket watch with classical engraved ornament and a short fine chain. The watch remains small and secondary, never presented toward the camera. No bouquet, parasol, handbag, furniture, or unrelated decorative objects.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition

Vertical 3:4 environmental full-body composition optimized for social media. Use a medium-format wide lens equivalent to approximately 30–35mm on full frame, photographed from natural standing height.

Place Yulim slightly away from the exact central axis of the arch and around one-third from the side of the frame. She occupies approximately 38–43 percent of the image height. Include generous foreground terrace pavement and uninterrupted architectural lines to establish scale and depth. Keep vertical lines controlled and believable without ultra-wide distortion.

Her body is turned approximately 25 degrees away from the camera. Her face remains visible in a gentle three-quarter angle. Her gaze travels toward the garden beyond the arch, never toward the lens.

## 6) Model Expression

Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with a soft oval face, clear fair peach-ivory skin, large gentle dark brown eyes with slightly downturned outer corners, a small natural nose, soft pink lips, and delicate natural facial features.

She has long layered dark ash-chocolate-brown hair falling below the chest, natural volume, soft C-curl waves at the ends, slightly asymmetric see-through bangs, and a relaxed 7:3 part.

Her body has healthy, elegant, realistic Korean proportions with naturally balanced feminine curves, a slim waist, graceful hips, and relaxed posture.

She wears a toned-down sky-blue silk sleeveless maxi dress with a softly draped low neckline, a relaxed H-line silhouette, and fabric that falls naturally without tightly outlining the body.

Her makeup is semi-matte and natural, with peach-ivory skin, muted rosy-beige eye makeup, softly defined eyes, subtle peach-pink cheeks, and rose-beige lips. Her expression shows calm curiosity rather than a smile.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Use low, soft morning sunlight arriving diagonally across the terrace. The light gently reveals the silk folds, facial planes, and architectural relief without dramatic rim lighting or hard shadows.

Maintain warm peach-ivory skin, muted sky-blue silk, cream and pale champagne stone, restrained antique gold, desaturated olive greenery, soft charcoal hair shadows, and pale-blue morning air. Preserve full detail in the silk dress, dark hair, arch shadows, glass, and stone.

The atmosphere is spacious, observant, intimate, and quietly expectant.

## 8) Key Direction

The visible evidence of Yulim’s emotion is the halted step, distant gaze, lowered watch, and large amount of space extending in the direction she is looking.

The photograph should feel as though her date walked several steps ahead, turned around, and discovered that Yulim had stopped to admire the palace. Yulim must not appear to dominate the architecture or perform for the camera.

Do not center her perfectly beneath the arch, spread the dress with either hand, display the pocket watch, or create a symmetrical tourist photograph.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.prompt:
### CUT 02 Prompt — A Voice Slows the Clock

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic analog romantic travel portrait photographed on genuine Kodak Portra 160 120 color-negative film with a medium-format camera and professionally scanned through a Noritsu HS-1800 lab scanner.

Portra 160 must dominate the image through extremely fine organic grain, soft peach Korean skin, muted pastel blue, creamy stone, restrained saturation, low contrast, gentle highlight rolloff, and open shadow detail.

Expose at approximately EI 125, carefully protecting the silk neckline, fair skin, pale stone, and subtle reflections in the arched glass window. Use softened analog edge definition, natural medium-format depth, restrained micro-contrast, smooth midtone transitions, and slight color-density variation associated with a real developed negative.

The grain must remain subtle but visible throughout the skin, hair, silk, window glass, and stone rather than sitting on top of the photograph.

Avoid orange skin, intense cyan-blue silk, over-pink skin, HDR, hard sharpening, plastic beauty skin, digital clarity, shallow-focus studio aesthetics, heavy vignetting, artificial dust, excessive bloom, exaggerated halation, or product photography.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Yulim stands near a tall arched orangery window while checking an open antique pocket watch held below her waist.

Someone near the camera has just asked her a question. The photograph captures the exact middle of her reaction: her chin is beginning to rise from the watch, and her eyes are moving toward the person beside the lens. A tiny smile has only just started at the corners of her lips.

The watch explains why her gaze was lowered, but Yulim’s changing expression remains the unmistakable subject of the photograph.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

An exterior arched-window section of the Orangery Palace in Sanssouci Park, Potsdam, during a quiet early-summer morning.

The environment includes warm cream-beige stone, a recognizable rounded arch, softly reflective orangery glass, pale pavement, and restrained garden greenery. The historic location remains visible but never overwhelms Yulim’s face.

No construction materials, close tourists, modern signs, vehicles, artificial palace interiors, or theatrical period decoration.

## 4) Background and Props

A softly rendered arched glass window occupies the background without forming a perfect halo directly behind Yulim’s head.

The antique gold pocket watch remains open below her waist, with a fine chain falling naturally. The engraved details are present but not sharply emphasized. No table, chair, flowers, handbag, or additional accessories.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition

Vertical 3:4 medium portrait framed from the upper thighs upward. Use a medium-format portrait lens equivalent to approximately 75–85mm on full frame, photographed close to Yulim’s natural eye level.

Place her slightly off-center so the arched window remains readable beside her rather than perfectly enclosing her head. Her torso is turned approximately 30 degrees away from the camera. Her shoulders and neck remain relaxed.

One hand holds the open watch below the waist, while the other hand rests naturally without a refined hand pose. Her gaze is directed just below or beside the lens, immediately before full eye contact.

Use moderate depth of field around f/4.5–f/5.6 equivalent so her face is clear while the palace location remains recognizable.

## 6) Model Expression

Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with a soft oval face, clear fair peach-ivory skin, large gentle dark brown eyes with slightly downturned outer corners, a small natural nose, soft pink lips, and delicate natural features.

She has long layered dark ash-chocolate-brown hair below the chest, soft C-curl ends, natural volume, slightly asymmetric see-through bangs, and a relaxed 7:3 part.

She has healthy and realistic Korean body proportions with soft balanced curves, a slim waist, graceful body lines, and a relaxed elegant silhouette.

She wears a toned-down sky-blue silk sleeveless maxi dress with a softly draped neckline and relaxed H-line shape.

Her makeup is natural and semi-matte, using low-saturation rosy beige around the eyes, subtle peach cheeks, and rose-beige lips. Her expression is caught between concentration and recognition. Her eyebrows remain relaxed, her eyes begin to brighten, and a small smile emerges only after hearing the photographer’s voice.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Use soft reflected morning light from the pale palace terrace. A gentle side light shapes her face and creates a controlled silk sheen without producing hot highlights.

Maintain peach-ivory skin, muted sky blue, creamy champagne stone, restrained antique gold, soft dark-brown hair, and subdued olive-green reflections. The shadow side of her hair, eyes, neckline, and dress must remain detailed.

The atmosphere is intimate, unhurried, and quietly playful, as though time has briefly slowed during the conversation.

## 8) Key Direction

The emotional evidence is the half-raised chin, eyes shifting away from the watch, and tiny delayed smile. The image must feel like a spontaneous reaction rather than a planned portrait.

Do not raise the pocket watch to chest or face level. Do not make Yulim stare directly into the lens, close her eyes dramatically, straighten her shoulders like a classical painted portrait, or present the watch as a luxury product.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

### CUT 03 Prompt — Waiting Beyond the Arch

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic analog cinematic walking portrait photographed on genuine Kodak Portra 160 120 color-negative film with a medium-format camera and professionally scanned through a Noritsu HS-1800 lab scanner.

Kodak Portra 160 must visibly shape the photograph through fine natural grain, low contrast, muted pastel blue, peach-ivory Korean skin, creamy stone, soft champagne highlights, restrained olive green, and smooth tonal transitions.

Expose at approximately EI 125 to preserve the subtle shine of the sky-blue silk dress while retaining detail in the palace windows, shaded arches, dark hair, and terrace floor. Use softened analog edge acuity, moderate architectural definition, restrained micro-contrast, gentle color compression, and slight variation in scan density.

The frame must feel like an authentic medium-format travel negative rather than a hyper-clean digital fashion image.

Avoid vivid blue, orange grading, blown silk, crushed arch shadows, excessive background blur, hard sharpening, plastic skin, large lens flare, exaggerated wind, dramatic hair movement, theatrical turning poses, or commercial tourism styling.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Yulim walks slowly along the palace terrace, moving away from the photographer.

She notices that the person walking with her has fallen slightly behind and turns only her upper body to check their position. The turn is incomplete and casual. Her body continues in the walking direction while her face becomes visible in a clear three-quarter angle.

Her expression quietly suggests, “Are you still coming?”

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

The long exterior terrace and arcade of the Orangery Palace in Potsdam during a quiet early-summer morning.

Include repeated cream-beige arches, tall orangery windows, a long horizontal façade, pale terrace paving, and muted garden greenery. The palace must remain recognizable and provide directional depth.

No dense crowds, modern barriers, construction screens, vehicles, commercial signage, or fantasy architecture.

## 4) Background and Props

The background features a long progression of arches and glass windows extending into the open side of the frame.

Yulim holds a small antique gold pocket watch loosely at thigh level in one hand. The watch remains secondary and does not face the camera. The other arm moves naturally with her step.

No additional props, flowers, bags, or furniture.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition

Vertical 3:4 environmental full-body composition with a spacious horizontal feeling created inside the vertical frame.

Use a medium-format lens equivalent to approximately 55–70mm on full frame. Place Yulim along one vertical third of the composition and leave open architectural space in the direction she is walking.

Capture her during a small natural step, with one foot just leaving or approaching the ground. Her torso turns only enough to reveal roughly two-thirds of her face. Her eyes pass just beside the lens rather than locking directly onto it.

Keep the palace windows, arches, and terrace sufficiently sharp to preserve the location. Avoid extreme shallow depth of field.

## 6) Model Expression

Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with a soft oval face, clear fair peach-ivory skin, large gentle dark brown eyes with slightly downturned outer corners, a small natural nose, soft pink lips, and delicate features.

She has long layered dark ash-chocolate-brown hair below the chest, soft C-curl waves, natural volume, slightly asymmetric see-through bangs, and a 7:3 part.

Her physique is healthy and realistic, with naturally balanced Korean proportions, a slim waist, graceful hips, and elegant relaxed posture.

She wears a toned-down sky-blue silk sleeveless maxi dress with a softly draped neckline and relaxed H-line silhouette. Her hair moves only slightly with her walking motion and never covers her eyes or most of her face.

Her makeup remains natural, peach-ivory, semi-matte, and softly rosy. Her expression shows light reassurance and quiet amusement. Her lips hold a barely visible smile.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Use gentle early-morning side light with soft reflections from the pale stone terrace. Allow the dress to catch only narrow bands of subdued silk sheen.

Maintain muted sky blue, warm cream stone, peach-ivory skin, soft charcoal-brown shadows, restrained antique gold, and low-saturation olive greenery.

The atmosphere should feel airy, calm, and quietly romantic, with the sense that the afternoon journey has only begun.

## 8) Key Direction

The emotional evidence is the unfinished turn, continued walking direction, and glance passing beside the camera. The photograph must feel like the date partner briefly called Yulim from behind.

Do not stop her in a completed fashion pose. Do not twist her waist sharply, make the dress swirl, create dramatic hair flipping, show a complete back view, or obscure her facial identity.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.
