### CUT 04 Prompt — Walking After the Last Sentence

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic analog editorial travel portrait photographed on genuine Kodak Portra 400 120 color-negative film with a medium-format camera and professionally scanned through a Noritsu HS-1800 lab scanner.

Kodak Portra 400 must clearly define the frame through warm-neutral Korean skin, softly visible organic grain, wide exposure latitude, muted olive and khaki tones, creamy white fabric, restrained contrast, smooth highlight rolloff, and detailed open shadows.

Expose at approximately EI 320 to create a dense negative with protected white-shirt highlights and complete texture in the khaki trousers, dark hair, shaded arcade, and distant garden. Use softened analog edge acuity, restrained micro-contrast, subtle color-density variation, natural warm-cool separation, and film grain integrated throughout skin, cotton poplin, leather, stone, foliage, and shaded air.

The image must feel like a real medium-format film snapshot made while walking through a quiet palace arcade, not a digitally sharp fashion catalogue.

Avoid green skin, yellow-white clothing, HDR, crushed shadows, blown shirt highlights, harsh contrast, excessive grain, fake vintage fading, strong orange grading, plastic skin, runway walking, or unrealistic reading while moving.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Yulim walks slowly through a long shaded arcade while holding an open brown leather-covered journal in one hand.

She is not actively reading every word while walking. Her eyes have lifted slightly beyond the page toward the corridor ahead, as though she is thinking about a sentence she has just read.

The photographer walks several steps behind her in the same direction. She appears comfortable with the shared silence and does not visibly perform for the camera.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

An exterior arcade beside the Orangery Palace in Potsdam during a quiet early-summer morning between approximately 9:20 and 10:30 a.m.

Include a long rhythm of stone arches, large classical planters, shaded cream-beige architecture, glimpses of orangery glass, and brighter restrained greenery outside the arcade. The scene should convincingly function as an exterior alternative to a historic greenhouse corridor.

No modern signs, maintenance equipment, construction screens, dense visitors, artificial indoor conservatory effects, or fantasy vegetation.

## 4) Background and Props

Repeated arches and large classical planters continue behind Yulim, creating depth and a measured visual rhythm.

She carries an open English-language journal with a brown leather cover. The journal remains around waist level and is only partially open. The page text is not legible and must not become the image’s focal point.

No handbag, flower bouquet, coffee cup, or additional stationery.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition

Vertical 3:4 full-body walking composition. Use a medium-format normal lens equivalent to approximately 45–55mm on full frame, photographed from several steps behind Yulim.

Place her slightly away from the center and leave visual space in the direction she is walking. The arches and planters continue naturally behind and beside her.

Capture a relaxed walking moment with a modest stride, one foot approaching the ground, and the free arm moving naturally. Her head is slightly lowered, but her eyes look ahead rather than directly at the page.

Use moderate depth of field around f/5.6 equivalent so the architecture remains recognizable.

## 6) Model Expression

Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with a soft oval face, clear fair skin, large gentle dark brown eyes, slightly downturned outer corners, a small natural nose, soft pink lips, and delicate facial features.

She has long layered dark ash-chocolate-brown hair below the chest, soft C-curl ends, natural volume, slightly asymmetric see-through bangs, and a relaxed 7:3 part.

Her body has healthy and realistic Korean proportions, a slim waist, graceful hips, naturally balanced curves, and an elegant but unforced silhouette.

She wears an oversized white cotton-poplin shirt with casually uneven rolled sleeves ending below the elbows, paired with khaki high-waisted pleated wide-leg trousers falling close to the tops of her shoes. The shirt is relaxed rather than perfectly tucked or styled.

Her makeup is natural peach-ivory with muted rosy-beige eyes and soft rose-beige lips. Her expression is neutral, comfortable, and quietly thoughtful without exaggerated sadness, concentration, or seriousness.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Use soft shaded arcade light supported by brighter reflected daylight from the garden side.

Maintain cream-white poplin, khaki and muted olive, brown leather, warm beige stone, peach-ivory skin, dark ash-brown hair, and restrained deep-green plants. Protect every highlight in the white shirt and retain full texture in the trousers and shaded hair.

The atmosphere feels calm, intelligent, unhurried, and emotionally comfortable.

## 8) Key Direction

The visible evidence of thought is her lifted gaze, the partially open journal, and the slowed walking pace. The scene must show someone considering a sentence rather than unrealistically reading while walking.

Do not hold the journal near her face. Do not use a strong runway stride, dramatic contemplative eyebrows, perfectly arranged clothing, direct eye contact, or fashion-campaign posture.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

### CUT 05 Prompt — The Voice That Stopped the Sentence

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic analog lifestyle portrait photographed on genuine Kodak Portra 400 120 color-negative film with a medium-format camera and professionally scanned through a Noritsu HS-1800 lab scanner.

Portra 400 must dominate through soft peach Korean skin, natural but visible fine grain, wide latitude between the shaded arcade and brighter garden, creamy shirt highlights, muted khaki midtones, restrained olive green, open dark hair, and smooth tonal compression.

Expose at approximately EI 320 and scan with slightly warm Noritsu density while avoiding pink or orange skin. Use softened analog edge definition, low-to-moderate contrast, restrained micro-contrast, gentle highlight rolloff, and naturally imperfect color density.

Film grain must remain integrated into the cotton shirt, skin, leather journal, stone columns, planter surfaces, and foliage.

Avoid HDR, green skin, blown white clothing, crushed dark hair, high-fashion sharpness, excessive bokeh, artificial film scratches, oversized grain, heavy orange grading, closed-eye contemplation, or sentimental book-hugging poses.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Yulim has stopped between two large planters in a shaded palace arcade.

She supports an open brown leather-covered journal below her chest with both hands. The person near the camera has asked what she was reading.

Her head has just lifted from the page, and her face begins to soften as she returns from private thought to the shared conversation.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

A long exterior arcade at the Orangery Palace in Potsdam during a quiet early-summer morning.

Repeated cream-beige arches and classical planters create a recognizable rhythm, while brighter garden greenery remains visible beyond the shaded corridor. The environment should feel historic, calm, and realistically accessible from an exterior walkway.

No artificial library interior, modern signage, construction equipment, close tourists, or excessively lush fantasy plants.

## 4) Background and Props

Large planters and repeated arches are compressed softly behind Yulim.

The brown leather journal is open below chest height. Its pages and cover are visible without readable writing or branding. No pen is required in this frame.

No additional accessories, bags, flowers, coffee, or furniture.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition

Vertical 3:4 medium portrait framed from slightly above the knees upward. Use a medium-format portrait lens equivalent to approximately 75–85mm on full frame.

Photograph from Yulim’s eye level while maintaining a comfortable conversational distance. Place her slightly away from the center so the repeated arches remain visible beside and behind her.

Her torso is turned around 25–30 degrees rather than facing the camera directly. Her gaze lands just beside the lens, toward the photographer’s face. The journal remains below her chest and occupies only a small part of the lower frame.

Use moderate depth of field so the architectural rhythm remains readable.

## 6) Model Expression

Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with a soft oval face, fair peach-ivory skin, large gentle dark brown eyes with slightly lowered outer corners, a small natural nose, soft pink lips, and delicate approachable features.

She has long layered dark ash-chocolate-brown hair below the chest, natural volume, softly curled ends, slightly asymmetric see-through bangs, and a relaxed 7:3 part.

Her figure is healthy, elegant, and realistic, with naturally balanced Korean proportions, a slim waist, graceful hips, and relaxed posture.

She wears an oversized white poplin shirt with irregularly rolled sleeves and khaki high-waisted pleated wide trousers.

Her makeup is semi-matte with muted rose-beige eyes, soft peach cheeks, and natural rose-beige lips. Her expression begins neutral, then loosens only at the corners of her mouth. Her eyes show that she has recognized the photographer’s voice.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Use soft open shade with gentle reflected daylight entering from the garden side.

The white shirt remains creamy rather than blue or yellow. Maintain peach-ivory skin, muted khaki, brown leather, warm beige stone, restrained olive green, and soft charcoal-brown hair shadows. Keep the eyes luminous and the hair separated from the dark foliage.

The atmosphere is quiet, intelligent, comfortable, and subtly affectionate.

## 8) Key Direction

The emotional evidence is the raised head, relaxed shoulders, and delayed softening of the mouth. The scene represents a conversation resuming after a comfortable silence.

Do not make her hug the journal, close her eyes, smile broadly in advance, raise the book near her face, or pose symmetrically between the arches.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

### CUT 06 Prompt — The Note She Did Not Finish

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic analog cinematic portrait photographed on genuine Kodak Portra 400 120 color-negative film with a medium-format camera and professionally scanned through a Noritsu HS-1800 lab scanner.

Kodak Portra 400 must visibly define the photograph through warm peach-ivory Korean skin, fine organic grain, open shadows, smooth highlight rolloff, restrained olive and brown tones, creamy white cotton, natural low contrast, and wide dynamic range between the shaded arcade and bright garden.

Expose at approximately EI 320 to preserve the white shirt while retaining detail in Yulim’s eyes, dark hair, khaki trousers, leather journal, and shaded architecture. Use softened film edge acuity, moderate medium-format clarity, restrained micro-contrast, gentle tonal compression, and subtle variations in color density.

The image must resemble a genuine Noritsu-scanned medium-format portrait, not a digitally polished beauty photograph with an added film preset.

Avoid green skin, blown shirt highlights, crushed dark hair, HDR, strong vignette, oversized grain, heavy orange grading, artificial halation, floating particles, excessive foreground blur, hand-detail product photography, or unreadable facial features.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Yulim stands in a quiet exterior arcade while supporting an open brown leather-covered journal in one hand.

A pen is held above the page, but the tip has stopped before completing the note. Her head remains slightly lowered, yet her eyes have lifted from the page toward the person standing near the camera.

This is a clear but gentle moment of eye contact, suggesting that her attention has moved from the private note back to the shared date.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

A shaded exterior arcade beside the Orangery Palace in Potsdam during a calm early-summer morning.

Repeated arches, large classical planters, cream-beige stone, glimpses of orangery glass, and brighter muted greenery identify the historic palace environment.

Yulim remains standing and does not lean against a wall, window ledge, planter, or column. No modern signage, furniture, construction equipment, or crowded tourist activity.

## 4) Background and Props

Yulim holds an open brown leather journal around waist level and a simple dark pen above the page. The pen remains paused rather than actively writing. The journal text must not be legible.

A few out-of-focus leaves may appear along one edge of the foreground but must never cover Yulim’s eyes, nose, lips, or most of her face.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition

Vertical 3:4 waist-up portrait. Use a medium-format portrait lens equivalent to approximately 85–105mm on full frame.

Photograph from natural eye level with a slightly compressed architectural background. Place Yulim off-center while preserving enough visible arch and planter shape to identify the location.

Her head tilts slightly downward, but her eyes rise directly toward the photographer. The journal remains in the lower part of the frame and does not dominate the composition.

Use moderate depth of field around f/4–f/5.6 equivalent, keeping both eyes sharply readable while allowing the architecture to soften gently.

## 6) Model Expression

Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with a soft oval face, clear fair peach-ivory skin, large gentle dark brown eyes with subtly downturned outer corners, a small natural nose, soft pink lips, and delicate features.

She has long layered dark ash-chocolate-brown hair below the chest, natural volume, soft C-curl ends, slightly asymmetric see-through bangs, and a relaxed 7:3 part.

Her figure has healthy and realistic Korean proportions, naturally balanced feminine curves, a slim waist, graceful hips, and elegant relaxed posture.

She wears a loose white poplin shirt with unevenly rolled sleeves and khaki high-waisted pleated wide-leg trousers.

Her makeup is natural and semi-matte with soft rosy-beige eyes, subtle peach cheeks, and muted rose-beige lips. Her expression is calm and open. Her gaze is clear, gentle, and attentive, with only the slightest suggestion of a smile.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Use soft open shade with reflected light entering from the brighter garden side. Create a subtle catchlight in her dark brown eyes without artificial studio lighting.

Maintain creamy white, muted khaki, brown leather, warm beige stone, restrained olive green, soft peach skin, and dark charcoal-brown hair. Preserve the shirt fabric, page texture, facial detail, and deep hair shadows.

The atmosphere is intimate, thoughtful, and quietly connected.

## 8) Key Direction

The emotional evidence is the pen stopped above the page and Yulim’s eyes lifting while her chin remains lowered. The camera must prioritize her eyes and expression rather than the journal or pen.

Do not photograph only her hands. Do not make the text readable, place a mirror-like reflection near her face, cover her eyes with leaves, or create a dramatic seductive gaze.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

### CUT 07 Prompt — Approaching Through the Arcade

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic analog romantic fashion-lifestyle portrait photographed on genuine Kodak Portra 160 120 color-negative film with a medium-format camera and professionally scanned through a Noritsu HS-1800 lab scanner.

Portra 160 must unmistakably shape the frame through exceptionally fine organic grain, low contrast, peach-ivory Korean skin, cream-infused pale pink, softly detailed black fabric, warm-gray stone, restrained lemon yellow, muted herb green, and gentle highlight rolloff.

Expose at approximately EI 125 while preserving the pale chiffon pleats, black sleeveless top, reflective crystal glass, and shaded arcade. Use softened analog edge acuity, restrained micro-contrast, smooth tonal compression, subtle color-density variation, and medium-format depth without clinical digital sharpness.

Avoid magenta-pink clothing, crushed black fabric, blown stone, vivid lemon, green skin, HDR, hard sharpening, oversized grain, artificial vintage fading, runway walking, dramatic skirt movement, or beverage-advertising composition.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Yulim walks slowly along a long Renaissance-style stone arcade toward the person waiting near the camera.

She carries a transparent crystal long-drink glass low in one hand. Her other arm moves naturally with her steps. She is not making a fashion entrance; she is simply rejoining the person who walked ahead and waited at the far end of the arcade.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

A long stone arcade at the Orangery Palace in Potsdam during a bright early-summer afternoon between approximately 3:30 and 4:40 p.m.

Yulim remains in the soft shade of the arcade while the garden beyond the arches holds brighter afternoon light. Include repeated cream-beige columns, rounded arches, warm-gray stone paving, and restrained green garden glimpses.

No close tourists, construction screens, modern signs, furniture, fantasy decorations, or excessive flowers.

## 4) Background and Props

The repeated arches create strong depth and a clear walking direction.

Yulim holds a transparent crystal long-drink glass below hip level. Inside the glass is a pale clear drink with one small lemon slice and a few restrained herb leaves. The drink remains a minor story detail and never becomes brightly lit or commercially styled.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition

Vertical 3:4 full-body walking portrait. Use a medium-format lens equivalent to approximately 55–70mm on full frame.

Position the photographer at the opposite end of the arcade and place Yulim slightly away from the central architectural axis. Capture her during a natural moderate step with relaxed shoulders and a small stride.

Keep the arches extending deeply behind her while ensuring her head does not overlap an arch boundary. Her gaze passes slightly beside the camera toward the waiting person.

Use moderate depth of field so both Yulim and the repeated architecture remain readable.

## 6) Model Expression

Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with a soft oval face, fair peach-ivory skin, large gentle dark brown eyes with slightly downturned outer corners, a small natural nose, soft pink lips, and delicate approachable features.

She has long layered dark ash-chocolate-brown hair below the chest, soft C-curl waves, natural volume, slightly asymmetric see-through bangs, and a relaxed 7:3 part.

Her figure has realistic and naturally balanced Korean proportions, a slim waist, graceful hips, healthy feminine curves, and relaxed elegant posture.

She wears a neat square-neck matte-black sleeveless top and a cream-infused pale-pink chiffon pleated midi skirt falling below the knees. The black top retains visible fabric texture rather than becoming a solid black shape.

Her makeup uses semi-matte peach-ivory skin, muted rose-beige eyes, subtle peach cheeks, and soft muted coral lips. Her expression is relaxed with a nearly invisible smile.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Use soft directional shade inside the arcade, supported by warm reflected light from the stone and brighter daylight outside. Allow gentle side illumination on Yulim’s face and a few pale-pink pleats.

Maintain peach-ivory skin, cream-pale pink, soft textured black, warm beige and gray stone, restrained lemon yellow, muted herb green, and detailed dark-brown hair.

The atmosphere is elegant, romantic, quiet, and naturally anticipatory.

## 8) Key Direction

The emotional evidence is the direction of her walk, her gaze passing beside the camera, and the person-like distance between Yulim and the lens.

She must look like someone slowly joining her date, not a model entering a runway. Do not raise the drink to face level, hold the skirt, spin the pleats, exaggerate the stride, center her rigidly, or create a cold editorial expression.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

### CUT 08 Prompt — The Reason She Suddenly Smiled

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic analog romantic lifestyle portrait photographed on genuine Kodak Portra 160 120 color-negative film with a medium-format camera and professionally scanned through a Noritsu HS-1800 lab scanner.

Kodak Portra 160 must define the image through extremely fine integrated grain, soft peach Korean skin, restrained pastel color, creamy pale pink, detailed soft black, warm stone, low contrast, smooth highlight rolloff, and delicate tonal transitions.

Expose at approximately EI 125 to preserve Yulim’s face, black sleeveless top, pale chiffon pleats, crystal glass, and bright exterior garden. Use softened analog edge definition, restrained micro-contrast, subtle Noritsu warmth, gentle midtone compression, and natural variation in color density.

The photograph should feel like an authentic candid medium-format negative captured immediately after a private joke.

Avoid exaggerated laughter, visible teeth dominating the expression, magenta pink, crushed black clothing, vivid drink ingredients, orange grading, HDR, excessive grain, strong bokeh, theatrical posing, seductive body language, or commercial drink photography.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Yulim has paused between two stone columns in a shaded palace arcade.

The photographer has said something from just outside the frame. She turns her head slightly toward the voice, and her eyes soften before a small genuine smile reaches her lips.

She continues to hold the crystal glass low near her hip. The photograph captures the first warm release of laughter rather than a fully performed smile.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

A Renaissance-inspired stone arcade at the Orangery Palace in Potsdam during a bright early-summer afternoon.

Yulim stands in soft shade while the garden beyond the arches remains brighter and softly luminous. Include cream-beige columns, rounded arches, warm-gray stone, and restrained greenery.

No artificial studio backdrop, fantasy flowers, crowded tourists, construction equipment, or modern café furniture.

## 4) Background and Props

One stone column enters softly along the edge of the foreground, creating the impression that the photographer has discovered Yulim between architectural elements. Repeated arches continue behind her.

A transparent crystal long-drink glass remains below waist level, containing a pale drink, one small lemon slice, and restrained herb leaves. The glass appears only in the lower area of the composition.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition

Vertical 3:4 medium portrait framed from slightly above the knees upward. Use a medium-format portrait lens equivalent to approximately 75–85mm on full frame.

Photograph from Yulim’s eye level at a naturally intimate conversational distance. Her body is turned approximately 30 degrees to one side, and her head turns slightly farther toward the photographer.

Place a blurred column along one edge without covering any part of her face. Her gaze is directed toward the photographer’s face rather than fixed formally into the lens.

Use moderate depth of field so the repeated arches remain recognizable.

## 6) Model Expression

Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with a soft oval face, clear fair peach-ivory skin, large gentle dark brown eyes with subtly lowered outer corners, a small natural nose, soft pink lips, and delicate natural features.

She has long layered dark ash-chocolate-brown hair below the chest, natural volume, soft C-curl ends, slightly asymmetric see-through bangs, and a relaxed 7:3 part.

Her figure has healthy, graceful, realistic Korean proportions with naturally balanced curves, a slim waist, elegant hips, and relaxed posture.

She wears a square-neck matte-black sleeveless top and a cream-infused pale-pink chiffon pleated midi skirt.

Her makeup is semi-matte and natural with low-saturation rose-beige eyes, soft peach cheeks, and muted coral lips.

Her expression is the warmest smile in the series, but it remains small and believable. Her eyes soften first, followed by the corners of her lips. Her mouth does not open widely.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Use soft open shade with reflected warm stone light illuminating her face. A gentle catchlight remains in both eyes.

Maintain warm peach-ivory skin, creamy pale pink, textured soft black, warm beige stone, restrained lemon and herb accents, and open dark-brown hair shadows.

The atmosphere is intimate, naturally romantic, light, and emotionally central.

## 8) Key Direction

The visible evidence of affection is the softened eye shape, delayed smile, turned head, and relaxed shoulders. The image must feel as though the photographer caused the smile rather than requested it.

Do not raise the glass, pose against or touch the column, exaggerate the laugh, lean the body seductively, or create a beverage advertisement.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

### CUT 09 Prompt — The Afternoon Passing Beyond the Arch

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic analog cinematic side portrait photographed on genuine Kodak Portra 160 120 color-negative film with a medium-format camera and professionally scanned through a Noritsu HS-1800 lab scanner.

Portra 160 must visibly control the photograph through exceptionally fine organic grain, low contrast, natural peach-ivory Korean skin, cream-pale pink, softly detailed black fabric, warm-gray stone, restrained greenery, and smooth highlight rolloff.

Expose at approximately EI 125 and meter for Yulim’s face so she remains in the middle tones while the bright garden outside the arcade retains soft detail. Use softened analog edge acuity, restrained micro-contrast, gradual shadow transitions, natural highlight compression, and subtle color-density variation.

Avoid silhouette, crushed facial shadows, blown exterior light, vivid pink, green skin, HDR, large lens flare, rainbow refraction, artificial glass effects, hard sharpening, plastic skin, or complete anonymous profile.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Yulim stands inside the shade of a Renaissance-style arcade and looks through an open arch toward the bright garden.

Her body remains within the cooler shadow while a narrow band of soft angled light reaches part of her face and the lower portion of her pale-pink skirt. She holds a transparent crystal long-drink glass low beside her body.

The scene is a brief quiet pause after the warmest conversation of the afternoon.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

A stone arcade at the Orangery Palace in Potsdam during a late early-summer afternoon between approximately 3:30 and 4:40 p.m.

Include the darker arcade interior, a recognizable rounded arch, warm cream-beige stone, and a brighter but restrained garden outside. The contrast between shaded architecture and sunlit garden must remain gentle and film-like.

No fantasy glow, crowded tourists, modern signs, furniture, or dramatic sunset effects.

## 4) Background and Props

The arched opening reveals low-saturation greenery and pale afternoon sky or garden brightness.

The crystal glass remains beside Yulim’s thigh, containing a clear pale drink with one small lemon slice and a few herb leaves. The glass must not create exaggerated rainbows, optical duplication, or large highlights.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition

Vertical 3:4 portrait framed from the upper thighs or waist upward. Use a medium-format portrait lens equivalent to approximately 85–105mm on full frame.

Position Yulim just inside the shaded arch and place the brighter garden in the direction of her gaze. Her body turns around 40 degrees toward the garden.

Her face remains visible in a readable three-quarter-side angle, showing the eye line, nose, and lips rather than a complete profile. Keep her face in the middle tones and the garden softly detailed.

## 6) Model Expression

Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with a soft oval face, fair peach-ivory skin, large gentle dark brown eyes, a small natural nose, soft pink lips, and delicate approachable features.

She has long layered dark ash-chocolate-brown hair below the chest, soft C-curl waves, natural volume, slightly asymmetric see-through bangs, and a relaxed 7:3 part.

Her physique has realistic Korean proportions, naturally balanced feminine curves, a slim waist, graceful hips, and calm posture.

Her makeup is natural and semi-matte with muted rosy-beige eyes and muted coral lips. Her expression is calm and reflective without sadness. Her lips remain gently relaxed after the previous smile.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Use soft directional afternoon light entering through the arch. Only a controlled band of light reaches part of her cheek, jaw, and skirt, while the rest remains in readable open shade.

Maintain peach-ivory skin, creamy pale pink, textured soft black, warm beige stone, restrained olive greenery, and detailed charcoal-brown hair.

The atmosphere is contemplative, romantic, spacious, and gently transitional.

## 8) Key Direction

The emotional evidence is the outward gaze, quiet lowered glass, and balanced contrast between the shaded arcade and bright garden. Yulim must remain clearly recognizable and never become a silhouette.

Do not obscure her face, close the shadows, add large flare, generate unrealistic rainbow reflections, or turn the scene into a dramatic farewell.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

### CUT 10 Prompt — The One Who Climbs First

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic analog cinematic architectural portrait photographed on genuine Kodak Portra 400 120 color-negative film with a medium-format camera and professionally scanned through a Noritsu HS-1800 lab scanner.

Kodak Portra 400 must dominate the frame through warm-neutral peach Korean skin, softly visible organic grain, wide dynamic range, detailed deep navy, cream-beige stone, restrained green, open shadows, and smooth highlight rolloff.

Expose at approximately EI 320 to retain complete structure in the navy tailored vest and linen trousers while protecting the bright upper steps and palace stone. Use softened analog edge acuity, restrained micro-contrast, natural architectural detail, gentle tonal compression, subtle Noritsu warmth, and slight variation in scan density.

The image must feel like a genuine medium-format travel negative made while following Yulim up the palace stairs, not a corporate fashion campaign.

Avoid navy turning black, crushed shadows, blown stone, HDR, strong orange grading, high-fashion coldness, ultra-wide leg distortion, extreme low angle, oversized grain, hard digital sharpening, power posing, or advertisement-like confidence.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Yulim climbs the broad outdoor stone steps leading toward the Orangery Palace terrace.

The photographer follows from several steps below. She holds a pair of silver-framed sunglasses loosely in one hand rather than wearing them. Her other arm moves naturally with her climbing rhythm.

She looks toward the upper terrace because she has noticed the next destination first.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

The large exterior stone staircase and upper terrace of the Orangery Palace in Potsdam during a late early-summer afternoon between approximately 4:50 and 6:00 p.m.

Include cream-beige steps, classical balustrades, portions of the palace above, restrained garden greenery, and pale afternoon sky. The staircase remains open and monumental without looking empty or artificially perfect.

No close tourists, construction screens, modern handrails, signs, dramatic sunset, or artificial palace enlargement.

## 4) Background and Props

Broad rising stone steps lead toward the palace structure at the top of the frame.

Yulim carries classic sunglasses with a square silver frame and deep-green tinted lenses. The sunglasses remain below waist level and are not intentionally displayed.

No bag, drink, flowers, or additional accessories.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition

Vertical 3:4 full-body composition photographed from a lower position several steps behind Yulim. Use a medium-format lens equivalent to approximately 40–50mm on full frame.

The angle is low enough to reveal the staircase’s upward direction but never an extreme ground-level perspective. Place Yulim slightly away from the central staircase axis.

Capture her mid-step, with one foot moving toward the next stair and her posture naturally inclined forward only as required for climbing. Include the palace architecture in the upper frame while limiting empty sky.

Her gaze is directed toward the upper landing, not toward the camera.

## 6) Model Expression

Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with a soft oval face, clear fair peach-ivory skin, large gentle dark brown eyes with slightly downturned outer corners, a small natural nose, soft pink lips, and delicate features.

She has long layered dark ash-chocolate-brown hair falling below the chest, natural volume, softly curled ends, slightly asymmetric see-through bangs, and a relaxed 7:3 part.

Her body has healthy, realistic Korean proportions, naturally balanced feminine curves, a slim waist, graceful hips, and elegant posture.

Her makeup is natural peach-ivory and semi-matte, with muted rose-beige eyes and understated rose-beige lips. Her expression shows quiet concentration and forward curiosity rather than a smile.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Use lowered late-afternoon sunlight arriving from the side, creating gentle dimension across the steps and tailored clothing.

Maintain detailed deep navy, warm cream-beige stone, peach-ivory skin, restrained deep green, soft silver highlights, and open charcoal-brown hair shadows. Protect both the bright upper staircase and shaded navy clothing.

The atmosphere is confident, mobile, elegant, and quietly adventurous.

## 8) Key Direction

The visible evidence of confidence is that Yulim moves first and looks toward the destination before the photographer reaches it. Her confidence must come from natural movement, not a powerful facial performance.

Do not stop her with both feet together, lengthen her legs through extreme wide-angle distortion, show the sunglasses toward the camera, create an authoritarian expression, or make her pose like a business advertisement.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

### CUT 11 Prompt — Turning When Her Name Is Called

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic analog cinematic movement portrait photographed on genuine Kodak Portra 400 120 color-negative film with a medium-format camera and professionally scanned through a Noritsu HS-1800 lab scanner.

Portra 400 must clearly shape the frame through soft peach Korean skin, visible fine organic grain, wide exposure latitude, detailed deep navy, creamy stone, restrained green, open dark hair, and smooth highlight rolloff.

Expose at approximately EI 320 to maintain the linen texture, vest structure, pale stair highlights, skin detail, and shaded architectural surfaces. Use softened analog edge acuity, restrained micro-contrast, gentle tonal compression, subtle color-density variation, and a warm but not orange Noritsu scan.

Avoid blacked-out navy clothing, blown steps, HDR, hard sharpening, artificial grain, vivid green, over-pink skin, exaggerated torso twisting, dominant sunglasses, cold authority, chin-raised power posing, or staged eye contact.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Yulim continues climbing the palace stairs when the photographer calls her name from below.

She slows slightly without fully stopping. One foot remains directed toward the next step while only her upper body turns back. The photograph captures the small imbalance and incomplete rotation of a real movement.

She makes clear eye contact with the photographer and answers the call with a small, relaxed smile.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

The broad exterior stone staircase of the Orangery Palace in Potsdam during a lowered late-afternoon early-summer light.

Include cream-beige steps, a classical balustrade, restrained garden greenery, and part of the palace terrace. The background should emphasize the diagonal rise of the steps without cutting awkwardly across Yulim’s joints.

No crowded tourists, construction barriers, modern signs, dramatic sunset sky, or artificial studio lighting.

## 4) Background and Props

The staircase and pale balustrade form layered lines behind Yulim.

She holds square silver-framed sunglasses with deep-green tinted lenses below her waist in one hand. The glasses remain a subtle travel accessory rather than a product.

No handbag, drink, bouquet, or other props.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition

Vertical 3:4 medium portrait framed from slightly above the knees upward. Use a medium-format portrait lens equivalent to approximately 75–85mm on full frame.

Photograph from several steps below Yulim without using an extreme upward angle. Her lower body continues facing the ascending direction while her torso and face turn back.

One foot is positioned toward the next step, preserving the sense of continued movement. Place warm pale stone behind the deep-navy clothing to ensure clear separation.

Her gaze meets the camera directly.

## 6) Model Expression

Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with a soft oval face, fair peach-ivory skin, large gentle dark brown eyes, a small natural nose, soft pink lips, and delicate approachable features.

She has long layered dark ash-chocolate-brown hair below the chest, natural volume, soft C-curl ends, slightly asymmetric see-through bangs, and a relaxed 7:3 part.

Her body has realistic and naturally balanced Korean proportions, a slim waist, graceful hips, healthy curves, and elegant posture.

Her makeup is semi-matte with natural peach-ivory skin, low-saturation rosy-beige eye makeup, and muted rose-beige lips.

Her expression suggests, “Why are you still down there?” through a small relaxed smile and softly questioning eyes.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Use low late-afternoon side light reflected from the pale stairs. Allow a soft highlight along one cheek and shoulder while maintaining detail in both sides of her face.

Maintain peach-ivory skin, detailed deep navy, warm cream stone, restrained green, subtle silver, and open dark-brown hair shadows.

The atmosphere is confident, affectionate, spontaneous, and gently playful.

## 8) Key Direction

The emotional evidence is the unfinished turn, one foot continuing upward, direct eye contact, and small questioning smile. The frame must look captured immediately after her name was called, not after she was instructed to pose.

Do not turn her whole body toward the camera, arch her back, raise her chin, place both feet together, display the sunglasses, or create a dominant power portrait.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

After a long palace walk, Yulim sits diagonally on one side of a garden bench and looks toward a distant fountain or layered trees.

A camel-brown shoulder bag rests on the opposite side of the bench. A small empty space remains between Yulim and the bag, large enough to suggest the place where the photographer had been sitting moments earlier.

A quiet official garden path inside Sanssouci Park near the Orangery Palace, during an early-summer evening approximately 50–70 minutes before sunset.

## 4) Background and Props

A garden bench, soft layers of trees and shrubs, a distant fountain shape, and gently filtered evening light.

The empty bench space between Yulim and the bag is a central narrative element.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition

Vertical 3:4 environmental seated portrait that preserves the bench and surrounding garden. Use a medium-format lens equivalent to approximately 55–70mm on full frame.

Use a soft foreground leaf or tree-trunk edge to create an observational feeling, but never cover her face. Yulim sits diagonally rather than frontally, with her knees and feet naturally unaligned.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Maintain peach-ivory skin, creamy ivory organza, restrained deep chocolate brown, warm camel leather, muted olive and forest green, and a low-saturation blue-gray fountain. Protect organza and satin highlights while retaining detail in hair and foliage.

The atmosphere is intimate, restful, quietly romantic, and emotionally close.

## 8) Key Direction

The emotional evidence is the empty bench space, Yulim’s diagonally relaxed posture, and her distant calm gaze. The unseen date partner is implied by the vacant place rather than shown.

Soft leaves may frame the outer edges of the image, but the eyes, nose, mouth, and facial outline remain unobstructed. The camel-brown shoulder bag may appear softly at the far edge or background of the bench without becoming visually important.

The distant fountain remains a low-contrast recognizable shape.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition

Vertical 3:4 waist-up medium portrait. Use a medium-format portrait lens equivalent to approximately 85–105mm on full frame.

Photograph close to Yulim’s natural eye level from the position of her date partner. Her torso turns slightly toward the camera, but her gaze is directed at the photographer’s face rather than fixed formally into the center of the lens.

Place her face away from the exact center and preserve a small amount of garden context. Use moderate depth of field around f/4–f/5.6 equivalent, keeping both eyes clear while gently softening the fountain and foliage.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Use soft filtered evening light combined with gentle reflected light from the path and surrounding foliage. Avoid hard leaf shadows on her eyes, nose, or lips.

Maintain peach-ivory skin, creamy ivory, restrained chocolate brown, warm camel, muted olive and forest green, and low-saturation blue-gray. Slightly protect the organza highlights so its delicate transparency remains visible.

The atmosphere is close, safe, affectionate, and quietly romantic.

## 8) Key Direction

The visible evidence of intimacy is her slight torso turn, relaxed eyes, small responsive smile, and naturally resting hands. The photograph must prioritize the face she shows to a trusted person rather than idealized camera beauty.

Do not make her rest her chin on her hand, lean excessively toward the camera, lower the neckline, cover her face with leaves, erase the garden completely, or create a static formal portrait.

# CUT 1 Prompt — A Figure Standing in the Blue Waves

## 1) Film Reference and Color Palette

Create an ultra-realistic analog environmental portrait photographed on Kodak Portra 160 120 medium-format color-negative film, exposed at approximately EI 125, using a professionally scanned medium-format film look.

Kodak Portra 160 must define the image through exceptionally fine organic grain, low-contrast summer daylight, pastel cornflower blue, dusty periwinkle blue, pale blue-violet, creamy dry off-white, restrained summer green, softly open shadows, smooth highlight rolloff, airy but controlled color separation, gently softened analog edge acuity, and subtle medium-format spatial depth.

Apply a slightly cool daylight scan balance reminiscent of the airy character of Fujifilm Pro 400H, while retaining Portra 160’s natural skin tone and gentle highlight response.

The cornflowers must not appear as vivid electric blue or artificial cobalt blue. The field should contain subtle variations of muted cornflower blue, dusty periwinkle, pale blue-violet, restrained green stems, partially opened blossoms, bent stems, faded petals, and naturally uneven flower density.

The dress must appear as dry creamy off-white, not pure digital white. Maintain Yulim’s fair ivory skin with only a faint natural peach-pink undertone. Prevent the blue flowers and green stems from creating a strong cyan or green cast across her skin.

Avoid vivid electric blue flowers, strong teal grading, green-tinted skin, orange summer grading, digital HDR, glossy resort-advertising color, hyper-sharp fabric detail, heavy artificial grain, crushed shadows, or excessively faded vintage colors.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

A vast natural cornflower field stretches beneath a pale midsummer sky.

Yulim has slowly walked into the field during a quiet summer journey. As a broad wave of wind passes through the flowers, she pauses mid-step and looks toward the distant movement of the blue field.

She is not posing for the camera. She has stopped because the wind has suddenly lifted one side of her raffia hat and caused the flower field, her hair, and the lower panels of her dress to move around her at different speeds.

The image should express the moment when Yulim is first discovered inside the landscape. Her creamy off-white dress must not feel like a bright white graphic object. It should function as a quiet pale interval inside the repeated blue field.

The emotional tone is open, calm, tactile, dry, and gently aspirational. The viewer should imagine the cool shade beneath the wide hat, the rough raffia touching her fingertips, the dry paper-cotton dress rustling around her legs, the soft flowers moving against the fabric, and a clean summer wind crossing the open field.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

Set the scene in a wide, naturally grown cornflower field in mid-July, photographed between 2:30 p.m. and 3:30 p.m.

The field must not resemble a perfectly maintained botanical garden. Use irregular flower heights, uneven density, partially opened blossoms, occasional faded petals, naturally bent stems, uneven petal spacing, flowers facing different directions, scattered restrained green vegetation, a low open horizon, a pale summer sky with thin high clouds, clean dry air, no mist, no visible humidity, no sweat, and no wet surfaces.

The cornflowers should rise irregularly from below Yulim’s knees to approximately mid-thigh. The ground should remain mostly hidden by flowers.

Remove all modern distractions: no buildings, fences, roads, utility poles, tourists, signs, parked vehicles, or urban skyline.

Wind moves from Yulim’s rear right toward her front left. The same general wind direction must affect loose hair ends, raffia fringe, the lower dress panels, and nearby flowers. However, these elements must not tilt at the same angle. Light petals react first and more sharply. The raffia fringe trembles irregularly. The heavier paper-cotton dress responds slightly later and more gradually.

## 4) Background and Props

Foreground: Place two to four cornflowers close to the lens along the lower and side edges of the frame. They should appear softly out of focus and vary naturally in size, height, petal shape, stem angle, and blossom direction. Use irregular flower shapes, uneven petal spacing, naturally bent stems, and partially opened blossoms. Foreground blur must remain limited to the frame edges. Do not allow any large blurred flower to cover Yulim’s face, hands, hat, or full-body outline.

Midground: Fill approximately the lower two-thirds of the vertical frame with a dense but irregular cornflower field. Yulim stands within the midground, with sections of her ankles, lower legs, and dress naturally interrupted by flowers. Show real physical interaction: flower stems bending against the dress, mild skirt compression, small contact shadows, uneven flower displacement, and slight gaps created by her step.

Background: Include a low horizon and a pale summer sky in the upper portion of the image. Distant vegetation should remain soft and low. Do not place the horizon line through Yulim’s face or neck. Keep it either below her shoulders or clearly above the hat.

Yulim wears an oversized natural raffia boater hat with a wide nearly horizontal brim, slightly warped asymmetry, irregular woven fibers, uneven straw thickness, rough handmade texture, loose fringe ends, a slightly frayed brim, and naturally uneven fringe lengths. No decorative ribbon, logo, metallic decoration, or flowers attached to the hat. The hat must not look like smooth commercial straw, plastic fiber, or a perfectly manufactured circle. One side of the brim is lifted slightly by the wind. Short fringe fibers tremble irregularly, while longer fibers hang lower due to gravity.

## 5) Camera Composition and Framing

Use a vertical 3:4 composition. Photograph the scene as a full-body environmental portrait using a medium-format 6×7 film camera equivalent or a modern medium-format sensor with a natural film rendering.

Camera specifications: medium-format equivalent lens 55–65mm, full-frame equivalent approximately 40–50mm, aperture f/5.6–f/7.1, camera height approximately 90–110cm above ground, shooting distance approximately 9–13m, camera angle relative to Yulim’s front approximately 75–85°, camera kept mostly level, no exaggerated low angle, no extreme wide-angle distortion, and no dramatic upward tilt.

Yulim should occupy only approximately 42–50% of the image height. The cornflower field must be perceived before the viewer notices Yulim. Place Yulim slightly off-center, approximately 5–8% to either side of the vertical centerline. Preserve enough space around the hat, dress, flowers, and horizon to communicate openness.

Gaze direction: Yulim does not look into the camera. She looks toward a distant section of the flower field on the opposite side of the camera. Her face remains in a readable three-quarter side profile, approximately 65–75°, so that the shape of her eyes, nose, and lips remains identifiable.

Pose: weight distributed approximately 60% onto the rear leg; front foot placed half a step forward between the flowers; front knee naturally bent approximately 8–12°; pelvis rotated slightly away from full alignment with the camera; shoulders subtly asymmetrical; torso upright but relaxed; no arched lower back; no exaggerated chest projection; no runway stance; no seductive posing. One arm hangs naturally beside her body. The other arm bends approximately 20–30° as the hand approaches the hat brim.

Hands and contact: The hand on the windward side lightly stabilizes the hat. Thumb beneath the brim, index and middle fingers resting lightly on the upper surface, ring finger and little finger naturally separated, no tight gripping, wrist nearly aligned with the forearm, fingertips creating mild visible pressure, slight brim deformation at the point of contact, small contact shadows beneath the fingertips, brim not passing through the fingers, and hand not covering the eyes or facial outline. The other hand holds no prop: hand relaxed, fingers naturally separated, wrist aligned, palm not fully facing the camera, no duplicated fingers, no merged fingertips, and no flower stems passing through fingers.

## 6) Model Expression

Yulim is a beautiful young Korean woman with a soft oval face, clear fair ivory skin, large gentle dark brown eyes, slightly downturned outer eye corners, a calm approachable gaze, a small natural nose, soft pink lips, delicate facial features, long layered dark ash chocolate-brown hair extending below the chest, soft C-curl waves at the ends, natural hair volume, slightly asymmetric see-through bangs, a 7:3 side part, realistic Korean body proportions, a healthy elegant feminine figure, balanced natural curves, and graceful but unexaggerated posture.

Skin texture: restrained retouching, subtle tonal variation, delicate natural texture, fine facial texture, natural pores visible at close inspection, soft semi-matte skin, no glossy complexion, no sweat, no beauty-filter blur, and no porcelain skin.

Wardrobe: Yulim wears a creamy off-white sleeveless paper-cotton maxi dress with dry paper-cotton texture, crisp but lightweight structure, relaxed A-line fit, modest sleeveless armholes, softly fitted upper torso, generous but realistic skirt volume, multiple fine pintuck folds near the lower skirt, ankle-length hem, matte light diffusion, no lace, no transparency, no glossy satin, no waist belt, no logo, and no excessive body contouring. The dress must not inflate like a balloon. Only the side panels and lower hem should gain partial volume from the wind.

Makeup: soft semi-matte Korean beauty makeup, clean ivory base without excessive brightening, sheer peach-pink blush placed lightly toward the outer cheek, pale peach-beige eyelids, fine natural brown eyeliner, naturally separated lashes, muted peach-pink lips, no glitter, no glassy lip gloss, no heavy contour, and no strong highlighter.

Facial expression: relaxed upper eyelids, minimal tension around the eyes, lips gently closed, mouth corners raised only slightly, no visible teeth, low overall facial tension, quiet appreciation of the moving field, no theatrical joy, and no fashion-model intensity.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

The sun is positioned approximately 35–45° behind and to one side of Yulim, high enough to illuminate the open field but not directly overhead. The wide hat creates a soft shadow over her face. The face must remain readable and must not become a dark silhouette.

Use bright but softened midsummer daylight with thin high-cloud diffusion.

Allow a thin natural rim light only along irregular raffia fibers on top of the hat, loose fringe ends, outer C-curl hair strands, the far shoulder, the side edge of the dress, the partially lifted lower hem, and selected cornflower petal edges. The rim light must not become a white digital outline.

Use pale cool-blue ambient fill from the sky, extremely subtle cool blue-violet bounce from the cornflowers, restrained green bounce from stems and leaves, and neutral warm-beige bounce from the dry ground below. Blue and green reflection should remain extremely subtle, mainly beneath the chin and along the inner arms. Yulim’s skin must remain natural ivory with faint peach-pink undertones.

The final image should feel expansive, tactile, calm, dry, airy, quietly alive, aspirational without looking commercial, and peaceful without appearing static.

## 8) Essential Direction and Physical Anchors

The cornflower field must be perceived before Yulim. The lower dress movement must follow both wind direction and believable paper-cotton weight. Yulim must look toward the moving flowers rather than the camera.

Maintain believable paper-cotton fabric weight, delayed fabric movement relative to flower petals, realistic skirt compression against flowers, contact shadows between the hem and stems, coherent wind direction, coherent sunlight direction, coherent perspective, progressive optical depth, irregular natural flower distribution, realistic garment folds, consistent anatomy, no floating dress, no duplicated flowers, and no impossible vegetation hiding body parts.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue, thin or light weight. The watermark must be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, small, softly blended into the photograph, unobtrusive, and clearly readable only upon close inspection.

## 10) Negative Prompt

Fixed negative prompt: plastic skin, beauty-filter face, malformed hands, fused fingers, extra fingers, duplicated fingers, oversized eyes, clipped highlights, artificial HDR, CGI rendering, over-sharpening, glossy skin, porcelain blur, hyper-sharp digital texture, strong teal cast, green-tinted skin, orange summer grading, vivid electric blue flowers, artificial film grain, transparent dress, floating fabric, exaggerated body curves.

Set-specific negative prompt: foreground flowers covering the face, perfectly repeated procedural flower patterns, all flowers bending at the exact same angle, hat brim penetrating the fingers, perfectly circular synthetic straw hat, dress floating above the flowers, horizon line cutting through the face, isolated fashion-model pose, exaggerated low-angle composition.

# CUT 2 Prompt — Summer Resting at Her Fingertips

## 1) Film Reference and Color Palette

Create an ultra-realistic tactile medium-format portrait photographed on Kodak Portra 160 120 color-negative film, exposed at approximately EI 125 and professionally scanned with fine analog detail and restrained daylight contrast.

Kodak Portra 160 must define the image through exceptionally fine organic grain, low-contrast summer daylight, soft cornflower blue, dusty periwinkle, creamy dry off-white, restrained summer green, natural ivory Korean skin, smooth highlight rolloff, softly open shadows, subtle medium-format depth, controlled micro-contrast, and gently softened analog edge acuity.

This cut must emphasize the tactile separation between dry semi-matte skin, rough irregular natural raffia, crisp matte paper-cotton, and soft delicate cornflower petals. The textures must remain clearly distinguishable without becoming digitally over-sharpened.

Apply a lightly cool daylight scan balance, while retaining gentle natural skin tones.

Avoid teal grading, green skin, orange summer warmth, glossy beauty photography, digital HDR, excessive skin brightening, hyper-sharp texture, synthetic straw, or commercial resort-advertising polish.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Yulim is slowly walking along a narrow path between tall cornflowers. A slightly stronger gust suddenly lifts one side of her oversized raffia hat.

Without fully stopping, she raises one hand and lightly presses the brim with only her fingertips. This is not a stylized beauty pose. Her gesture has a clear physical reason: she is preventing the hat from lifting while continuing to move through the field.

The image is a close portrait, but the central subject is not simply Yulim’s face. The frame must communicate the contrast between her soft skin, the rough handmade raffia, the dry paper-cotton dress, and the soft blurred cornflowers behind her.

The emotional tone is quiet, tactile, natural, and softly intimate.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

Use the same mid-July cornflower field and the same time period, approximately 3:00 p.m.

The summer air is bright, dry, and gently cool in feeling despite the strong daylight. Use a pale sky, thin high clouds, mild continuous wind, an occasional stronger gust, clean dry air, no humidity, no sweat, no visible dust cloud, irregular flowers and stems, and natural uneven field density.

The wind remains present, but at the photographed moment the hat fringe trembles slightly, loose hair strands move gently, the entire hairstyle does not blow across the face, the dress remains weighted and believable, and background flowers lean at varied angles.

## 4) Background and Props

Foreground: Include only one or two softly blurred cornflowers near the lower edge of the frame. Do not place foreground flowers between Yulim’s hand and the hat. Do not cover the eyes, fingers, brim contact point, lips, or facial outline.

Midground: The sharp focal zone must contain Yulim’s face, her hand, the raffia brim, irregular fringe fibers, upper dress structure, and paper-cotton folds near the neckline and torso.

Background: The cornflower field should appear as layered soft blue and restrained green, but not as a completely abstract blur. Some irregular flower shapes should remain recognizable. Use progressive optical depth rather than extreme background melting.

Hat condition: One side of the brim is slightly pressed down by Yulim’s fingertips. The opposite side is lifted subtly by the wind. This creates a physically believable asymmetrical silhouette. The hat must feature irregular woven fibers, uneven straw thickness, a slightly warped handmade form, rough dry raffia texture, uneven fringe lengths, loose frayed ends, natural gravity, no decorative ribbon, no logo, and no attached flowers.

## 5) Camera Composition and Framing

Use a vertical 3:4 composition. Frame Yulim from approximately the upper chest upward while including the entire hat and fringe.

Camera specifications: medium-format equivalent lens 90–110mm, full-frame equivalent approximately 70–85mm, aperture f/3.5–f/4.5, shooting distance approximately 1.8–2.5m, camera height between collarbone and eye level, camera angle relative to her front approximately 70–80°, camera positioned slightly forward on the opposite side of her gaze, no extreme close-up distortion, no cropped hat top, no cut fringe, and no exaggerated shallow depth of field.

Leave a small area of negative space above the hat. Show the dress neckline and upper folds without emphasizing the chest or body contour.

Gaze direction: Yulim does not look into the camera. She looks downward and slightly to the side, toward the flowers beneath the brim. Her pupils must not roll unnaturally downward. The upper eyelids lower gently while the gaze direction shifts subtly below the camera line.

Pose: upper torso rotated approximately 10–15° in the direction of movement; camera-side shoulder slightly lowered; elbow of the hat-holding arm approximately 15–25cm away from the torso; elbow angle approximately 75–95°; opposite shoulder relaxed; neck mostly upright; chin lowered only approximately 3–5°; no exaggerated neck tilt; no raised chest; no beauty-campaign posture; and no seductive gesture.

Hand and hat contact: The hand lightly stabilizing the brim must be anatomically precise. Thumb beneath the brim, index and middle fingers lightly touching the upper surface, pressure applied mainly through the fingertips, ring finger either barely touching or remaining 2–4mm away, little finger naturally separated, short nails with transparent nude-pink polish, wrist aligned naturally with the forearm, no backward-bent wrist, no full-palm gripping, no hand covering the eye, no fingers merging with raffia fibers, and no hat passing through fingers. Show mild fingertip pressure, slight brim deformation, small contact shadows, and believable flexible material response.

If the opposite hand appears near the lower frame, it may lightly trace the side folds of the dress. Use index and middle fingers gently moving along the fabric, no fist, no gripping or lifting the dress, no fingers passing through fabric, no overlap between both hands, and no merging with the neck or facial outline.

## 6) Model Expression

Yulim is a beautiful young Korean woman with a soft oval face, clear fair ivory skin, large gentle dark brown eyes, slightly downturned outer eye corners, a calm innocent gaze, a small natural nose, soft pink lips, delicate facial features, faint peach-pink facial undertones, long layered dark ash chocolate-brown hair, soft C-curl waves below the chest, natural volume, slightly asymmetric see-through bangs, a 7:3 side part, approachable Korean SNS lifestyle beauty, and healthy realistic Korean proportions. The face must remain recognizable beneath the hat shadow.

Skin texture: restrained retouching, subtle tonal variation, delicate natural texture, soft semi-matte finish, fine cheek texture, natural pores, no sweat droplets, no greasy forehead, no porcelain blur, no plastic skin, and no glossy cosmetic finish.

Wardrobe: Yulim wears the same creamy off-white sleeveless paper-cotton maxi dress. The visible upper section must feature a simple modest neckline, shoulder straps that are not excessively thin, armholes that are not deeply cut, a softly structured upper torso, subtle vertical folds, visible but understated seams, dry matte fiber texture, no satin sheen, no lace, no transparent fabric, no tight chest contour, and no logo. The cloth should diffuse light rather than reflect it.

Makeup: semi-matte ivory base, sheer peach-pink blush, muted rose-peach lips, natural brown lash line, subtle taupe-beige eyelids, naturally separated lashes, no glitter, no glossy lips, no heavy contour, and no strong highlighter.

Facial expression: upper eyelids slightly lowered, no tension in the lower eyelids, relaxed cheeks, lips gently closed, one mouth corner slightly softer than the other, no symmetrical posed smile, no visible teeth, no dramatic sadness, calm facial muscles, and an expression created naturally by feeling the wind.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

The afternoon sun enters from behind and to one side of Yulim. The wide hat creates a broad soft shadow across the upper face. The eyes must remain visible and must not disappear into black shadow.

Use bright midsummer daylight softened by thin high clouds. The face may remain approximately 0.3–0.5 stops darker than the background, but the eyes, lips, and nose must remain readable.

Use soft cool ambient fill from the open sky and neutral cream bounce from the dry ground below. Do not make the face look artificially lit by a large beauty reflector.

Apply a thin restrained rim light along the hat fringe, loose outer hair strands, far cheek edge, part of the jawline, far shoulder, outer arm, and fine fibers along the dress neckline.

Use an extremely subtle blue-violet reflection from the flowers along the underside of the chin and inner arm. This must enrich the tonal complexity without turning the skin blue, cyan, or green.

The image should feel tactile, intimate, restrained, dry, soft, naturally beautiful, quiet rather than posed, and refined without looking commercial.

## 8) Essential Direction and Physical Anchors

Yulim holds the hat with light fingertip contact rather than gripping it. Raffia, skin, paper-cotton, and flower textures must remain clearly distinct. Yulim’s eyes and facial identity must remain softly visible beneath the hat shadow.

Maintain visible fingertip pressure, slight brim deformation, contact shadows beneath fingertips, believable wrist alignment, natural hair weight under the hat, realistic fabric folds around the shoulder and torso, coherent wind direction, coherent sunlight direction, progressive optical depth, no floating fringe, no merged hand and hat texture, no impossible finger placement, and no face hidden by flowers.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue, thin or light weight. The watermark must be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, softly blended, unobtrusive, and small enough not to compete with the portrait.

## 10) Negative Prompt

Fixed negative prompt: plastic skin, beauty-filter face, malformed hands, fused fingers, extra fingers, duplicated fingers, oversized eyes, clipped highlights, artificial HDR, CGI rendering, over-sharpening, porcelain blur, glossy skin, heavy contour, hyper-sharp fabric, strong teal cast, green-tinted skin, orange grading, transparent dress, synthetic straw texture, artificial film grain.

Set-specific negative prompt: hand gripping the entire hat brim, fingers penetrating the raffia, merged fingers and fringe, hat covering both eyes, foreground flowers covering the hand, distorted wrist, hair covering the entire face, perfectly symmetrical synthetic hat, completely blurred flower background, artificial beauty reflector lighting.
